name: Tom Fitton
subject: Lawsuit for Secret Service’s Code Pink Records
body:
Happy New Year!

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR SECRET SERVICE RECORDS ON DISRUPTION AT TRUMP
DINNER

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36735&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1CWkxZTFRrdmFBRSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=9be67195940c26ef795e2dcd96c64e76b96f8d678b6059a153c8533e4c20e156]

The Secret Service has a tarnished record when it comes to protecting
President Donald Trump, and the American people deserve accountability
from the agencies that are entrusted with the duty of guarding their
president.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36728&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXVzc3MtY29tcGxhaW50LTA0NDA4Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=0e91c4d3bc436662e382d6ff2c49e897a7c9af6b7d09c4564af35fc2226ec05b]
for U.S. Secret Service communications records related to Code Pink
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36729&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29kZXBpbmsub3JnLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=70d071b09f3913f55bb6cd31ba70dee67473050a1b4c6dab141b73a7d3c93de9]
protesters who disrupted a dinner held by
President Donald Trump at a restaurant in Washington, DC, on September
9, 2025 (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36730&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXVzc3MtY29tcGxhaW50LTA0NDA4L11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=c871be9b87c12917569e00491ace39ce8055163f442c755ab39768b2611d77fc
_(No.
1:25-cv-04408)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the Secret Service, a component of the U.S. Department of Homeland
Security, failed to respond to a September 10, 2025, FOIA request for:

* All internal emails and text messages among USSS officials in the
Presidential Protective Division regarding the presence of Code Pink
protestors appearing at Joe’s Seafood, Prime Steak & Stone Crab
restaurant in Washington, D.C. on the evening of September 9, 2025,
while President Trump and other administration officials dined there.

* All emails sent between USSS [U.S. Secret Service] officials and
any email account ending in @codepink.org.

On the evening of September 9, 2025, during President Trump’s dinner
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36731&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlZ2F0ZXdheXB1bmRpdC5jb20vMjAyNS8wOS9wcmVzaWRlbnQtdHJ1bXAtY2VsZWJyYXRlcy1kYy1jcmltZS1maWdodGluZy1zdWNjZXNzLWdvaW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e1bc481d5134ccb52edf57fb91073939b520a0e7366b266932a86b4fea9a2351]
with Vice President J.D. Vance, Secretary of State Marco Rubio,
Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and other officials, a group of Code
Pink activists began a protest
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36732&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93YXNoaW5ndG9uaWFuLmNvbS8yMDI1LzA5LzEwL2hvdy1wcm90ZXN0ZXJzLWdvdC1pbnRvLXRoZS1kYy1yZXN0YXVyYW50LXdoZXJlLXRydW1wLWRpbmVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=7c2e45ec7688103839fd240cd38fa8fbeea413acb5d508909bee0d87fe0b9774]
in the restaurant by chanting slogans and waving Palestinian flags.

In July 2025, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=35667&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmVjb3Jkcy1vbi10cnVtcHMtYXNzYXNzaW4vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=49fbb864b920e46112cb7182301139f4a2f0781950d31d6a872465ba789914a3]
the U.S.
Department of Justice for all records regarding Thomas Matthew Crooks,
who attempted to assassinate Trump on July 13, 2024, (_Judicial Watch
Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=35650&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyMjE2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=eb5528c96be578bc0d8cbe7b176820eea2575ff0473fb39d208877f883c190a3]
(No. 1:25-cv-02216)).

In March 2025, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=34795&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2VjdXJpdHktdHJ1bXAtYXNzYXNzaW5hdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=38a8e48ad32fb8d0b58503332fba2bf2bc8ed486f70362a97a910a347ec3d5bc]
Homeland
Security for records related to security provided for the July 13,
2024, rally in Butler, PA, during which there was an assassination
attempt on Trump (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland
Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=34788&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdS1zLWRocy1yYWxseS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDA3MDQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=31c56e03a03e0232f09620a790032779705700c7ec2fb4672d5a52960289d867]
(No. 1:25-cv-00704)).

In September 2024, following up on reports that the Biden Secret
Service denied Trump’s requests for additional Secret Service
protection, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=33354&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtcmVxdWVzdHMtYnktdHJ1bXAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=63a7a4f7065e2413393973508d59ad19d0a6b7f63e8e89ed2b72d890112f991e]
for
Secret Service and other records regarding potential increased
protective services to Trump’s security detail prior to the attempt
on his life at his July 13 campaign rally in Butler, PA (_Judicial
Watch v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=33391&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXVzc3MtaW5jcmVhc2UtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyNDk1L11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7e29cdfada497730ed6d5ca691dfa31f2d7e75ff8b29570046e014c592cc205d
_(No.
1:24-cv-02495)).

CRIMINAL ALIENS WERE USING ARREST WARRANTS, REMOVAL ORDERS AS LEGAL ID

Amazing as it sounds, the Biden administration compounded the dangers
of its open border lawlessness by allowing the very warrants that
should have gotten criminal aliens detained or deported to be used as
ID to board commercial aircraft.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36724&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXRzYS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDQ0MTQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2e4db4f543362910819ade132a2ba7d7783e072339f37a4c4e9adef1a51bb2a9]
against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security for records on
migrants who entered the United States from 2020 to 2025 using arrest
warrants and removal orders as proof of identification (_Judicial
Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36736&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLXRzYS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDQ0MTQvXV8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=a3ef57171d688794366bb285e9d44bc70a3c36e5125455824e6fa668b2ff9642
_(No.
1:25-cv-04414)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), a component of
Homeland Security, failed to comply with a February 26, 2025, FOIA
request for:

> Data reflecting the number of persons entering the United States
> from 2020 through 2025 who used any of the following documents as
> proof of identification, with the data broken out by category:
>
> * Warrant for Arrest of Alien,
> * Warrant of Removal/Deportation,
> * Order of Removal on Recognizance,
> * Order of Supervision,
> * Notice to Appear,
> * Arrival and Departure Form,
> * and/or Alien Booking Record.

Immigration and Customs Enforcement forwarded our request to U.S.
Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS), which forwarded it to
U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP), but no records have been
forthcoming. We filed an identical FOIA request with the
Transportation and Safety Administration (TSA), which has also failed
to comply.

In January 2022, the Biden administration admitted
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36725&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvdHNhLWNvbmZpcm1zLWFsbG93cy1pbGxlZ2FsLWltbWlncmFudHMtYXJyZXN0LXdhcnJhbnRzLWlkLWFpcnBvcnRzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=33d992b6b9c9af19956fd23c734aa5e78a5643e3ba7c02d4c1fc320a9db59d0d]
that the Transportation and Safety Administration was allowing illegal
immigrants to use arrest warrants as an alternative form of
identification to board commercial airplanes.

In a January 31, 2022, letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36726&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGF3bGV5LnNlbmF0ZS5nb3Yvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzL2ZpbGVzLzIwMjItMDIvMjAyMi0wMS0zMSBMZXR0ZXIgdG8gREhTX0ZJTkFMJTViMSU1ZC5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=8391cc66ab994ac1b95d1e7fece0fcfe4d674776455c3e639dc1838f55b57863]
to Transportation and Safety Administration Administrator David
Pekoske, Sen. Josh Hawley (R-MO) stated, “The point of an arrest
warrant is for police to actively seek out and apprehend criminals.
However, you have now confirmed that illegal aliens may present arrest
warrants to federal officials to board commercial aircrafts.”

In November 2025, we sued Evanston, IL, Mayor Daniel Biss
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36459&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1ldmFuc3Rvbi1pbGxpbm9pcy1tYXlvci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=24fe523f52b659b69aff65fbc9bd77b57bcd88427d52dffe2f26786b64537081]
for records related to obstruction of federal immigration enforcement,
as well as Arizona Gov. Katie Hobbs
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36414&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtc3Vlcy1hei1nb3YtZm9yLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=ad5045a561e572f54dfab423f6befa071980db074a2ee4294103a555b42fa39a]
for records regarding her office reportedly ordering state police and
the National Guard to withhold cooperation from federal immigration
enforcement authorities.

We recently pointed out
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36675&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVzLXJlbGVhc2UtOTAwMC1jcmltaW5hbC1hbGllbnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=456784a5783a4fc8ae960760b9c21bd165450df7830449e0ae5ddb1dc09e4768]
that in just two states with “sanctuary” policies, nearly 9,000
criminal aliens were released from jails and prisons since January 20,
defying Immigration and Customs Enforcement detainers to deport them.

In October 2025, we reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36386&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXAtdGFzay1mb3JjZS1jYXRjaGVzLWNhcnRlbC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=078d7fc6dc404f6f4e3957fcaf7ee12448bca8df37235bc90953dd770ddd5318]
on a
Homeland Security Task Force (HSTF), established by President Trump on
the day of his inauguration to tackle a pandemic of transnational
organized crime created by the Biden administration’s
“disgraceful” open border policies, had made thousands of arrests
and seized over 1,000 illegal firearms, 91 tons of drugs and $3
million in currency.

LAWSUIT ACCUSES TRUMP OF DISCRIMINATION FOR ENDING DEI PROGRAMS

Rooting out the Biden administration’s divisive, leftist Diversity
Equity and Inclusion (DEI) programs requires diligent effort, as our
_Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36737&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbm9uLWJpbmFyeS1mZWQtd29ya2VyLWxhd3N1aXQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=5cc6bf19f6c8e1e1c85b375cbc0042dd9d13ff03c560c752cd7d99ffab69f4c7].

> Spearheaded by a woman who identifies as “non-binary,” a group
> of federal employees who worked in specially created government
> Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) departments under the Biden
> administration are suing President Trump for ending the wasteful and
> exclusionary programs and firing them. The former government workers
> claim they were unlawfully dismissed because the president violated
> employment protections under Title VII of the Civil Rights Act by
> disproportionately impacting and targeting black, women and
> non-binary federal employees as well as people of color and those
> perceived of advocating for legally protected racial and gender
> groups, including LGBTQ people. “While neutral on their face,
> these policies had an unlawful disparate impact on women and
> non-binary employees, and/or people of color,” reads the lawsuit
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36738&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWNsdWRjLm9yZy9hcHAvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDI1LzEyL0ZlbGwtdi1UcnVtcC1Db21wbC4tQXMtRmlsZWQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=dc56d07857ac3ee708ea02d4b48e1f41edbe0d2ee5b1c73e23d2735ad9c663a9]
> filed this month in the United States District Court for the
> District of Columbia. The complaint acknowledges that, while changes
> in presidential priorities are normal during an administration
> change, the broad DEI cuts were targeted actions intended to punish
> perceived political enemies like the plaintiffs in this case.
>
> The governmentwide DEI cuts have impacted an unknown number of
> federal employees, but could potentially be in the thousands,
> according to the lawsuit. It identifies at least 40 women or
> non-binary individuals, and more than 40 people of color who lost
> their DEI government jobs under Trump. Among them is Mahri Stainnak,
> a non-binary (does not identify as a man or woman and uses
> “they” pronoun) biological woman who served as DEI deputy
> director in the Office of Personnel Management’s (OPM) human
> resources office under Biden. Stainnak was fired for advancing
> initiatives for LGBTQ workers, the lawsuit says, and a fellow
> plaintiff for advocating for protected racial and gender groups at
> the Department of Homeland Security’s (DHS) Office of Civil Rights
> and Civil Liberties. Others include an air traffic control manager
> who facilitated inclusivity, a public health advisor who promoted
> outreach to LGBTQ communities, a DHS worker who ensured language
> competency at the border, and a forestry employee who ensured
> equitable access to federal lands. The anti-DEI directives reveal
> that people targeted for termination include substantially more
> women and/or non-binary workers and an over-selection of people of
> color with a substantial over-selection of black employees, the
> complaint states.
>
> For example, the lawsuit says, at least 97 female and 37 male
> employees were cut from a DHS civil rights office characterized by
> DOGE as corrupted by DEI. “When compared to the number of women in
> the federal workforce (approximately 918,127) vs. men in the federal
> workforce (approximately 1,122,155) or even compared within DHS
> (69,019 vs.130,616), the adverse impact is stark and
> disproportionate,” the complaint states, adding that “the impact
> on employees of color is similarly evident.” To back this up the
> lawsuit reveals that 41 black employees and 71 white employees were
> fired from the same unit with approximately 383,573 black employees
> and around 1,213,968 white employees, constituting what the
> plaintiffs allege is a “disparate impact.” As a result of the
> Trump administration’s discriminatory patterns and practices,
> women and people of color have been systematically harmed, the
> complaint states, alleging that the former DEI workers were
> “targeted due to their protected race and/or gender status.”
>
> The governmentwide DEI fiasco was created when Biden strong armed
> all federal agencies to implement plans to advance racial equity and
> support for underserved communities
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=28916&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4taXNzdWVzLXNlY29uZC1leGVjdXRpdmUtb3JkZXIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=262efd4f4d6c8b9d56c79b1b477a90777d17975c4aadb4bfa27e0a18c4ae6e9d]
> with a 2021 executive order. The order included a mandate for all
> government agencies to establish an equity team and proactive
> engagement with members of underserved communities through
> culturally and linguistically appropriate listening sessions. Biden
> also established a White House Steering Committee on Equity composed
> of senior officials who coordinated the government’s sweeping
> efforts to promote his leftist agenda. The Treasury Department named
> its first ever racial equity chief, a veteran La Raza official who
> spent a decade at the nation’s most influential open borders
> group. The Department of Defense (DOD) used outrageous anti-bias
> materials that indoctrinated troops with anti-American and racially
> inflammatory training on diversity topics. The U. S. Department of
> Agriculture (USDA) created an equity commission to address
> longstanding inequities in agriculture. The nation’s medical
> research agency launched a special minority health and health
> disparities division that issued a study declaring COVID-19
> exacerbated preexisting resentment against racial/ethnic minorities
> and marginalized communities.
>
> On the day of his inauguration President Trump signed an executive
> order
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=34346&F=T&&hash=8daccf0ceece6959951960baefe9c6c4c78a966b0f543354867b44be4cc2eaf9]

>

> all government DEI and environmental justice offices and positions,
> calling them “illegal and immoral discrimination programs” that

HAPPY NEW YEAR!

This is the season of resolutions for the coming year, and the
practice must speak to something deep within us because its roots are
ancient.

The Babylonians are said
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=30996&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGlzdG9yeS5jb20vbmV3cy90aGUtaGlzdG9yeS1vZi1uZXcteWVhcnMtcmVzb2x1dGlvbnM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=5089f7b2f366848cc3e5c37c4321b357bd50cc4687e112727c29a31986f28e38]
to
have been the first to make New Year’s resolutions, some 4,000 years
ago. In 46 B.C., Julius Caesar established January 1 as the beginning
of the new year. The month is named for Janus, the two-faced god who
symbolically looked backwards into the previous year and ahead into
the future.

Today’s resolutions are typically about health and personal
improvement. Let me propose, however, that we also resolve to stand
strong together against the ill winds blowing across our land.

For instance, as you know from my prior updates, Judicial Watch will
be going back to
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=36458&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC1taXNzaXNzaXBwaS1iYWxsb3QtZGVhZGxpbmUtY2FzZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=afaedc6d451eed9a2fc08750f7a924bc9e68deb2c0eb045724f302a83613ebe2]
the Supreme Court of the United States in 2026 for another landmark
case – this one to challenge Mississippi’s lawless practice of
counting ballots received up to five days after Election Day. At the
heart of this case is a simple question: When is an election really
over?

Looking back at history, as the New Year of 1942 began
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=30997&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9yaWNoYXJkbGFuZ3dvcnRoLmNvbS9oYXBweS1uZXcteWVhci0xOTQyP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=a33f15a09a7e45ced28790783f6027a37cafc6995aee8f59b9909d5cbef21227],
Hitler held
Europe, Nazi U-boats prowled the Atlantic, and America had received a
heavy blow at Pearl Harbor.

British Prime Minister Winston Churchill was in the United States and
spoke
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=30997&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9yaWNoYXJkbGFuZ3dvcnRoLmNvbS9oYXBweS1uZXcteWVhci0xOTQyP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=a33f15a09a7e45ced28790783f6027a37cafc6995aee8f59b9909d5cbef21227]
to our
Congress about our common enemies:

> They have certainly embarked upon a very considerable
> undertaking.... _What kind of a people do they think we are?_ Is it
> possible they do not realize that we shall never cease to persevere
> against them until they have been taught a lesson which they and the
> world will never forget?

Later, on a train in New York traveling near President Franklin
Roosevelt’s home at Hyde Park, he called staff and reporters to the
dining car. He wanted to “cast some forward light upon the dark,
inscrutable mysteries of the future.” He toasted them:

> Here’s to 1942, here’s to a year of toil—a year of struggle
> and peril, and a long step forward towards victory. May we all come
> through safe and with honour.

Let us take courage today from those words and resolve to embrace the
coming year with perseverance and honor. (One great way to enter this
important year is with a donation to your Judicial Watch
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78563&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bc43d7a716486efb273b77c9505164ad25a50b75c338f13edf773f14574dcfc5].)

Happy New Year!

Until next week,

clean_body: Happy New Year! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR SECRET SERVICE RECORDS ON DISRUPTION AT TRUMP DINNER [] The Secret Service has a tarnished record when it comes to protecting President Donald Trump, and the American people deserve accountability from the agencies that are entrusted with the duty of guarding their president. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] for U.S. Secret Service communications records related to Code Pink [] protesters who disrupted a dinner held by President Donald Trump at a restaurant in Washington, DC, on September 9, 2025 (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [ (No. 1:25-cv-04408)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Secret Service, a component of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security, failed to respond to a September 10, 2025, FOIA request for: All internal emails and text messages among USSS officials in the Presidential Protective Division regarding the presence of Code Pink protestors appearing at Joe’s Seafood, Prime Steak & Stone Crab restaurant in Washington, D.C. on the evening of September 9, 2025, while President Trump and other administration officials dined there. All emails sent between USSS [U.S. Secret Service] officials and any email account ending in @codepink.org. On the evening of September 9, 2025, during President Trump’s dinner [] with Vice President J.D. Vance, Secretary of State Marco Rubio, Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and other officials, a group of Code Pink activists began a protest [] in the restaurant by chanting slogans and waving Palestinian flags. In July 2025, we sued [] the U.S. Department of Justice for all records regarding Thomas Matthew Crooks, who attempted to assassinate Trump on July 13, 2024, (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-02216)). In March 2025, we sued [] Homeland Security for records related to security provided for the July 13, 2024, rally in Butler, PA, during which there was an assassination attempt on Trump (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [] (No. 1:25-cv-00704)). In September 2024, following up on reports that the Biden Secret Service denied Trump’s requests for additional Secret Service protection, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [] for Secret Service and other records regarding potential increased protective services to Trump’s security detail prior to the attempt on his life at his July 13 campaign rally in Butler, PA (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [ (No. 1:24-cv-02495)). CRIMINAL ALIENS WERE USING ARREST WARRANTS, REMOVAL ORDERS AS LEGAL ID Amazing as it sounds, the Biden administration compounded the dangers of its open border lawlessness by allowing the very warrants that should have gotten criminal aliens detained or deported to be used as ID to board commercial aircraft. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security for records on migrants who entered the United States from 2020 to 2025 using arrest warrants and removal orders as proof of identification (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [ (No. 1:25-cv-04414)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), a component of Homeland Security, failed to comply with a February 26, 2025, FOIA request for: Data reflecting the number of persons entering the United States from 2020 through 2025 who used any of the following documents as proof of identification, with the data broken out by category: Warrant for Arrest of Alien, Warrant of Removal/Deportation, Order of Removal on Recognizance, Order of Supervision, Notice to Appear, Arrival and Departure Form, * and/or Alien Booking Record. Immigration and Customs Enforcement forwarded our request to U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS), which forwarded it to U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP), but no records have been forthcoming. We filed an identical FOIA request with the Transportation and Safety Administration (TSA), which has also failed to comply. In January 2022, the Biden administration admitted [] that the Transportation and Safety Administration was allowing illegal immigrants to use arrest warrants as an alternative form of identification to board commercial airplanes. In a January 31, 2022, letter [] to Transportation and Safety Administration Administrator David Pekoske, Sen. Josh Hawley (R-MO) stated, “The point of an arrest warrant is for police to actively seek out and apprehend criminals. However, you have now confirmed that illegal aliens may present arrest warrants to federal officials to board commercial aircrafts.” In November 2025, we sued Evanston, IL, Mayor Daniel Biss [] for records related to obstruction of federal immigration enforcement, as well as Arizona Gov. Katie Hobbs [] for records regarding her office reportedly ordering state police and the National Guard to withhold cooperation from federal immigration enforcement authorities. We recently pointed out [] that in just two states with “sanctuary” policies, nearly 9,000 criminal aliens were released from jails and prisons since January 20, defying Immigration and Customs Enforcement detainers to deport them. In October 2025, we reported [] on a Homeland Security Task Force (HSTF), established by President Trump on the day of his inauguration to tackle a pandemic of transnational organized crime created by the Biden administration’s “disgraceful” open border policies, had made thousands of arrests and seized over 1,000 illegal firearms, 91 tons of drugs and $3 million in currency. LAWSUIT ACCUSES TRUMP OF DISCRIMINATION FOR ENDING DEI PROGRAMS Rooting out the Biden administration’s divisive, leftist Diversity Equity and Inclusion (DEI) programs requires diligent effort, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. Spearheaded by a woman who identifies as “non-binary,” a group of federal employees who worked in specially created government Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) departments under the Biden administration are suing President Trump for ending the wasteful and exclusionary programs and firing them. The former government workers claim they were unlawfully dismissed because the president violated employment protections under Title VII of the Civil Rights Act by disproportionately impacting and targeting black, women and non-binary federal employees as well as people of color and those perceived of advocating for legally protected racial and gender groups, including LGBTQ people. “While neutral on their face, these policies had an unlawful disparate impact on women and non-binary employees, and/or people of color,” reads the lawsuit [] filed this month in the United States District Court for the District of Columbia. The complaint acknowledges that, while changes in presidential priorities are normal during an administration change, the broad DEI cuts were targeted actions intended to punish perceived political enemies like the plaintiffs in this case. The governmentwide DEI cuts have impacted an unknown number of federal employees, but could potentially be in the thousands, according to the lawsuit. It identifies at least 40 women or non-binary individuals, and more than 40 people of color who lost their DEI government jobs under Trump. Among them is Mahri Stainnak, a non-binary (does not identify as a man or woman and uses “they” pronoun) biological woman who served as DEI deputy director in the Office of Personnel Management’s (OPM) human resources office under Biden. Stainnak was fired for advancing initiatives for LGBTQ workers, the lawsuit says, and a fellow plaintiff for advocating for protected racial and gender groups at the Department of Homeland Security’s (DHS) Office of Civil Rights and Civil Liberties. Others include an air traffic control manager who facilitated inclusivity, a public health advisor who promoted outreach to LGBTQ communities, a DHS worker who ensured language competency at the border, and a forestry employee who ensured equitable access to federal lands. The anti-DEI directives reveal that people targeted for termination include substantially more women and/or non-binary workers and an over-selection of people of color with a substantial over-selection of black employees, the complaint states. For example, the lawsuit says, at least 97 female and 37 male employees were cut from a DHS civil rights office characterized by DOGE as corrupted by DEI. “When compared to the number of women in the federal workforce (approximately 918,127) vs. men in the federal workforce (approximately 1,122,155) or even compared within DHS (69,019 vs.130,616), the adverse impact is stark and disproportionate,” the complaint states, adding that “the impact on employees of color is similarly evident.” To back this up the lawsuit reveals that 41 black employees and 71 white employees were fired from the same unit with approximately 383,573 black employees and around 1,213,968 white employees, constituting what the plaintiffs allege is a “disparate impact.” As a result of the Trump administration’s discriminatory patterns and practices, women and people of color have been systematically harmed, the complaint states, alleging that the former DEI workers were “targeted due to their protected race and/or gender status.” The governmentwide DEI fiasco was created when Biden strong armed all federal agencies to implement plans to advance racial equity and support for underserved communities [] with a 2021 executive order. The order included a mandate for all government agencies to establish an equity team and proactive engagement with members of underserved communities through culturally and linguistically appropriate listening sessions. Biden also established a White House Steering Committee on Equity composed of senior officials who coordinated the government’s sweeping efforts to promote his leftist agenda. The Treasury Department named its first ever racial equity chief, a veteran La Raza official who spent a decade at the nation’s most influential open borders group. The Department of Defense (DOD) used outrageous anti-bias materials that indoctrinated troops with anti-American and racially inflammatory training on diversity topics. The U. S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) created an equity commission to address longstanding inequities in agriculture. The nation’s medical research agency launched a special minority health and health disparities division that issued a study declaring COVID-19 exacerbated preexisting resentment against racial/ethnic minorities and marginalized communities. On the day of his inauguration President Trump signed an executive order [] [ all government DEI and environmental justice offices and positions, calling them “illegal and immoral discrimination programs” that resulted in “immense public waste.” The fired DEI government employees accuse the president of having disdain for DEI and associating it with political ideologies he disfavors, such as Marxism or the radical left as well as people of color from the Democratic party such as Kamala Harris. HAPPY NEW YEAR! This is the season of resolutions for the coming year, and the practice must speak to something deep within us because its roots are ancient. The Babylonians are said [] to have been the first to make New Year’s resolutions, some 4,000 years ago. In 46 B.C., Julius Caesar established January 1 as the beginning of the new year. The month is named for Janus, the two-faced god who symbolically looked backwards into the previous year and ahead into the future. Today’s resolutions are typically about health and personal improvement. Let me propose, however, that we also resolve to stand strong together against the ill winds blowing across our land. For instance, as you know from my prior updates, Judicial Watch will be going back to [] the Supreme Court of the United States in 2026 for another landmark case – this one to challenge Mississippi’s lawless practice of counting ballots received up to five days after Election Day. At the heart of this case is a simple question: When is an election really over? Looking back at history, as the New Year of 1942 began [], Hitler held Europe, Nazi U-boats prowled the Atlantic, and America had received a heavy blow at Pearl Harbor. British Prime Minister Winston Churchill was in the United States and spoke [] to our Congress about our common enemies: They have certainly embarked upon a very considerable undertaking.... What kind of a people do they think we are?_ Is it possible they do not realize that we shall never cease to persevere against them until they have been taught a lesson which they and the world will never forget? Later, on a train in New York traveling near President Franklin Roosevelt’s home at Hyde Park, he called staff and reporters to the dining car. He wanted to “cast some forward light upon the dark, inscrutable mysteries of the future.” He toasted them: Here’s to 1942, here’s to a year of toil—a year of struggle and peril, and a long step forward towards victory. May we all come through safe and with honour. Let us take courage today from those words and resolve to embrace the coming year with perseverance and honor. (One great way to enter this important year is with a donation to your Judicial Watch [].) Happy New Year! Until next week, [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

We can’t afford to lose a single voice — not now. — Republican Audit Team | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate.

| | Hi Fellow Patriot,
---
My name is **Victor Marx** -- a husband of 37 years, father of five, grandfather, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and humanitarian who has spent decades serving families and communities around the world. **_I am also the conservative in the race for Governor of Colorado._** I'm running because the challenges we're facing here reflect the challenges facing our entire nation. What happens in one state can strengthen -- _or weaken_ -- the future of America. [**That’s why I’m reaching out today and asking you to become a key early part of our rapidly growing grassroots movement.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=99f0cf5f64fe4e0383232f82f761c175&_e=S2OEk-7Imyh1n_Y9evjuDMr8Rl9xGOOUvYdJEjULSTh0SQPNpo1LCO3-oiYw2KE6b7xEUSEBSOYJlD4uwXiMqzYXJRU0W1o6yllZQ7Fc_CFn4u0pHqZKibH1twb_NccqzF1ndJRF7SlaCt-wmwTmlnsfx3-DazsMw5BySPIfu-RFGqbiEqJGhDn8NuFCQ-OhHUUd2qg1wA98fqm9JmUHU23WozHRswPoizwtkJgD7JjxthI4rfJNNlJKshvzW-fcHaq69HcrG7FWLFi4FSorQFevIoOnhSwfvIFG7znZu6ddm99D2u7naB_AN2mvjuC9Fc_dkhpp71z9m6WgGFrEy6JXZhEya9qMVgpipfc_d7bfDkR1pfvI-FbTYX6RjNdxImIL-fYPf9O0oiSoWHrKG-6WZov8940LpDwJJII7fDhhv3Nfav2qnyPwTCkuq7GVI9Ii3WzaHoJtFNe5dFgWEmqrndTu6wApcDJtApBJx713zBkRXJXaNri2XMIC8w_yovfakOatxF0AvuQEArWdqqeDbLym591hYBVcZwCPUA2qZ5afhAOBSxued46OvgH9n-lk_51nuHkloKdvsQz_t-yqUI-TUFCilh6MNpo405IFLD6mVhFzJJSuHtNGfXsMAoVrH41bUSIw4OceXSCdsg%3D%3D)

For years, my calling has taken me into some of the most difficult places imaginable. From war zones to trafficking corridors to communities devastated by violence, **I 've led more than 150 high-risk missions focused on rescuing and restoring the innocent.** That work exists because **God carried me** through a childhood marked by trauma, instability, and hardship. Through His grace, I rebuilt my life -- and I've spent every day since fighting for those who can't fight for themselves. **_This campaign is no different._** It isn't powered by insiders or special interests. It's powered by people who still believe in Faith, Family, Freedom, and the promise of a stronger America. We're already building real momentum, and we need to keep it going. I want you with us in this fight, [**and a contribution from you of $25, $50 or even $100 will help us continue building a movement that can win here and keep spreading.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=99f0cf5f64fe4e0383232f82f761c175&_e=S2OEk-7Imyh1n_Y9evjuDMr8Rl9xGOOUvYdJEjULSTh0SQPNpo1LCO3-oiYw2KE6b7xEUSEBSOYJlD4uwXiMqzYXJRU0W1o6yllZQ7Fc_CFn4u0pHqZKibH1twb_NccqzF1ndJRF7SlaCt-wmwTmlnsfx3-DazsMw5BySPIfu-RFGqbiEqJGhDn8NuFCQ-OhHUUd2qg1wA98fqm9JmUHUwYoxzsaQNpPAq_1d862RxPGMQmavcjj4X5lWUmAoCcO4iKzVRlD9JGHt4aW-TGERdXIjYSJpaGv-RcIRfMl_XA8wR7kzo-W0NfGS65-38cDg3ctQA8iP92SqnX-0uyLVIscXvdFIcisYd8D4QvMUPoBIu-ZbZ3yJnd29L9BqIw_rKV6M_oLvtUK6JawTE_NQU4E6LJrxs1Qdtc0RYYkoFsv94ZUIJZ6AcQw_5ZTp-G1NQsYVgVmkm37_EWn__dvk3CpuliSLXtKhCvkxQ-KZnBZX2NokCLD3oVhw7bveeYZAFbIzCjguU4qA0kYcu7SZ36J1o64cnkRSx-x0wVVdEMctpUAT5OlEgTOjqzTae3kSjZVORASFvyo6UzYlmIUtyN-8Mfk8OxbFn68SRpfnHpkTc0drQu0oyEFeB7f-50qLnPcW2bLYT9LWjMBeozVwg%3D%3D)

Over the years, I've been blessed to walk alongside men and women of deep conviction--people who don't just speak about change but embody it in the way they live. One of those rare leaders I held in the highest regard was my friend, the late **Charlie Kirk.** After Charlie passed, his wife Erika told me that Charlie would want me to run, and she encouraged me to throw my hat in the ring. While I've never considered myself a politician--_nor do I intend to become one_ --I reached a point where I couldn't ignore the reality that our communities are being failed. **I knew I had to do something. ** _Thankfully_ , I'm not stepping into this fight alone. Thousands of patriots have already taken their place in this movement, [**and I’m counting on you to stand with us.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=99f0cf5f64fe4e0383232f82f761c175&_e=S2OEk-7Imyh1n_Y9evjuDMr8Rl9xGOOUvYdJEjULSTh0SQPNpo1LCO3-oiYw2KE6b7xEUSEBSOYJlD4uwXiMqzYXJRU0W1o6yllZQ7Fc_CFn4u0pHqZKibH1twb_NccqzF1ndJRF7SlaCt-wmwTmlnsfx3-DazsMw5BySPIfu-RFGqbiEqJGhDn8NuFCQ-OhHUUd2qg1wA98fqm9JmUHU3pNee1Uz1HpwZlYZlvdmOH0T4l0XUu-fTde5PHYpT4fnH9-GyyrnGD8Nqyew9A1UFEXttD-8oVkz31wZ_-NTz3W5exlHJZUwbwKCcYH0duUyCGbqX6Mdyxksoxm4K5wB23WNM7h3M_AT2uOF-kYONKunBHP8K45iyWNq2DDxi5umz-XeuirOsSBEsXS7E4qm3bBXfpf_jNTREBm8cOw_pK0ZAY1H0HY7pEbr_XCAWLRa5Sjul9IwA559tgIgA2Z9dRA6nVoQ2yoZumpQBK-1euMcLZxIBELcuqV2HfQqbPyD0zaTLiHYiEOpgWxrnXIwQOyZ0L__iZ4u5r-k10SOCQn-2YkNtLjxxUCnBoMxOGrS1lyJHfkjDF92sv7I2poJlakQ4mlXaeJxH3Ypwua1SWv-Z_hhQZhn7-dnH22nRTqymqQqwGEz15AgUSQjdFuoQ%3D%3D)

The values that guide me are simple: **protect families, defend faith, safeguard freedom, and steward the natural beauty we 've been entrusted with. **These are not just Colorado values -- _they 're American values._ The struggles we face here -- crime, government overreach, attacks on faith, rising costs -- are the same challenges pressing on families across the country. Turning Colorado around sends a message far beyond our borders: **that courage still matters, that conviction still wins, and that ordinary Americans can reclaim their future.** I believe deeply in that mission. _I 've lived it my entire life._ And I'm grateful to have so many determined patriots standing alongside me as we work toward a safer, stronger, more united future. [**I really want you to join us, and I hope I can earn your support today.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=99f0cf5f64fe4e0383232f82f761c175&_e=S2OEk-7Imyh1n_Y9evjuDMr8Rl9xGOOUvYdJEjULSTh0SQPNpo1LCO3-oiYw2KE6b7xEUSEBSOYJlD4uwXiMqzYXJRU0W1o6yllZQ7Fc_CFn4u0pHqZKibH1twb_NccqzF1ndJRF7SlaCt-wmwTmlnsfx3-DazsMw5BySPIfu-RFGqbiEqJGhDn8NuFCQ-OhHUUd2qg1wA98fqm9JmUHU40T1AQ7veg4GLZJx-wCOvRNnHKt1wKObtwOyi19TloqG9XKMsUMhr5c20n440-MeRP_Trf1Hgbl5Dtss8b2f55K4EHc7L5alwK2HOFZ1vggVhmlqg6G6hxVSow3PUCRYKWMfOenV-vMULNCd5R44ZGXFy46LlOYc6_R2o1WsmVNVqNWASSpD9ns4wK4-kvvFaNzu7ZkcAes37HoGYDSLjl_DAqL-DlbDIrNbHzuO8MPx1BVmYaXZd9ESB0TBZPVR6W-i-DCmzrBcYtmQf_3m_VQf3MBitpG8Ji7Ua35567Izjj9hS8JixVq0z6AIX8fuD4ZtmG4A-Z61daDQvN3htehjMu_wl629B6hLVPOS738Ktgu61TCWcwRBNCy96gN8J9dvAAEwKzAqv63yim4bbXaeWRux_ByHyXovTSgqxdw1YUAhFvudUX6TBpjh5oAXg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Reclaiming our future The values that guide me are simple: protect families, defend faith, and safeguard freedom. | | | | | Hi Fellow Patriot, My name is Victor Marx -- a husband of 37 years, father of five, grandfather, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and humanitarian who has spent decades serving families and communities around the world. I am also the conservative in the race for Governor of Colorado. I'm running because the challenges we're facing here reflect the challenges facing our entire nation. What happens in one state can strengthen -- or weaken -- the future of America. For years, my calling has taken me into some of the most difficult places imaginable. From war zones to trafficking corridors to communities devastated by violence, I 've led more than 150 high-risk missions focused on rescuing and restoring the innocent. That work exists because God carried me through a childhood marked by trauma, instability, and hardship. Through His grace, I rebuilt my life -- and I've spent every day since fighting for those who can't fight for themselves. This campaign is no different. It isn't powered by insiders or special interests. It's powered by people who still believe in Faith, Family, Freedom, and the promise of a stronger America. We're already building real momentum, and we need to keep it going. I want you with us in this fight, Over the years, I've been blessed to walk alongside men and women of deep conviction--people who don't just speak about change but embody it in the way they live. One of those rare leaders I held in the highest regard was my friend, the late Charlie Kirk. After Charlie passed, his wife Erika told me that Charlie would want me to run, and she encouraged me to throw my hat in the ring. While I've never considered myself a politician--nor do I intend to become one --I reached a point where I couldn't ignore the reality that our communities are being failed. I knew I had to do something. Thankfully , I'm not stepping into this fight alone. Thousands of patriots have already taken their place in this movement, The values that guide me are simple: protect families, defend faith, safeguard freedom, and steward the natural beauty we 've been entrusted with. These are not just Colorado values -- they 're American values. The struggles we face here -- crime, government overreach, attacks on faith, rising costs -- are the same challenges pressing on families across the country. Turning Colorado around sends a message far beyond our borders: that courage still matters, that conviction still wins, and that ordinary Americans can reclaim their future. I believe deeply in that mission. I 've lived it my entire life. And I'm grateful to have so many determined patriots standing alongside me as we work toward a safer, stronger, more united future. | | For Colorado and for America, Victor Marx P.S. If you've gotten this far, there's something I need you to know: You 're not just someone reading an email -- you're someone whose voice and values matter deeply in shaping the direction of this mission. , and your involvement strengthens the momentum we've already begun to build. -Victor | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY VICTOR MARX FOR GOVERNOR Registered Agent: Gregory Carlson | | P.O. Box 156 Florence, CO 81226

name: Meals for Heroes @ USO
subject: FINAL CALL: Meals for our troops won't happen without you
body:
Matching gift ends at midnight -- act now.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[**We 're almost there ... can you help get
us over the finish line for our troops?**](https://links.e.uso.)
[](https://links.e.uso.)
Dear USO Supporter,
**[We're so close to our goal -- can our nation's heroes count on you to help provide a special meal this holiday season? ](https://links.e.uso.)**
It's steadfast supporters like you who make it possible for our heroes to feel supported and connected to home when they're stationed in remote locations around the world, protecting our nation.
**[If you are able to take a moment now and give a generous tax-deductible gift, it would mean so much to our heroes in uniform.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[RUSH MY MATCHED GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
**Remember, for just a few more hours, for a limited time, all gifts for our troops are instantly DOUBLED, up to $25,000 thanks to our friends at Airbus America Inc.**
As our service members look to find some of the comforts of home this holiday season, they'll find them at the USO -- through a hot meal and festive snacks and treats -- all possible because of generous supporters like you.
For the People Who Serve,
The USO
Airbus America Inc. is matching gifts to the USO up to $25,000 through December 31, 2025. Your contribution will be used where it is needed most.

name: Janet Mills
subject: I’m not afraid of a bully
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I looked Trump in the eyes ...

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1631%2E49239%2E1LrbUK)
| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10371?t=2&akid=1631%2E49239%2E1LrbUK)
null – It’s Janet Mills, Governor of Maine.

Just months ago, I did something no one does: when Donald Trump tried to intimidate me and Maine people, I looked him in the eyes and told him _I’d see him in court._ And guess what? I did. **We took him to court – and won.**
I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Susan Collins because Maine deserves a senator who isn’t afraid of going toe-to-toe with a bully.

**Trump is putting Maine and our country in danger every single day and Susan Collins is refusing to do anything about it.**
**[null, this is going to be one of the most expensive races in the country. MAGA Republicans will spend whatever it takes to defeat me. I’m ready to fight and win – but I can’t do it without your help. So please, split a donation of $10 or $15 bucks between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign and let’s get to work>> ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10371?t=3&akid=1631%2E49239%2E1LrbUK)**
| | [Donate $10](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10372?t=4&akid=1631%2E49239%2E1LrbUK)

---
I love Maine with all that I am, null.

Trust me when I say I wouldn't be running otherwise.
**As Maine’s first woman District Attorney, Attorney General, and Governor – I’ve dedicated my life to this state. But when I was deciding what was next for me ... I knew I could never live with myself if I didn’t take on our biggest fight yet.
**
I know better than anyone how much more harm is going to fall on Maine people if we keep allowing Susan Collins to fail us.
What Donald Trump is doing is not business as usual. This moment is not a difference of political opinions – our country is at a tipping point that demands real leadership.

[**So please, split a donation between my campaign and Haley Stevens' campaign to help me raise $1 million to show Donald Trump and Susan Collins that we’re ready to fight like hell to win in Maine and flip the Senate Majority >> **](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10371?t=7&akid=1631%2E49239%2E1LrbUK)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Janet Mills and Haley Stevens will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10374?t=8&akid=1631%2E49239%2E1LrbUK)

Together,

Janet Mills
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. name: The Democratic Party
subject: A brief explanation >>>
body:
[1]Democrats[2]Join us.
Team,

It’s clearer every day: Trump wants people to be afraid of opposing him. He wants to intimidate us into silence. He and his allies are counting on Democrats completely giving up.

We can’t let that happen.

At the end of the month, we will be required to report how much we’ve raised. Those numbers will tell a story: A lot of contributions will show the strength of Democrats’ opposition to Trump and his agenda. They’ll show we aren’t done fighting.

So, we’re asking: Can you chip in to the DNC today to show Republicans that Trump’s threats won’t stop you — or thousands of other grassroots supporters just like you — from fighting back?

https://ak.democrats.org/go/28161?t=1001&akid=5558%2E22930333%2E7NcgfH

Thank you,

The Democrats

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://ak.democrats.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5558%2E22930333%2E7NcgfH

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: The stakes around the midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
There are 312 days until the midterm general elections. Way less than that until primaries start early next year. And some state legislative sessions are right around the corner in January, where suppressive bills are sure to rise again.
What does this all mean? Our work has to start now , not over the summer or before the primaries or even in just a few weeks. The foundation we lay right now, ahead of the new year, is what sets the stage for next fall's elections.
RUSH $25 or more right now and help make every vote count and every voice heard in our elections nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122625_4&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Atlantic: Donald Trump’s Plan to Subvert the Midterms Is Already Under Way [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122625_4&amount=25]
Team, that headline from The Atlantic says it all.
Donald Trump already promised last year that “w e’ll have it fixed so good, you’re not gonna have to vote .” Watching his actions after he lost in 2020 -- lies, denial, rallies, all leading to January 6th -- it's not hard to imagine what he's got in mind for next year.
Our states run our elections. But that doesn't mean that MAGA-aligned politicians won't follow his illegal orders to interfere. It doesn't stop him from using ICE agents to intimidate at the polls or threaten eligible voters. And it doesn't stop his Department of Justice from trying to interfere through the courts, especially when more than half of the suppressive lawsuits brought to court this year were brought by the very federal department that's supposed to protect our rights.
None of that takes into account the highly partisan efforts for mid-decade redistricting as well. It's clear that the threats to the next election aren't going to stop. That's where we come in.
We must inform voters, defend our elections, and make sure every eligible vote counts. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to fuel our voting rights work for 2026 and beyond >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122625_4&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_4&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_4&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_4&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_4&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122625_4&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122625_4&amount=35]
Our democracy, our elections, and our fundamental right to vote have been under attack for more than a decade. Our electoral system is reaching a breaking point, and it's hard to predict exactly where the next set of electoral shenanigans will come from.
Are we destined to watch our elections break down? Absolutely not. We still have the time and the people to win. What we need most is the resources to carry on this fight for our democracy and the work to make every voice heard in our elections.
Stopping their attempts to subvert the midterms will require courage and integrity across the board. Most of all, it will depend on individual Americans like us to stand up for our rights and demand that our votes are counted.
This is a fight we can and will win. Stand with us to protect the right to vote by pitching in with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122625_4&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122625_4&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122625_4&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

body:

If we don’t crush my urgent end-of-year deadline, the radical Left flips the House and Senate in 2026 and finishes what they started:

**_And worst of all, your favorite President (ME!) might just go through another FAKE impeachment!_**

They’re already spending BILLIONS (Dirty Money, I bet) to bury US and bury YOU! I need a small sacrifice from every red-blooded American who wants to save the country!

[This is it. No second chances.](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

President Trump

clean_body: Peter - I wanted to inform you sooner rather than later. I've come to truly appreciate your consistent record. With everything you've given to our movement, there was no question in my mind that I needed to send you this message ASAP. I'd hate to see this opportunity pass you by. That's why as soon as the House GOP Platinum committee flagged your profile, I knew I had to extend both a message of gratitude and of urgency! 1. THANK YOU! I am so proud of everything we have accomplished and how far you 've come in your support for the House GOP, Peter. We would not be able to deliver on our America First agenda without you! 2. You 're now eligible for PLATINUM STATUS! Will you please accept this status and add this critical accomplishment to your GOP legacy? I'm not at all worried about your continued commitment. The last thing I would ever do is question your loyalty. But I'd hate for you to miss out on your chance to upgrade today with this limited time offer! [Because of your proven record, you're just [1] contribution away from a YEAR of PLATINUM STATUS!]( look forward to hearing back from you. God bless, House Speaker Mike Johnson| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Liz Cheney
subject: My friend Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
| | |
---
| | Dear Peter,

My friend Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero for defending our democracy and our Constitution.

I had not known Zoe well before our work together on the House Select Committee to investigate the January 6th attack on the United States Capitol, but I was aware of her reputation as one of the most effective and respected Members of the House of Representatives. She is a thoughtful and serious member, and she operates with zero ego — a rarity in Congress.

Zoe has been a source of wisdom and good judgment for me and many Members in Congress. Although we don’t share many views on politics or public policy, I can assure you that we need Zoe in Congress and on the frontlines as we continue to protect and secure the future of our democracy.

We all must look beyond party and support people like Zoe who will defend the Constitution, someone we know will do the right thing. We need good, smart, honest and honorable people in elected office. __[_**With your help we can make sure Zoe has the resources needed to stay in Congress and continue the important work of defending our Constitution. Please join me in supporting her and contributing $25 today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122029755/591394046/-1473124489?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-12-26_LIZ_J6C_ES-37706_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTY4OTcyZS1jOWUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qA-je5Z7JwmAsuS-mMe2YdPwie-V7SSiexq2PQNOIMQ=) I hope I can count on you to join me. [_**We need to support and stand with Zoe now!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122029756/591394047/-1473124489?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-12-26_LIZ_J6C_ES-37706_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTY4OTcyZS1jOWUyLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qA-je5Z7JwmAsuS-mMe2YdPwie-V7SSiexq2PQNOIMQ=)

Best,

Liz Cheney

clean_body: Peter, it's Don Jr. I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for your unwavering support. My father and I know that this fight isn't possible without patriots like you who are willing to stand up for what's right. We're honored to have you on our team, Peter. | Paid for by the NRSC. Peter, reproductive freedom is under relentless attack—threats to medication abortion, growing abortion deserts, and shameless efforts to control our bodies and futures.

We refuse to let anti-abortion extremists win. The Center is fighting back every day to remove bans, dismantle barriers, and protect the right to abortion everywhere it’s under threat.

# [They Lost in Court. They Still Tried to Cage Him.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=182676539&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyNjc2NTM5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjY4MTA0OTQsImV4cCI6MTc2OTQwMjQ5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c6-KqE787dgz5ccaM8VQWt9bqo_5OfM3fbwanXclh3A)
### Salma's Baba is home! - but ICE still tried to force an ankle monitor, travel restrictions, and weekly check-ins - forcing us straight back into court.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Dec 27
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=182676539&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyNjc2NTM5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NjgxMDQ5NCwiZXhwIjoxNzY5NDAyNDk0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dyBudZJagr_br34cVyWuEqzn_oMEoM2Pi3FyAhWAogA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=182676539&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyNjc2NTM5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjY4MTA0OTQsImV4cCI6MTc2OTQwMjQ5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c6-KqE787dgz5ccaM8VQWt9bqo_5OfM3fbwanXclh3A&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=182676539&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyNjc2NTM5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjY4MTA0OTQsImV4cCI6MTc2OTQwMjQ5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c6-KqE787dgz5ccaM8VQWt9bqo_5OfM3fbwanXclh3A)
---
| | [](https://substack..-DBP8GkScabcpAN4N9geB9EnVqOGp74xWsxAl_OvjBY?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/they-lost-in-court-they-still-tried?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Friends,
My husband is home. After four long, grueling, lonely, difficult months, **we won.**
But that wasn't enough for ICE. In clear violation of the Judge's order, ICE required Zahid sign documents - hurriedly, pressured, before his release - that he would report back in person weekly, that he wouldn't travel outside Washington State for more than 48 hours without their pre-approval, and that he would consent to an ankle monitor.
Absolutely not.
The judge said Release Him. The judge said the detention was unlawful from the get-go. The judge said they couldn't re-detain him absent an explicit ruling from the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. That also means they can't _threaten_ to re-detain him if he doesn't show up for a "check-in" at the same place they illegally abducted him in the first place.
Absolutely the fuck not.
So. Same day - I mean literally, his hearing was at 10am, he was released from the detention center around 2pm, and we had to turn this in by 4pm - we returned to Court and petitioned the Judge to clarify and enforce his order, and rule on the legality of these onerous conditions ICE imposed.
He did so, and we're grateful.
By the following day, the Judge had ordered ICE to show good cause and proper legal authority for those conditions.
We're unable to review their response, but the Judge's follow-up ruling afterwards confirmed that they had formally withdrawn those conditions.
GOOD.
But dear God, look at this.
Even after losing in Court. Even after apologizing _to my husband AND the judge_ for the "mistake" of detaining Zahid in the first place. Even after the Judge called this whole situation "flat out wrong."
They still tried.
* * *
One of the reporters, after the press conference on Monday, asked me if I thought this ruling would make a difference.
I told him, "It's going to take an avalanche. But this is certainly a boulder."
* * *
Those first hours.... I can't describe. To have the soul of my soul restored to me. To see the kids climbing on him, hugging him, playing with him. Salma has learned her ABCs. (The first time I heard her recite it in full, in fact, was to Zahid over the phone through the glass, at the detention center.) Adil shrieks with joy when Zahid tosses him in the air. They cuddle on his lap and fall asleep. It's exactly the way it should be.
And me? I have solace again. I have sanctuary restored to my life. I have the heart of our family intact again. My husband is home.
Many people have commented how much more joyful, vibrant, and alive I look. I certainly feel that way. The grueling endurance required to get through this - and now, to finally _win_ \- it aged me, more than a little. But it also matured me. And now, to have all this strength and competence and proven courage, known in my bones, AND to have the light of my life and blessing of my entire being, restored? Now that's a holiday gift of epic proportions.
* * *
So it's with that greater, growing light restored within me, that I say to you, **thank you**.
Thank you for every prayer, every "like" and "share," every comment, every financial contribution, every hug, every single item of support.
You have kept us going. You have kept me going.
This couldn't have happened without you - and believe me, I'm grateful.
* * *
May the beautiful darkness of this time of year bring you peace.
May the warmth of purpose, the light of community, and the fire of commitment fill your heart and illuminate your world.
And may everyone who turns to you, find solace, support, and inspiration in your presence.
Happy Holidays, my friends.
Thank you again.
Melissa

[Justice for Zahid on Linktree](https://substack.com/redirect/4f7162b9-66bb-461f-8cb2-5896caaa435e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
PS - The fight is not over. Zahid is free, but he is not yet a citizen. Our work continues at the Ninth Circuit; and the broader fight continues, to ensure that **Liberty and Justice for** **All** is made real, in truth. I will keep you posted.
But meanwhile - **this is a win.**

clean_body: Salma's Baba is home! - but ICE still tried to force an ankle monitor, travel restrictions, and weekly check-ins - forcing us straight back into court. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Salma's Baba is home! - but ICE still tried to force an ankle monitor, travel restrictions, and weekly check-ins - forcing us straight back into court. | | | Dec 27 | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends, My husband is home. After four long, grueling, lonely, difficult months, we won. But that wasn't enough for ICE. In clear violation of the Judge's order, ICE required Zahid sign documents - hurriedly, pressured, before his release - that he would report back in person weekly, that he wouldn't travel outside Washington State for more than 48 hours without their pre-approval, and that he would consent to an ankle monitor. Absolutely not. The judge said Release Him. The judge said the detention was unlawful from the get-go. The judge said they couldn't re-detain him absent an explicit ruling from the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. That also means they can't threaten to re-detain him if he doesn't show up for a "check-in" at the same place they illegally abducted him in the first place. Absolutely the fuck not. So. Same day - I mean literally, his hearing was at 10am, he was released from the detention center around 2pm, and we had to turn this in by 4pm - we returned to Court and petitioned the Judge to clarify and enforce his order, and rule on the legality of these onerous conditions ICE imposed. He did so, and we're grateful. By the following day, the Judge had ordered ICE to show good cause and proper legal authority for those conditions. We're unable to review their response, but the Judge's follow-up ruling afterwards confirmed that they had formally withdrawn those conditions. GOOD. But dear God, look at this. Even after losing in Court. Even after apologizing to my husband AND the judge for the "mistake" of detaining Zahid in the first place. Even after the Judge called this whole situation "flat out wrong." They still tried. One of the reporters, after the press conference on Monday, asked me if I thought this ruling would make a difference. I told him, "It's going to take an avalanche. But this is certainly a boulder." Those first hours.... I can't describe. To have the soul of my soul restored to me. To see the kids climbing on him, hugging him, playing with him. Salma has learned her ABCs. (The first time I heard her recite it in full, in fact, was to Zahid over the phone through the glass, at the detention center.) Adil shrieks with joy when Zahid tosses him in the air. They cuddle on his lap and fall asleep. It's exactly the way it should be. And me? I have solace again. I have sanctuary restored to my life. I have the heart of our family intact again. My husband is home. Many people have commented how much more joyful, vibrant, and alive I look. I certainly feel that way. The grueling endurance required to get through this - and now, to finally win \- it aged me, more than a little. But it also matured me. And now, to have all this strength and competence and proven courage, known in my bones, AND to have the light of my life and blessing of my entire being, restored? Now that's a holiday gift of epic proportions. So it's with that greater, growing light restored within me, that I say to you, thank you. Thank you for every prayer, every "like" and "share," every comment, every financial contribution, every hug, every single item of support. You have kept us going. You have kept me going. This couldn't have happened without you - and believe me, I'm grateful. May the beautiful darkness of this time of year bring you peace. May the warmth of purpose, the light of community, and the fire of commitment fill your heart and illuminate your world. And may everyone who turns to you, find solace, support, and inspiration in your presence. Happy Holidays, my friends. Thank you again. Melissa PS - The fight is not over. Zahid is free, but he is not yet a citizen. Our work continues at the Ninth Circuit; and the broader fight continues, to ensure that Liberty and Justice for All is made real, in truth. I will keep you posted. But meanwhile - this is a win. | | ---|---|--- Less than an hour after release: Zahid and our children, Salma (2-1/2) and Adil (1). You 're currently a free subscriber to "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry. To support the mission and access the full experience, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Melissa Chaudhry 6727 Martin Luther King Jr Way S, Suite M, #1117 Seattle, WA 98118 ? ?

name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: Your gift saves lives and shares the gospel
body:
For nearly two decades, PreBorn! has been standing in the gap for mothers and babies across the nation.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0fkua0u2175tei4t2a0i00c286h5frcbcgftckg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c3j69pb6cjh2bs)
---
Hi Advocate for Life, For nearly two decades, **PreBorn!** has been standing in the gap for mothers and babies across the nation. We do two simple but powerful and life-changing things: We help women in crisis **see their babies and hear their heartbeats through free ultrasounds** , and we offer **gospel-centered, compassionate care** at our Network Clinics. Those two things change everything and we can’t do them without people like you. When a mother hears her child’s heartbeat for the first time, fear gives way to faith.

A tiny miracle begins the story of a mighty future.

Hope breaks through the darkness. Your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and shares the love of Christ with a woman in need. As our thank-you for your gift, you’ll receive the [**_Tiny Miracles, Mighty Futures 2026 Calendar_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg5ilpoii1otm7hshnlqr2bio8d9lle8ii0nju40_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c3j69pb6cjh2bs) __ filled with **scripture and a monthly prayer guide** to help you lift up mothers, babies, and the ministry of PreBorn! all year long in prayer.

---
Calendars are limited during this busy year-end season, so give now to **save a baby, share the gospel, and celebrate the gift of life**.

As our thank-you for your gift, you’ll receive the filled with scripture and a monthly prayer guide to help you lift up mothers, babies, and the ministry of PreBorn! all year long in prayer. Calendars are limited during this busy year-end season, so give now to save a baby, share the gospel, and celebrate the gift of life. We can’t wait to hear from you! Gratefully, The PreBorn! Team Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |
