clean_body: Our midnight deadline is fast approaching, so don’t wait. | Great news, Peter: Since we emailed you about meeting our year-end fundraising goal in California, we’ve seen an increase in donations — and we’re closer than ever to reaching our goal. We need just fifteen more contributions from people in California to ensure we’re ready to meet the challenges that lie ahead in 2026. Hurry – our midnight deadline is fast approaching, and we still need your help. = | = Thanks for all that you do, Team NDRC \----- ORIGINAL MESSAGE ------ From: NDRC Subject: We need 24 people from California to step up Date: Friday, December 26 Peter, Hitting our end-of-year fundraising goal is more critical this year than ever before. Come January, we need to have the resources necessary to take on anti-democracy forces in up to five states — and we simply can’t fall short. That’s why we’re looking for just TWENTY-FOUR supporters to donate from California before tomorrow night. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We’ve seen just how powerful our movement can be when we stand together to each do our part — and 2025 has been full of examples of ordinary people rising up: The volunteers in Missouri who gathered hundreds of thousands of petition signatures to put their gerrymandered map on the ballot for rejection. The Indiana voters who made clear to lawmakers they were against their attempted mid-decade map redraw. The millions of voters in Virginia, Pennsylvania, and beyond who voted for pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot. But we’ve got our work cut out for us in the months ahead — and that’s why we’re asking people in California to step up with a donation today. = Thank you, Team NDRC = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Text MAPS to 36787, STOP to end. Msg and Data rates may apply**

We're putting together a Christmas card signed by President Trump's most loyal America First supporters - and space is limited. Congresswoman Monica De La Cruz has already signed her name. Now, she's inviting YOU to join her. If you want your name included on the front page of the card, please don't wait. CHRISTMAS, PRESIDENT TRUMPThis Christmas season, we thank you for your leadership, your strength, and your unwavering commitment to the American people. Your courage and conviction have inspired millions - and this holiday, we celebrate Faith, Freedom, and the values that make our nation great. To Faith and Freedom, show President Trump how strong his support is this Christmas.Merry Christmas and God bless, - Team Monica * experts just declared Monica De La Cruz's House race as one of the most competitive in the country. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I know you’ve been hearing from me and my team a lot…
body:
|
#
Friend, I know you’ve been hearing from me and my team a lot these days, but allow me to explain exactly why this is such a crucial moment for our race and why we need your support now. Wednesday night marks our _final_ FEC fundraising deadline of the year. Even though Election Day is still a little under a year away, the strength of our report will set the tone for the future of this race. At the end of each quarter, every candidate is required to report how much money they’ve raised and how many people donated to their campaign to the Federal Election Commission. These numbers are then reported out to the public. **Everyone – including opponents, analysts, and reporters – will be looking at our report to see exactly how strong our coalition is.** Now that MI-08 has been named Seat 218, it's critical that we send a powerful message to everyone watching. Anything less than that would invite even more dishonest attacks. That’s why I need your help, friend. **[Can you send in a donation of $3 – or whatever you can spare – ahead of our FEC fundraising deadline? clean_body: | Friend, I know you’ve been hearing from me and my team a lot these days, but allow me to explain exactly why this is such a crucial moment for our race and why we need your support now. Wednesday night marks our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year. Even though Election Day is still a little under a year away, the strength of our report will set the tone for the future of this race. At the end of each quarter, every candidate is required to report how much money they’ve raised and how many people donated to their campaign to the Federal Election Commission. These numbers are then reported out to the public. Everyone – including opponents, analysts, and reporters – will be looking at our report to see exactly how strong our coalition is. Now that MI-08 has been named Seat 218, it's critical that we send a powerful message to everyone watching. Anything less than that would invite even more dishonest attacks. That’s why I need your help, friend. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: Haley S.
subject: Now's our chance to show the strength of our movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I have to ask:

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1745%2E49239%2EUWmk4v)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10884?t=2&akid=1745%2E49239%2EUWmk4v)
---
Null, this is a longer email than I usually send. **But before I ask you to[ _chip in $5_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10885?t=3&akid=1745%2E49239%2EUWmk4v), I'd like to tell you about my race in Michigan, why I'm running, and why I'm asking for your support.**
I'm running because I'm a lifelong Michigander who has spent my career fighting for our families, our small businesses, and our manufacturing economy. Now, I'm ready to bring this fight to the Senate at this critical moment for Michigan and the country.
**Flipping the Senate blue is Democrats' best chance of keeping the Trump administration in check – and we simply can't do that if we lose here in Michigan.
**
MAGA Republicans know this too, and that's why they're laser-focused on this race. After spending nearly $80 million here last cycle, they're gearing up to spend even more in 2026, **putting this on track to be one of the most competitive – and expensive – races in the country.**
**[_That's why I urgently need your help, null._](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10886?t=4&akid=1745%2E49239%2EUWmk4v) My crucial end-of-quarter deadline is just around the corner, and right now, we're pacing behind where we need to be.**
This is a really important moment for our grassroots campaign. This is our chance to show the strength of our movement to my opponent and his megadonors. **[_I hope I can count on your support._](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10886?t=5&akid=1745%2E49239%2EUWmk4v)**
**The bottom line is I can't run the most competitive campaign, win this seat, and take our fight for working families to the Senate if I don't have the resources to keep up with GOP spending and fight back against their attacks.
**
**[_So please, null, I have to ask: Will you rush $5 or more to help us reach our $500,000 end-of-quarter goal before 11:59 p.m. on Wednesday?_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10885?t=6&akid=1745%2E49239%2EUWmk4v)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10885?t=7&akid=1745%2E49239%2EUWmk4v)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10887?t=8&akid=1745%2E49239%2EUWmk4v)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10888?t=9&akid=1745%2E49239%2EUWmk4v)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10886?t=10&akid=1745%2E49239%2EUWmk4v)
---
Thanks for reading to the end of this longer email, and thank you in advance for giving what you can. It means everything to have you with me in this fight.

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11041?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=11&akid=1745%2E49239%2EUWmk4v) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10884?t=12&akid=1745%2E49239%2EUWmk4v)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. clean_body: We're embarrassed... Please read the message below from our sponsor. SECRET INSIDER ALERT DEAL: (Only While Supplies Last!) This is the RED HOT deal you've been waiting for, and it's vanishing by the minute! ACT FAST and grab yours now before it's gone. Everything ships tomorrow. No waiting for backorders. You can lock in this entire package for just $92.33 down. WARNING: This offer is only while supplies last. Once we sell out, this offer closes: If you've been watching the headlines, you already know – the threat of food shortages, blackouts, and supply chain failures is more real than ever. Our 4Patriots 4-Week Buy 1 Get 1 FREE Survival Food Kits have been flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. Why? Because people are waking up to the truth – you can't count on the system anymore. So we gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: produce as many kits as humanly possible. And wow... did he ever deliver. The result? A tidal wave of inventory just crashed into our warehouse – more kits than we have space for. Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your help. This is your chance to take advantage of our mistake. We're slashing prices and practically giving away these premium survival food kits – just to move them fast. When you claim yours today, you're not only securing peace of mind for your family... you're helping an American-owned company stay afloat through a supply chain nightmare. And yes – you'll get a 2 additional FREE BONUSES as our thank you. Our Biggest BOGO Deal Ever! 2X Your Servings – for FREE! 4 Weeks of Survival Food – for FREE! Delicious & Good for 25 Years 384 Total Servings – Only $0.72 each! 72,960 Total Calories Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner & Drinks 2,191 5-Star Reviews Handpacked in USA FREE $25 Certificate Military & Senior Discount Get 2 Months Of Food, Security & Peace Of Mind – All In One Kit! This is more than just food. It's freedom in a box. These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying meals that are built to last 25 years. That's right – no junk fillers, no sketchy ingredients – just real food, crafted for real emergencies. Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care, these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when everything else falls apart. And thanks to the recent upgrades, these kits contain more food than ever. It's a massive value – and right now, it's the lowest price you'll ever see. Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared. Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most. But this inventory won't last long. Stay Safe. Stay Prepared. Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude. Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H.** "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." / / DISCLOSURE OF BUSINESS TIES: The sender of this email likely has an affiliate or material connection with the entities mentioned and may earn commissions from purchases made through associated websites. body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23776%2E4449941%2E_-FsA6) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23776%2E4449941%2E_-FsA6) **Listen up:** | **WE TOLD YOU:** Chuck Schumer, Jasmine Crockett, Joe Biden, and Elizabeth Warren all want Washington, DC to become the 51st STATE!

**WE TOLD YOU:** If DC became the 51st state, 700,000 Americans would get representation in Congress AND we’d gain 2 more Democratic Senators!

**WE TOLD YOU:** Donald Trump and the GOP HATE the idea of DC becoming a state because it would **WRECK their far-right agenda.** **[So, we’re rushing to gather 20,000 signatures before 11:59 PM so that we can reach our goal and PRESSURE CONGRESS TO MAKE DC THE 51ST STATE!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71411?t=3&akid=23776%2E4449941%2E_-FsA6)
---

[**we’ve only got 15 hours to reach our midnight goal. Can you sign on now to stand with Top Democrats??**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71411?t=4&akid=23776%2E4449941%2E_-FsA6) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71411?t=5&akid=23776%2E4449941%2E_-FsA6)
[ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71411?t=6&akid=23776%2E4449941%2E_-FsA6)
---
Listen – We’re counting on Top Democrats like you to step up and help support our campaign for DC Statehood.

DC has a larger population than Vermont and Wyoming but they have absolutely 0 voting representation in Congress... It's disgusting!

**Trump and his GOP are opposed to DC Statehood because they’re afraid of Democracy and giving power back to the people!**

But, we can’t stand by and idly watch for another second, that’s why we’re penning a massive petition.
[**20,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT: Add your name to our MASSIVE petition to demand Congress make DC the 51st state! >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71411?t=7&akid=23776%2E4449941%2E_-FsA6) [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71411?t=8&akid=23776%2E4449941%2E_-FsA6)
---

In 2022, Republican John James won this seat by just **0.5%** – not even a full 1%. Now that he is vacating the seat to run for governor, MI-10 has become the most critical battleground in the country. **All of the other U.S. House races in swing districts have Republican incumbents.**

In 2018, John James said he is “100% Pro-Life” and compared abortion to “genocide.” Most recently, **Representative James proudly voted YES on Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,”** which is one of the worst bills to become law in modern history.

Here’s how Christina responded:

_“The Republicans passed their bill. It's a direct hit to the people who work the hardest and carry the heaviest burdens – and it will make life more expensive for almost all of us. As a prosecutor and as an advocate, I believe that public servants are supposed to work FOR the people, not against them.

I’m running for Congress because I want to make sure my neighbors - the working families in our community - have affordable healthcare, housing, groceries, and daycare. We have a lot of work to do, but together, we can continue to fight for a better future.”_

**Larry Sabato’s ‘Crystal Ball’ has rated MI-10 as a Tossup in 2026, and this district is one of the DCCC’s targeted races for 2026.** When Christina was on the ballot as the Democratic Nominee for County Prosecutor in 2024, she **outperformed** both the Democratic congressional nominee AND Kamala Harris. She can do this. Her constituents – and ALL American women – would be very lucky to have her representing them in congress.

**This is our _most realistic opportunity_ of the entire 2026 cycle to flip a House seat from red to blue – and we need your help to make that happen.**

[****We know you’re crazy busy this holiday season, but _end of year_ is the time that Christina needs the most help, as institutional support groups are evaluating where to invest. Help us ensure Christina has what she needs to catch up to her 10 male opponents by rushing a contribution to her campaign before the year comes to a close. →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122055843/591441043/1733627654?refcode=EM_F_251227Hines_N_DB_NO_13_NG_N_L2&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMzMGU0ZGE5LTMyZTMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=npvYQF5EoarwuXFA04zxU-J9e52GQHPBzki42QA9J1M=)

For a brighter 2026,

Diana Bula

clean_body: Here’s one way to make next year a little brighter... | | | | | = Hi Peter, Her Bold Move was proud to be one of the very first national orgs to endorse Christina Hines in her run for the congressional race that will likely decide which political party will have control of Congress in the 2nd half of Trump’s term. Here’s the state of the race: The field has exploded – eleven candidates are now vying for this seat. But despite the crowded field, Christina is the only Democratic woman. You read that right: This is the ONLY OPEN COMPETITIVE HOUSE SEAT on the entire electoral U.S. map. This race offers our single best chance to flip a seat and regain the House, and we absolutely cannot let it slip away. This is the time of year when major institutional donors and support groups look at fundraising to decide who they will back in 2026. With our help, Christina will be able to post a strong number, unlocking the major support she needs to separate herself from the pack. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Christina Hines: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = In 2022, Republican John James won this seat by just 0.5% – not even a full 1%. Now that he is vacating the seat to run for governor, MI-10 has become the most critical battleground in the country. All of the other U.S. House races in swing districts have Republican incumbents. In 2018, John James said he is “100% Pro-Life” and compared abortion to “genocide.” Most recently, Representative James proudly voted YES on Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” which is one of the worst bills to become law in modern history. Here’s how Christina responded: “The Republicans passed their bill. It's a direct hit to the people who work the hardest and carry the heaviest burdens – and it will make life more expensive for almost all of us. As a prosecutor and as an advocate, I believe that public servants are supposed to work FOR the people, not against them. I’m running for Congress because I want to make sure my neighbors - the working families in our community - have affordable healthcare, housing, groceries, and daycare. We have a lot of work to do, but together, we can continue to fight for a better future.” Larry Sabato’s ‘Crystal Ball’ has rated MI-10 as a Tossup in 2026, and this district is one of the DCCC’s targeted races for 2026. When Christina was on the ballot as the Democratic Nominee for County Prosecutor in 2024, she outperformed both the Democratic congressional nominee AND Kamala Harris. She can do this. Her constituents – and ALL American women – would be very lucky to have her representing them in congress. This is our most realistic opportunity of the entire 2026 cycle to flip a House seat from red to blue – and we need your help to make that happen. = For a brighter 2026, Diana Bula Political Manager Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states. Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies. Support this important work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Good morning!
body:
Just need you to read this email quickly.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)
Hi Peter, I’m sorry to reach out so early on a weekend during the holidays, but campaigns like ours just can’t afford to take these days off. This is a toss-up race. The polls are close, and we expect them to tighten until Election Day — my opponent is counting on far-right groups to pour hundreds of millions into this race to prop him up. _It’s already starting, Peter._ **[This will likely be the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history, so we need the resources to stay competitive. We’re only four days out from our final, and most important, filing deadline of 2025, and up against an opponent who’s just waiting for us to slip up. Can you pitch in any amount to help us meet our $1 million goal and win the most competitive Senate race in the nation?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3256?t=7&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3257?t=8&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3258?t=9&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3259?t=10&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)

---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3262?t=13&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)
---
Thanks,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3256?t=14&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=15&akid=221%2E124072%2E6Nqt6x)

name: Wes Moore
subject: This is about saying goodbye.
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1115%2E1086043%2Ep_9tMD)
This is a longer email about saying goodbye, Peter, but if you don’t have time to read through, I would deeply appreciate **[a contribution to power our campaign.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251227-1.2NGlJ9&refcode=em-20251227-1&t=2&akid=1115%2E1086043%2Ep_9tMD)**
After nearly a century of operation, Valley Forge Military Academy — the place where I went to school and grew from an angry, complicated child to a confident young man — will be closing.
When my mother first sent me to the Forge, she saw military school as a last resort in response to a seemingly endless chain of misbehavior, both at home and at school. At age 11, I’d already felt handcuffs on my wrists. **I was not on a path to success.**
There was no overnight miracle when I started school there, but slowly, things changed. I learned about honor, code, and service. I started to take an interest in campus life, academics, and leadership positions — and I rose up the ranks and became a first captain in command of around 800 cadets.
After graduation, I went on to study at Johns Hopkins and Oxford, deployed to Afghanistan with the 82nd Airborne Division, ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country, and now, I serve as the 63rd governor of Maryland _and the first Black governor in the history of my state._
What saddens me most isn’t losing a place I once called home. My memories will forever live on with me.
**It saddens me that other young men like me will have one fewer avenue to challenge themselves and build their own pathway to success.**
Peter, at a time where our young men and boys are falling behind and feeling isolated, we have to offer more paths for connection and engagement.
I know Valley Forge Military Academy did that for me, and I’m determined to find ways to do that for young Marylanders today.
That includes the **Maryland Corps and Service Year Option** — the first statewide program in the country to give high school graduates a year of paid, full-time community service on the path to college or a career.
We have to help young Marylanders find the thing that guides them on a pathway to success and that inspires them to serve. **[If you support that mission, I would appreciate a donation to keep me in the fight as Maryland's governor today.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251227-1.2NGlJ9&refcode=em-20251227-1&t=3&akid=1115%2E1086043%2Ep_9tMD)**
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251227-1.2NGlJ9&refcode=em-20251227-1&t=4&akid=1115%2E1086043%2Ep_9tMD)
_Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense._

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251227-1&t=5&refcode2=1115_1086043_p_9tMD&akid=1115%2E1086043%2Ep_9tMD)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=1115%2E1086043%2Ep_9tMD)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1115%2E1086043%2Ep_9tMD)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
This campaign represents the people, not the well-connected | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122060090/591452040/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_EOY2JJRsvision_122725&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjIyZThjMjctMzZlMy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LOroJE4c1GGSis8aMTRZm9DiocdAzuRsrvVVnXhiYyM=&emci=1be56fff-7edf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=222e8c27-36e3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=32374386)
---
Peter — If you believe that Florida should work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected, then this campaign is for you. Corrupt politicians in Tallahassee have spent years rigging the system to benefit themselves and their corporate donors. And while families struggle, **our MAGA Attorney General is busy looking out for the powerful, not the people he’s supposed to serve.** I still believe government should work for the people. That means holding powerful corporations and politicians accountable, no matter how connected they are. That starts by replacing the self-serving MAGA politician in this office and bringing real integrity back to a job that’s supposed to stand up for Florida families. **[What's happening in Tallahassee is just wrong. clean_body: This campaign represents the people, not the well-connected | Peter — If you believe that Florida should work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected, then this campaign is for you. Corrupt politicians in Tallahassee have spent years rigging the system to benefit themselves and their corporate donors. And while families struggle, our MAGA Attorney General is busy looking out for the powerful, not the people he’s supposed to serve. I still believe government should work for the people. That means holding powerful corporations and politicians accountable, no matter how connected they are. That starts by replacing the self-serving MAGA politician in this office and bringing real integrity back to a job that’s supposed to stand up for Florida families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Jose Javier Rodriguez = | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. name: So it begins
subject: Trump super donor pledges $250 million for third term run

body:
What happened at the White House yesterday made it clear that the battle against a Trump third term is far from over.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I4Li98hT8YWd-zpR2ESDs1TUksTDSBZ0rPPwvHLTcGUuxaHWqOdpxeHLVTC_jghdOH5F87955IT9B6O90lzcqgtrGnjcSAV0q-z5KPxX1Exo1WeM76xSNc0ZupYZoYK8LCWnbDXMEcYH2iBQWiieH3eQA_z59OOFO1zzTpaMMC8WynUfix85QE4J826mcc-cC2yeMPatJe5blM3r5g5gp5-PjPSfElMuqERpCZiGzK4=&c=2Xs0ScgeqEvMwxkYP3WG6nxE0Q4aQP5ct-PRNDSNM89W7-AdNwjUmQ==&ch=IrQ2SxeCdNtEQN_J0DSwmW7Ydbi1X_R5KwRlvesbtLb7M-JrPwliPg==)
---
| Peter,
A quarter-billion dollars.
That's how much MAGA billionaire Mariam Adelson pledged to bankroll a third term for Trump. Inside the White House. In front of cameras for all to see.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I4Li98hT8YWd-zpR2ESDs1TUksTDSBZ0rPPwvHLTcGUuxaHWqOdpxeHLVTC_jghdVgq0Xt5z2ThshRk4vaC3cjPa4HQkQk94FWnbuC9yu_tlGsM-31d8QwFU84GhHuSwFATqpDi7NtCxWJxSXgV5RCAiZKFey4VvG5QdU-d9jtqTih7zoDJGfZ6_MbmCIgr6__WRv8jNob4Q-BKF_YvFzgqIwDoVMGugliDEJRYCSHo=&c=2Xs0ScgeqEvMwxkYP3WG6nxE0Q4aQP5ct-PRNDSNM89W7-AdNwjUmQ==&ch=IrQ2SxeCdNtEQN_J0DSwmW7Ydbi1X_R5KwRlvesbtLb7M-JrPwliPg==)
---

Trump's plot for a third term just won't die.
Last month, Defend Our Courts helped lead the defense of Pennsylvania's Supreme Court. We stopped MAGA from seizing control of the court that oversees how elections are run in the nation's biggest swing state. It was a blowout victory and a crucial win for democracy.
But what happened at the White House yesterday made it clear that the battle against a Trump third term is far from over. Trump has a fallback plan, and it runs straight through the courts in Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan.
In 2026, the Supreme Courts of these three critical states are on the ballot. If MAGA can buy these seats, they won't need to win an election in 2028, they'll just have their hand-picked judges throw out results they don't like.
The threat didn't go away after PA. It just tripled.
Defend Our Courts is once again leading the vanguard, rallying our over 100,000 grassroots supporters from every corner of this country to defend these three crucial courts.
But we cannot fight three fires at once without your immediate help. The stakes are higher than they have ever been.
[Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us hold the line in AZ, GA, and MI?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001I4Li98hT8YWd-zpR2ESDs1TUksTDSBZ0rPPwvHLTcGUuxaHWqOdpxeHLVTC_jghdXlf8AHLsygTvMX1jf3C21XJlQQU81M9bq7Qx1F0V9oXD03a-yzi7zFG1GJsCGefCie7lSsD57aa4mwRxjMi7e-00smeRLohI_EHYi7nLjRqlKI-t6kRPhq-K5EwbFoaTKtO8HNq_1nas-jFvBQSy-31kzZg9_rjxrZ3-ae6WbXrCQv0izGK9dA==&c=2Xs0ScgeqEvMwxkYP3WG6nxE0Q4aQP5ct-PRNDSNM89W7-AdNwjUmQ==&ch=IrQ2SxeCdNtEQN_J0DSwmW7Ydbi1X_R5KwRlvesbtLb7M-JrPwliPg==)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Please, let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2011%2E791427%2E48_2Wd)
At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to **[make your first contribution — of $10 or any amount you can — to stand with my campaign for Congress.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251223-1-180&t=2&akid=2011%2E791427%2E48_2Wd) But before I do that, please give me a chance to explain why your support is so important to our success.
Here's the situation:
The coming week is critical for our campaign. We’re only four days away from our official end-of-year FEC fundraising deadline.
I know my team and I have written to you about these quarterly deadlines before, but I mean it when I say that this is a big one. One that could very well set the tone for the coming year as we fight Trump’s extreme agenda and work to win reelection in the midterms.
Shortly after the deadline, our campaign has to file a report publicly disclosing our fundraising numbers. That means how much money we've raised this year, and how many individual contributions make up that amount.
Believe it or not, a LOT of people — from AIPAC and their billionaire donors, to far-right activists, to our establishment challengers and the media — will be combing through the receipts to see how we're doing.
They're going to use our fundraising numbers as an indicator of our campaign's grassroots strength. They want to see if there are any signs of weakness in our movement and decide if it's worth it to pour obscene amounts of dark money into Minnesota to try and exploit it.
Reporting the strongest numbers possible will show them there is nothing they can do to stop this team's momentum and show that our collective grassroots power is greater than anything they can throw our way.
**That's why your support — alongside thousands of progressives across the country — is so important. Especially today.**
So please:
**[Can you make your first online donation — of $10 or any amount that feels right to you — to support our movement today? No matter the size of your contribution, it'll help send an unmistakable message that this campaign stands united.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec25.HnwiDc&refcode=em251223-1-180&t=3&akid=2011%2E791427%2E48_2Wd)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: The Troops got Scrooged
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Peter: Remember those $1776 “dividend” Trump sent out to active duty military before Christmas?
A lot of Troops were excited about that money — understandably. $1776 is $1776, after all.
That is, until they found out Trump Scrooged them for publicity.
The money for those checks came out of a fund that was already allocated as a supplement for the basic allowance for housing that servicemembers get to help cover their rent.
The bonuses Trump turned them into are even now taxable at the state level. Bah humbug.
It actually gets worse, though. The total allocated by Congress for the supplement was $2.9 billion. The total for the $1776 checks all together is $2.6 billion. That leaves $300 million on the table that was supposed to go to the Troops but now will only go to them in the “future.”
Scrooged again.
And, somehow, it’s even worse than that. All of this is happening after Trump diverted $2 billion that was meant to be spent on barracks updates, refurbishment, and amenities on base and spent it on the border instead.
The grift never stops. Not even for Christmas.
But we don’t stop either, and we’re going to go out of our way to make sure Trump gets his just deserts over this publicity stunt. Once people learn the truth about stuff like this, the facade cracks. It’s an opening, and one we are going to exploit.
**[Please, make a donation to VoteVets and help us make sure everybody knows how Donald “Scrooge” Trump screwed over the Troops for Christmas.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec25.3jrL2s&refcode=em251227-1-160&t=1&akid=34837%2E3013755%2EoWzTDA)

name: Luke
subject: ICE tear-gassed Bushra and hit her with a car
body:
ICE responded to our protest with violent escalation— ramming protestors with their cars, beating people up, and firing tear gas into the crowd. Bushra was one of the people hit.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FHr1qbtgB9vXGdubHK2m4bp3l8UH9k5GNo6QvwCgvMV25e2cmOd7mLzZhy0FQapDolhoNIqs_iYfu20YwGIgjG9difTP_BpPexa8DGxVpjPoruP_kcxi86OLKPUjNCmuUHjeemVnBupkw1vUhdkMg_dqfJE3wsPBevjjV-K8AyRLDvqjCLwSDE0bP2JRrQJKsaWOS8AiBd-fisI-j-dWUTX0uQCQLq_z&c=nBFag78sI-w_37COYJBNfuYl1yN6tvZDDbYqkEH5CnZ7MrBHkGigRg==&ch=Ghdm5_lVEh_yZugXn54MND7lQgrwxbzeWU80oeASXYhyPQRI6oM9gw==)
---
|
Peter,
Bushra joined her neighbors at a peaceful protest against ICE at their Broadway facility in Chicago. Ever since Trump unleashed "Operation Midway Blitz" on Chicago, our city has become one of nations biggest flashpoints of resistance--and this day was no different.
I was on the ground when it happened. ICE responded to our protest with violent escalation-- ramming protestors with their cars, beating people up, and firing tear gas into the crowd. Bushra was one of the people hit.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FHr1qbtgB9vXGdubHK2m4bp3l8UH9k5GNo6QvwCgvMV25e2cmOd7mLzZhy0FQapDolhoNIqs_iYfu20YwGIgjG9difTP_BpPexa8DGxVpjPoruP_kcxi86OLKPUjNCmuUHjeemVnBupkw1vUhdkMg_dqfJE3wsPBevjjV-K8AyRLDvqjCLwSDE0bP2JRrQJKsaWOS8AiBd_Rw16vr-_0WbeXrq90DBFH&c=nBFag78sI-w_37COYJBNfuYl1yN6tvZDDbYqkEH5CnZ7MrBHkGigRg==&ch=Ghdm5_lVEh_yZugXn54MND7lQgrwxbzeWU80oeASXYhyPQRI6oM9gw==)
---
| Scenes from the chaos. Bushra pictured at bottom left as the smoke hit her.
---
| Donald Trump is using ICE as his personal Gestapo--unleashing brute force on peaceful protesters while his fascist machine tightens its grip: the FCC bullying TV networks, Pam Bondi vowing to criminalize dissent as "hate speech," and the administration ordering the Joint Terrorism Task Force to investigate Americans for commonly held beliefs.
Fascism is here in America, right now.
Now more than ever, it is essential to elect leaders like Bushra--people who don't just repeat talking points, but take direct action. Leaders willing to stand on the front lines, even in the face of tear gas, to protect their communities.
We need to send Bushra to Congress so she can fight Trump's fascist agenda where it matters most. [Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can right now to help her take this fight from the streets to the halls of Congress?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FHr1qbtgB9vXGdubHK2m4bp3l8UH9k5GNo6QvwCgvMV25e2cmOd7mLzZhy0FQapD9y8Wu1n9M0yx4eyb2iaDHmMOzHj53nZqzQ2NN7ROLBYvMIGHTCOEC4YxSEMi0c6dP_zPGoqlSrxpY8q5KybuL84o9nIjshKFZ-QM8Ow6ImEyIy2mkyvSWl-B3FD03p2ZcAkRlufxWB8wrczDG1SAokqkmVvv4A00aUwQGXh_mNQ=&c=nBFag78sI-w_37COYJBNfuYl1yN6tvZDDbYqkEH5CnZ7MrBHkGigRg==&ch=Ghdm5_lVEh_yZugXn54MND7lQgrwxbzeWU80oeASXYhyPQRI6oM9gw==)

clean_body: ICE responded to our protest with violent escalation— ramming protestors with their cars, beating people up, and firing tear gas into the crowd. Bushra was one of the people hit. | | | | | == | Peter, Bushra joined her neighbors at a peaceful protest against ICE at their Broadway facility in Chicago. Ever since Trump unleashed "Operation Midway Blitz" on Chicago, our city has become one of nations biggest flashpoints of resistance--and this day was no different. I was on the ground when it happened. ICE responded to our protest with violent escalation-- ramming protestors with their cars, beating people up, and firing tear gas into the crowd. Bushra was one of the people hit. | | == | Scenes from the chaos. Bushra pictured at bottom left as the smoke hit her. | Donald Trump is using ICE as his personal Gestapo--unleashing brute force on peaceful protesters while his fascist machine tightens its grip: the FCC bullying TV networks, Pam Bondi vowing to criminalize dissent as "hate speech," and the administration ordering the Joint Terrorism Task Force to investigate Americans for commonly held beliefs. Fascism is here in America, right now. Now more than ever, it is essential to elect leaders like Bushra--people who don't just repeat talking points, but take direct action. Leaders willing to stand on the front lines, even in the face of tear gas, to protect their communities. We need to send Bushra to Congress so she can fight Trump's fascist agenda where it matters most. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | The stakes have never been higher. clean_body: Since their 2024 Autopsy won't be public, I will make some guesses about what it could have said. | Fellow American - Democrats don't want this public. After we flipped 4 seats in the United States Senate, winning back the Senate majority, Democrats and the DNC knew they needed to take a look at why they lost in 2024. They are unburdened by past losses. They don't want the reality of why they lost in 2024 public. Their 2024 autopsy isn't public, but I guarantee it says something like this: Democrats knew they lost because the Biden-Harris agenda ruined our economy. They lost because people know Democrats wouldn't secure our border. Democrats lost because they “picked” Kamala Harris without a real primary. They lost because the American people know the Left's radical agenda is wrong for us. But this doesn't mean that Democrats won't be out swinging in 2026. They are already attacking President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate. They're rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country. Millions of dollars were spent here in Montana last year. Democrats think they can outspend us to undo 2024. Let's prove them wrong. Midterms are always hard for the party in power. History says that Democrats have the upper hand, but I know with you in my corner, we can keep this seat RED. Let's make Democrats regret not owning up to their 2024 problems. Thanks, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: James Talarico for Senate
subject: The timing is NOT GREAT at all…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
Alright, team...
We wanted to fill you in on where things stand ahead of the most important FEC fundraising deadline of our campaign. Because as a supporter of this movement, you deserve total transparency.
**Here is the good news:** We've received a huge number of individual donations since James Talarico launched his campaign, and our volunteer operation is running at full speed across Texas.
**But here is the bad news:** We've started to see a dramatic slowdown in our fundraising as we get closer to this deadline. The timing is not great at all... to say the least.
**Check out this screenshot of ActBlue.**
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251227-1-ak&t=1&akid=346%2E1347274%2E20itxd)
The blue bars represent the amount of money raised, while the purple line accounts for how many donations we receive for each day.
You can see the trend, Peter. Both metrics are headed in the wrong direction.
That leaves us with two choices. We either need a lot more individual donations or we need those who've given before to donate a larger amount than their last contribution.
Normally, we ask people who have yet to contribute to give about $5 for their first donation. But with just a few days left, we have to ask you to dig a bit deeper today.
**[If winning this seat in Texas and electing a candidate who can usher in a new era of politics in the Senate is something important to you, please rush a $10 contribution (or whatever you can afford) to James Talarico's campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251227-1-ak&t=2&akid=346%2E1347274%2E20itxd)**
Thank you in advance for contributing today. James is so grateful to have you in his corner.
Team Talarico
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251227-1-ak&t=3&akid=346%2E1347274%2E20itxd)

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=346%2E1347274%2E20itxd).

name: Chris Pappas HQ
subject: We’ll have to go public
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
This is what happens after next week.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4252%2E582294%2EZNcChi)
Our end-of-year deadline is ALMOST HERE.
_What does that mean?_
After next week all of our fundraising numbers will go public. This is the first report since John Sununu jumped into the race — so you better believe our opponents, the GOP, and their super PAC allies will be studying our reports closely, looking for signs of weakness.
**Let’s show them that New Hampshire doesn’t back down.**
**[Rush a $5 donation right now to help Team Pappas meet our $150,000 goal before the FEC deadline on December 31st at midnight.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251227_1.isLJxz&refcode=em20251227-1&t=3&akid=4252%2E582294%2EZNcChi)**
Chris Pappas is a lifelong Granite Stater who’s fighting for working families — lowering prescription drug costs, defending reproductive freedom, and standing up to MAGA extremism. **He’s the leader New Hampshire needs and deserves in the Senate.**
Chris can stop John Sununu and the GOP from flipping this state red, but he can’t do it alone. He’s won four tough battleground races because he knows how to build a powerful grassroots team — and he needs supporters like you in his corner.
**[Please — make a $5 contribution now to back our campaign. Anything you can give before our end-of-year deadline will make an important impact.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251227_1.isLJxz&refcode=em20251227-1&t=4&akid=4252%2E582294%2EZNcChi)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251227_1.isLJxz&amount=5&refcode=em20251227-1&t=23&akid=4252%2E582294%2EZNcChi)**
Thank you,
Team Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251227-1&t=24&refcode2=4252_582294_ZNcChi&akid=4252%2E582294%2EZNcChi)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=25&akid=4252%2E582294%2EZNcChi)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=26&akid=4252%2E582294%2EZNcChi)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=4252%2E582294%2EZNcChi)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

Consider yourself a top ally of President Trump? Then read this email NOW.

| | | | Peter,
It’s not up for debate. You’ve always been a top ally of President Trump.
When they IMPEACHED him twice.
Took his MUGSHOT like a common criminal.
INDICTED him four times.
RAIDED his family home.
ARRESTED him.
Made him sit through BOGUS witch hunt trials.
And MORE!
You never gave up. You never abandoned the fight. Time and time again, you SHOWED UP to defend the President.
And we will NEVER forget your loyalty.
You play a key part in his victory! [So now, we’re reaching out directly to see if you’ll submit your endorsement of President Trump’s second term so far!](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
All responses will be IMMEDIATELY sent to the President’s team. We’ve set an ambitious goal of gathering ONE MILLION endorsements before the month ends, and we can’t reach this goal without everyone doing their part. | [ SUBMIT YOUR ENDORSEMENT OF DONALD TRUMP ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
---
[So, Peter, can we count on your endorsement?](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-_8_2olBjgD7tyxA) Together, we’ll save America!

Thank you,

Team Marsha

body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mCt6gt3nev0IDvPxYqGlK4P24QsgmVAMhGXEWSqUv8Zx8XGgsp4Fc4vwO5CLGIl27c9BSz9QLc8lRFBxzGXsp81eZybkspjJQDxBrBH4axnY_eJSwD96qGAkTGhUBRFyn05s-EqCLXOJB8y2NoQMa4L05QJZjqQ7u-8HdnBgbatf0gmfR9bfbuPgYiz6hx1ZNwxmCn0M-k7P6BxgWU_cS5EG0xNnn5S_BXJ5MJMXcrtQqL5Hw68Jua2dWsyOyjOC39Bf3GHwiy9E9qU55ZVl8eJ3B6hDqpNnz_17F1P_C8TLg/4ms/oBfVQjH3SBWeHeAToMk1hA/h0/h001.SFcRrvJkpG6cXl0S2-PRsbQ9bHgBw-lPT__JRzyBQ3I) **[We must stop the use of ableist rhetoric – Donate $10 to Able Dems today to foster political power for people with disabilities.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mAQcHBGZTQyASHdftBqMbHvaM67lJJs1zDETiQ2AQ3s9Kej1bPopPTeswETTx3Jz81BgeJ46RlXGrJ0oYsgP0im7zwD-hStLIIYxbj5GUosucbmNpGFBT-_RMCvY8sLzIIzPUHp5IEbIwsLSDrtmyVw-vunozqkMOd_CE-bz-U5Lr0LPDdWsllfXCdxp_fd-StlKWsjsUWEsHB2zl2JthbvvZJJnulCb50CyYE9SnfgnLecUMju2CNMpHxZhmg8-0uoc8MCJed9wD8UY7hSOTFEyBqGAkAHnthU6y1LXm_Xsg/4ms/oBfVQjH3SBWeHeAToMk1hA/h1/h001.bPQ_vt0iEJlO-0x7cccbX8BtLXGm61E4SB8LLIWIT40)**
* * *
Posts containing the word “retard” on the social media platform X jumped **225.7%** in the hours after Trump used it in a reckless post, according to researchers from Montclair State University. In 2020, the r-word was “**nearly unused** ” on X. The normalization of the r-word undermines efforts to foster dignity and respect for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities, contributes to a hostile environment online and offline, and makes inclusive advocacy even more challenging. **When the highest office in the land uses ableist rhetoric, it makes people with disabilities the butt of the joke.** It creates a narrative that people with disabilities are less than and makes it easier to cut essential programs like Medicaid. Able Dems exists to help elect people with disabilities and allies of the disabled community. Those who understand that when we respect the dignity of _everyone,_ it creates a better, more compassionate society. **[Help build political power in this country for folks with disabilities and donate to Able Dems.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mAXTZvBaxwdbCtQWh1rQQdr_KIPOty4KESIlpqVCWOOyGrFYDup1IROXnzbOsUfcM2AGhb-KSBcKL_TuSyl9M8RhZ3hTZRvXj3hEtVwJtpAX38vfjV95baDTpKMUzp7puBFXUKtBuajGosd_laVD0I9G4-AgUie2US0zczJRtarAmYcYlIYFVE9IfdSbmPsIPNRaWRsrOdwrvvGXkJy54l7-3pCDpies2zQbWnppwg2n0dOIWSJboXwnzIzRj-uutb9G5zgpMrQtBDJTMtdk3zLCm_KAEck4_C2wZzIVSNdlQ/4ms/oBfVQjH3SBWeHeAToMk1hA/h2/h001.pi19mgAlNFw9ZTxPPydxtC4PD6sLJmkYmQzVTMqWv-8)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | Posts containing the word “retard” on the social media platform X jumped 225.7% in the hours after Trump used it in a reckless post, according to researchers from Montclair State University. In 2020, the r-word was “nearly unused ” on X. The normalization of the r-word undermines efforts to foster dignity and respect for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities, contributes to a hostile environment online and offline, and makes inclusive advocacy even more challenging. When the highest office in the land uses ableist rhetoric, it makes people with disabilities the butt of the joke. It creates a narrative that people with disabilities are less than and makes it easier to cut essential programs like Medicaid. Able Dems exists to help elect people with disabilities and allies of the disabled community. Those who understand that when we respect the dignity of everyone, it creates a better, more compassionate society. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thank you so much for your support in these trying times. — Jeff Person, Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Democrats.org
subject: If everyone reading this email pitched in $7 >>>
body:
Every dollar we raise right now serves a critical purpose:
---
Derek, With so much happening right now, you may not think that $7, $10, or $25 can make a difference in checking Trump’s power. **But you’d be wrong.** Every dollar we raise right now serves a critical purpose: laying the groundwork to take back Congress. Investing in our state parties. Holding Trump and congressional Republicans accountable in the courts, in their own districts, online, and in the media — and making sure voters are hearing that message loud and clear. We are able to do this work because thousands of grassroots supporters just like you have chipped in what they could, when they could, to support our mission. Today, we’re going to ask you to join them — but first, let us tell you why. **Here’s what our path forward looks like:** It’s clearer than ever that we need to take back Congress and elect more Democrats who will prevent Trump’s worst instincts from becoming our new reality. To win the Senate majority, we need to build strong, statewide organizing programs in at least eight states — places like Georgia, North Carolina, Maine, and New Hampshire. On top of that, we’ll need strong Democratic infrastructure in districts all over the map, to win as many vulnerable Republican House seats as we can. As you can imagine, all of that will take a HUGE number of resources. **[That’s why we’re asking for a chance to earn your first contribution of 2025. If winning back Congress is important to you, can you make your first $7 contribution today to help us keep building the strongest possible Democratic Party?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251227_5559_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5559_22930333_xhjEAr&akid=5559%2E22930333%2ExhjEAr) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251227_5559_fr&refcode2=5559_22930333_xhjEAr&akid=5559%2E22930333%2ExhjEAr)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20251227_5559_fr&refcode2=5559_22930333_xhjEAr&akid=5559%2E22930333%2ExhjEAr)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20251227_5559_fr&refcode2=5559_22930333_xhjEAr&akid=5559%2E22930333%2ExhjEAr)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20251227_5559_fr&refcode2=5559_22930333_xhjEAr&akid=5559%2E22930333%2ExhjEAr)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20251227_5559_fr&refcode2=5559_22930333_xhjEAr&akid=5559%2E22930333%2ExhjEAr)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251227_5559_fr&refcode2=5559_22930333_xhjEAr&akid=5559%2E22930333%2ExhjEAr)**
---
****
Thank you for your support,
The Democrats
⛅To all Democrats: 🇺🇸
If everyone reading this email chipped in $7 right now, we’d be well on our way to building the resources we need to organize and reach voters all over the country.
But the truth is that less than 1 percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. That’s why we’re counting on all Democrats who know how high the stakes are to step up in this moment.
[**Will you make your first contribution to the DNC today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251227_5559_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5559_22930333_xhjEAr&akid=5559%2E22930333%2ExhjEAr)
**[Contribute $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251227_5559_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5559_22930333_xhjEAr&akid=5559%2E22930333%2ExhjEAr)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Last opportunity
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Kansas Republicans are breathing down our necks right now

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122064078/591462710/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWI2OTk0Yy0zY2UzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCAbDyOcksL06UZlR6pP9vLXiTQdijIOBePdqXrGPJI=) Let’s be honest: Kansas families feel like they’re being hit from every direction right now. Health care premiums are spiking. The cost of groceries is climbing higher and higher. Even competitive elections for Congress are on the brink of extinction here in Kansas... all because of National Republicans. Yes, this year has been difficult for so many of us. And yes, next year promises to bring even more challenges. But throughout these difficult moments, we’ve stood strong together. We’ve spoken out and pushed back, instead of sitting in silence. In other words, we’ve done exactly what National Republicans _don’t_ want us to do. Now, I’m humbly asking you to take a different kind of action. Here’s why: We’re only four days out from our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year, and our numbers are set to go public just a few days afterward. Translation? Kansas Republicans are breathing down our necks right now, hoping and praying that our numbers fall off ahead of their latest gerrymandering push on January 12th. **_[This is no ordinary fundraising deadline. It could very well be our _last_ opportunity to show Kansas — and the entire country — that we’re not messing around. That we’re ready to do whatever it takes to defend our democracy from the National GOP. Please, rush a donation of any amount before time runs out. I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t incredibly important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122064082/591462711/-851270824?refcode=email_122725_opportunity&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,1000,3500&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWI2OTk0Yy0zY2UzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCAbDyOcksL06UZlR6pP9vLXiTQdijIOBePdqXrGPJI=)_** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122064084/591462712/-851270824?refcode=email_122725_opportunity&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,1000,3500&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWI2OTk0Yy0zY2UzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCAbDyOcksL06UZlR6pP9vLXiTQdijIOBePdqXrGPJI=)

Thank you,

The cost of groceries is climbing higher and higher. Even competitive elections for Congress are on the brink of extinction here in Kansas... all because of National Republicans. name: Kamala Harris
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for the People PAC ([fightforthepeoplepac
body:
Everyone will be looking

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to split a contribution between Jon Ossoff's U.S. Senate campaign and my PAC before the final FEC fundraising deadline of the year comes to a close.
If you know how important Jon's re-election is and are ready to help keep him in the Senate with a timely contribution, use this link to give:
[**https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/JonOssoff**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-tjo?refcode=em251227&refcode2=860_2563979_DE1B5_&akid=860%2E2563979%2EDE1B5_)
Otherwise, please let me explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
Here is the truth:
Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for re-election in a state also won by Donald Trump in the last election. That makes him the Republican Party's top target in the next election.
Because Republicans know what we know, and that is that if they can beat Jon Ossoff, there's no chance Democrats have of taking back the Senate in the next election.
They are already spending money to defeat him with many millions more to come as we get closer to the election.
Both Jon and I have FEC deadlines coming up -- both are important. For me, everyone will be looking to see if you're still with me. So it's important we file a strong report with lots of donations. For Jon, a weak number will open the floodgates of Republican spending.
So what do you say? There's no better time than right now to make this contribution.
[**Please split a contribution between Jon Ossoff's re-election campaign and my PAC today. There is no donation too small. Everyone will add up fast and send a powerful message about the grassroots support for Jon's re-election and for my work.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-fftp-tjo?refcode=em251227&refcode2=860_2563979_DE1B5_&akid=860%2E2563979%2EDE1B5_)

name: Nikki Budzinski (personal)
subject: I’m not backing down in 2026.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
Hi friend, it’s Nikki.

I want to thank you for sticking with me this year -- despite the extreme GOP headwinds, we’ve managed to accomplish quite a bit.

**From my legislation expanding veteran care, to saving local steel jobs, and protecting education funding, I’ve stood up to Trump -- and won.**

But the fact remains that working families across the district and country are suffering under the cruelty of the MAGA agenda. ACA tax credits are set to expire at the end of the year, with millions losing access to affordable healthcare, and Republicans refused to bring a vote on extension to the House floor before January.

This is a complete failure. If Republicans have shown us anything this year, it’s that they value their billionaire donors over the needs of millions in the middle class.

**I’m not backing down in 2026. In fact, I’m increasing the pressure -- despite the pushback I’ll get from the multiple GOP challengers in this race.**

That’s why I need your support ahead of our FEC deadline on the 31st. This is a public filing deadline, and you can bet the national GOP will be combing over our report for any signs of weakness.

I don’t expect you to donate to every message I send, but if you haven’t chipped in $3 yet, it will go a long way today: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-q4-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122064801/591465588/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTlkZTcyMS0zZGUzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8cLVALxSFrBEUq1-bA_C_pJoOKgkC4Oa1jihI65Gm_g=)**

Thank you,

Nikki

* * *
Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States
Paid for by Nikki for Congress

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Voter registration across the board
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Team,
We kicked off our end-of-year voter registration campaign at the beginning of December simply because we have no time to waste to make every voice heard in our elections. If "voter registration campaign" was all you needed to hear to support our work, you can click right here and skip the rest of this message [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=122725_1&amount=24] .
If you're a long-time supporter of ours you've likely heard this a lot, but -- it only costs us about $3 to register a voter. That means for every $15 we raise, five new voters could be added to the rolls ahead of the midterm elections. Defenders of voting rights have shown up strongly at the polls in 2025 but with recent voter suppression bills defining who gets to vote and how, we have to do everything we can to make sure we get as many pro-democracy voters filling out a ballot next year as possible.
Remember, we're a 100% grassroots-funded organization. We don't have any millionaires bankrolling us from the shadows. Everything we've done to defend voting rights has come from our supporters getting these emails and trusting us to get the job done. We're grateful for your support -- but we've got to call on you again as we ramp up for next year.
Team: Fuel our voter registration efforts with $24 or whatever you can today. Every dollar goes towards registering voters and protecting your right to vote >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=122725_1&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=122725_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=122725_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=122725_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=122725_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=122725_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=122725_1&amount=36]
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last decade.
These 2026 midterm races will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories of the recent past or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=122725_1&amount=24]
We hope you'll continue to stand with us -- not just this week, but to the next election and beyond.
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] Team, We kicked off our end-of-year voter registration campaign at the beginning of December simply because we have no time to waste to make every voice heard in our elections. If "voter registration campaign" was all you needed to hear to support our work, you can click right here and skip the rest of this message [] . If you're a long-time supporter of ours you've likely heard this a lot, but -- it only costs us about $3 to register a voter. That means for every $15 we raise, five new voters could be added to the rolls ahead of the midterm elections. Defenders of voting rights have shown up strongly at the polls in 2025 but with recent voter suppression bills defining who gets to vote and how, we have to do everything we can to make sure we get as many pro-democracy voters filling out a ballot next year as possible. Remember, we're a 100% grassroots-funded organization. We don't have any millionaires bankrolling us from the shadows. Everything we've done to defend voting rights has come from our supporters getting these emails and trusting us to get the job done. We're grateful for your support -- but we've got to call on you again as we ramp up for next year. Team: Fuel our voter registration efforts with $24 or whatever you can today. Every dollar goes towards registering voters and protecting your right to vote >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last decade. These 2026 midterm races will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories of the recent past or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future. New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference >> [] We hope you'll continue to stand with us -- not just this week, but to the next election and beyond. Thank you, Voter Action Project's Registration Team Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: Setting the tone for 2026
