clean_body: | | | Friend — Before we charge into 2026 and into the next fight, I want to pause and say something simple, but important: Thank you. 2025 was not an easy year. It demanded persistence, courage, and belief. And because of supporters like you, we met that moment head-on. You knocked doors, made calls, sent texts, and chipped in when it mattered. You showed up for a vision of Virginia that is fairer, stronger, and more inclusive. Because of you, we protected hard-won progress. Because of you, Virginia remained a bulwark against extremism. Because of you, people who are too often ignored now have someone fighting for them. Simply put, we blew the doors off that election in November! And I am deeply grateful. ****And now, we turn the page. 2026 is already on the horizon — and it will be decisive. Virginia will once again be at the center of the national fight, and the work we do now will determine how strong we are when that moment arrives. The truth is: momentum doesn’t carry itself. It’s built — early, intentionally, and together. you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thank you for being part of this journey. I’m excited, determined, and ready for what’s next — and I hope you’ll stay with me as we take on 2026 together. With gratitude and resolve, Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Sarah McBride
subject: Could I give you a quick call?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I hope to talk to you over the phone pretty soon.
#
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251227-1.wgpald&refcode=em20251227-2618&t=1&akid=2618%2E21716%2EV2KGOY)
Hey – it’s Sarah.
**Do you have a sec to chat with me over the phone? 📞**
The reason I’m asking is that I’m blocking off a couple of hours in my schedule to call a few supporters who chip in to our campaign before our FEC fundraising deadline next Wednesday.
[**Would you donate $5 or any amount you can afford today? I’ll be calling a handful of folks who chip in, and I’d love the opportunity to speak with you!** ](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251227-1.wgpald&refcode=em20251227-2618&amount=5&t=2&akid=2618%2E21716%2EV2KGOY)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251227-1.wgpald&amount=5&refcode=em20251227-2618&t=21&akid=2618%2E21716%2EV2KGOY)**
Don’t get me wrong. I love that you and I can communicate via email. These emails are one of the very best ways for us to stay connected about what I’m up to in Congress and all the progress we’re fighting for together here in Delaware.
**But there’s truly nothing like a good old-fashioned phone call, and I’d love the opportunity to connect with you to hear what’s on your mind.** I know too many folks in Delaware and across the country are worried about what’s ahead. Whether you’re concerned about the future your kids will inherit, frustrated by what’s happening in Washington, or if you want to chat about what’s giving you hope right now, I’d love to hear from you.
[**I can’t wait to start calling a few members of this team who pitch in ahead of Wednesday’s fundraising deadline. Can I put you down for a $5 donation to support our fight for working families?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251227-1.wgpald&refcode=em20251227-2618&amount=5&t=22&akid=2618%2E21716%2EV2KGOY)
Hope to chat very soon!
— Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251227-1&t=23&refcode2=2618_21716_V2KGOY&akid=2618%2E21716%2EV2KGOY)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=25&akid=2618%2E21716%2EV2KGOY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2618%2E21716%2EV2KGOY)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Turn your taxes into climate action
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=/AXFLkFzlLvyPsn3erSOpaWGCSey1Iyzgr8Dn6YiIK6DQkm/Oo7+LsSk8r7NUyY3g+jgV4a/K8F7sRWz/8fMEskOCSpZ0+ORL1jjF7Nn9P7owc158uUqiLI3+UxrytWs [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=/AXFLkFzlLvyPsn3erSOpaWGCSey1Iyzgr8Dn6YiIK6DQkm/Oo7+LsSk8r7NUyY3g+jgV4a/K8F7sRWz/8fMEskOCSpZ0+ORL1jjF7Nn9P7owc158uUqiLI3+UxrytWs]
Hi Peter,
OLCV volunteers lend their time and voices year after year to help us elect pro-climate candidates, and their work starts with you . Our donors are the backbone of all of our volunteers’ work of speaking to voters about OLCV endorsed candidates.
With Oregon’s Political Tax Credit, eligible tax-paying Oregonians can give $50 (individual) or $100 (couple filing jointly) to the OLCV PAC, as essentially a free donation. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=/AXFLkFzlLvyPsn3erSOpaWGCSey1Iyzgr8Dn6YiIK6DQkm/Oo7+LsSk8r7NUyY3g+jgV4a/K8F7sRWz/8fMEskOCSpZ0+ORL1jjF7Nn9P7owc158uUqiLI3+UxrytWs]
A previous OLCV intern, Jamie Hartmann from Portland, Oregon, wants to share their story advocating for OLCV endorsed candidates:
“I wanted a way to get involved in my community when it came to combatting climate change. When I discovered OLCV, I was astounded with the amount of effort they put in. Every Oregon congressperson's vote on every climate-related bill was recorded and factored into their "lifetime score", a measurement of how much good an Oregon politician has done in regards to pushing pro-climate bills forward and shutting anti-climate bills down. As a high school intern, I helped to canvas and phone bank during election season, write to my representatives regarding potential laws, and even got to be part of a team interviewing potential candidates for an OLCV endorsement. Simply put, OLCV does the hard work so the average climate-concerned voter has an easy guide to voting that aligns with their priorities. I was proud to work with OLCV, and my climate and political knowledge has been enriched because of it.”
We need the proper resources to win next year. Your gift using Oregon’s Political Tax Credit now will help us recruit volunteers to knock on doors and talk to voters about OLCV endorsed candidates in the 2026 election! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2]
Give now [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5zGcLKjrckS5lWLLpIGsGA2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=/AXFLkFzlLvyPsn3erSOpaWGCSey1Iyzgr8Dn6YiIK6DQkm/Oo7+LsSk8r7NUyY3g+jgV4a/K8F7sRWz/8fMEskOCSpZ0+ORL1jjF7Nn9P7owc158uUqiLI3+UxrytWs]
You’re eligible for Oregon’s Political Tax Credit if:
✔ You are an Oregon resident
✔ You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2025
✔ You make less than $75,000 (individual) or $150,000 (couple filing jointly)
Thanks for your support,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, please fill out this form here to opt-out [https://secure.everyaction.com/c2_U_ki-NEyU8Gdkttquug2] but still remain on our general email list!
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

name: Eduardo Verastegui, Sound of Freedom producer
subject: She was only 12. She thought no one was coming.
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e2185930/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvbU5OUHEzZ0hZYw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjc/LbmNsb29NU0xCZw/qP2hpZHM9bmN3RUJJTkxBdDRiWUFscw/gaVAVxA/s1g324ffabe)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, Imagine this... You’re twelve years old. You’ve been lured online, taken from your home, and locked in a freezing basement miles from anywhere. You’re being sold to strangers on the internet. Used. Broadcast. Passed around from one monster to the next. And every night, you lie awake in the dark asking: _“Will anyone come for me?”_ **For Alice... the answer was yes.** But for thousands of other children still in captivity, the answer hasn’t come yet. They are still waiting. And good people like you and me may be their only chance. **[**Patriot, will you be an Agent of Mercy for trafficked children like Alice by making a tax-deductible gift to the Sound of Freedom Foundation today?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **YES! I will help rescue a child today** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
My name is Eduardo Verástegui, and I founded the Sound of Freedom Foundation to rescue children like Alice. **You may know me as the producer of the film**** _Sound of Freedom._****That film awakened the world to the brutal reality of child trafficking.** The movie itself was never the end goal. It was just the beginning. Since the film’s release, I’ve met with world leaders, supported sting operations, and helped expose cartels running trafficking networks. I’ve seen unspeakable horror... and I’ve seen courageous people bring children home. Now, I’m asking you to help us bring home the next.
---
[ **YES! I will help rescue a child today** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
You may be wondering: _How did Alice make it home?_ A Florida-based cyber-investigator — part of our extended network — spotted a familiar username in a trafficking forum. He followed the trail. It led to a match on a missing child: **Alice.** He contacted the FBI. They traced the location. Raided the site. **Rescued Alice. Alive.** She is safe today and healing. Because **someone stepped up** when no one else could. **This is why we launched**** _Operation Search and Rescue._** It’s our most ambitious initiative to date — connecting undercover investigators, cyber intelligence analysts, and law enforcement to: ️✅ Expose child trafficking networks
✅ Rescue enslaved boys and girls
✅ Put predators behind bars for life We have the tools. We have the expertise. What we _really_ need is... YOU. **Patriot, with your support today, you can directly fund this effort. And thanks to a Matching Grant, your gift will go twice as far!** Right now, a $10,000 Search and Rescue Matching Grant is in place to launch our next wave of operations. _That means your donation of $35 becomes $70... $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... and so on..._ But time is running out. This match is limited. The next operation depends on your support. **[**So please, Patriot, make your life-saving gift today to the Sound of Freedom Foundation and become an Agent of Mercy for children like Alice.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **YES! I will help rescue a child today** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
This isn’t charity... It’s a rescue mission. Every dollar sends trained agents into the dark places where traffickers hide children. Every dollar brings us closer to the next rescue. These children can’t call for help. But you can answer anyway. Will you be an Agent of Mercy for God’s children? Many blessings, Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation **P.S.**_Sound of Freedom_ gave a voice to the children who were silenced. With your help, we can give that same hope to children still waiting to be rescued.
---
[ **YES! I will help rescue a child today** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e2185930/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjc/LbmNsb29NU0xCZw/qP2hpZHM9bmN3RUJJTkxBdDRiWUFscw/gaVAVxA/sfs4f2ddbe2)

name: Team Crow
subject: Jason has always stood up for us — now it’s our turn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Team,

Jason Crow has always fought for this country.

He signed up to fight overseas when he did three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. He fought for justice as an impeachment manager, defending the Constitution when it mattered most. And today, he’s fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable– even as Trump and his allies try to intimidate, harass, and silence him for speaking out.

Now, it’s our turn to stand up and fight for Jason.

At a moment when Trump is weaponizing the FBI and Justice Department and attacking Jason for refusing to fall in line, Jason isn’t backing down. He’s fighting for the rule of law, for our democracy, and for the values he swore to defend in uniform. That kind of leadership takes courage, and it takes support.

With our end-of-year FEC deadline fast approaching, we need to show that Jason doesn’t stand alone. Every contribution before the deadline sends a clear message: when Jason stands up for us, we have his back.

If you’re able, will you chip in before the end of the year to help Jason keep fighting for our democracy? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25]

To receive text updates from Team Crow, join us here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/bjvZx6_NWU2fx5btnSgikw2] .
clean_body: Jason Crow For Colorado [] Team, Jason Crow has always fought for this country. He signed up to fight overseas when he did three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. He fought for justice as an impeachment manager, defending the Constitution when it mattered most. And today, he’s fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable– even as Trump and his allies try to intimidate, harass, and silence him for speaking out. Now, it’s our turn to stand up and fight for Jason. At a moment when Trump is weaponizing the FBI and Justice Department and attacking Jason for refusing to fall in line, Jason isn’t backing down. He’s fighting for the rule of law, for our democracy, and for the values he swore to defend in uniform. That kind of leadership takes courage, and it takes support. With our end-of-year FEC deadline fast approaching, we need to show that Jason doesn’t stand alone. Every contribution before the deadline sends a clear message: when Jason stands up for us, we have his back. If you’re able, will you chip in before the end of the year to help Jason keep fighting for our democracy? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $10 NOW [] DONATE $25 NOW [] DONATE $50 NOW [] DONATE $100 NOW [] DONATE $250 NOW [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you for standing with us at this critical moment. — Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com] Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress *Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. **On average, American families have spent $700 more due to inflation under Trump.**

That's $700 that could have gone toward holiday gifts, groceries, or keeping the heat on through another New Hampshire winter.

Instead, families are making impossible choices... Fill prescriptions, or buy groceries? Fix the car, or pay the heating bill?

And while families struggle with these decisions, health care costs keep climbing. The attacks on the Affordable Care Act haven't stopped.

I know the last thing you want to see is another email asking for money when your budget is already stretched thin, but here’s the reality:

**If we don’t fight back now, things will only get worse.** The GOP isn’t taking a holiday break, and neither can we.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: 5 days left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need to set ourselves up to start the new year off strong.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251227-5747-footer&t=1&akid=5747%2E420207%2EQlAVfq)
Peter,
There are only 5 days left in 2025, and today we’re announcing a big end-of-year goal: **We need to raise $30,000 before midnight on December 31st.**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251227-1.-Fpc1l&refcode=em20251227-5747&t=2&akid=5747%2E420207%2EQlAVfq)
With big fights looming in 2026 over everything from health care subsidies to control of Congress in the midterms, we need to set ourselves up to start the new year off strong.
[**Can you chip in $3 or any amount right now to help us meet this goal and continue pushing for our progressive priorities in the new year?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251227-1.-Fpc1l&refcode=em20251227-5747&amount=3&t=3&akid=5747%2E420207%2EQlAVfq)
Next year, people will be counting on us to continue standing up in nonviolent resistance against Trump’s authoritarian agenda. And working people will still be relying on us to organize the Democratic Party around a bold, populist agenda that delivers real, tangible change — like paid leave, Medicare For All, affordable child care, and so much more.
**If we get to work now, 2026 can be the year we both retake the House _and_ rebuild the Democratic Party around a robust working class agenda.** But to make that happen, we need to prove the momentum behind our movement — and that starts with reaching this goal.
[**If you can, please make a donation of $3 or any amount to help us reach our final goal of 2025. With your help, we can hit the ground running next year.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251227-1.-Fpc1l&refcode=em20251227-5747&amount=3&t=4&akid=5747%2E420207%2EQlAVfq)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251227-1.-Fpc1l&amount=3&refcode=em20251227-5747&t=23&akid=5747%2E420207%2EQlAVfq)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251227-5747-footer&t=24&refcode2=5747_420207_QlAVfq&akid=5747%2E420207%2EQlAVfq)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

---
Peter,
_**Official records show YOU helped deliver the White House in 2024.**_

Top MAGA strategists just named your support the deciding factor.

But right now the radical Left is regrouping for _**total WAR****.**_

Democrats are raising WAR CHESTS of dark money to **impeach President Trump on Day 1 of 2026, indict his allies, censor patriots, and permanently bury MAGA in 2026.**

If you and I lose in 2026, _**it’s over.**_

_** >> No wall. **_

_**> > No deportations. **_

_**> > No America First.**_

Just show trials, gun grabs, open borders, and prison for anyone _who ever wore a red hat._

_**I’m Ray Riehle and I’m running to be President Trump’s last line of defense inside the Capitol.**_

I need to know — right now — if I can count on you when they come for him... and for us.

That’s why I’ve placed your name on the emergency priority list for the

**Official 2025 End-of-Year MAGA Interview**

_**This is the final roll call of 2025.**_

Your answers will decide where we deploy every dollar, every volunteer, every legal counterstrike in the coming war.
**Do NOT sit this one out.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, Official records show YOU helped deliver the White House in 2024. Top MAGA strategists just named your support the deciding factor. But right now the radical Left is regrouping for total WAR. Democrats are raising WAR CHESTS of dark money to impeach President Trump on Day 1 of 2026, indict his allies, censor patriots, and permanently bury MAGA in 2026. If you and I lose in 2026, it’s over. >> No wall. > No deportations. > No America First. Just show trials, gun grabs, open borders, and prison for anyone who ever wore a red hat. I’m Ray Riehle and I’m running to be President Trump’s last line of defense inside the Capitol. I need to know — right now — if I can count on you when they come for him... and for us. That’s why I’ve placed your name on the emergency priority list for the Official 2025 End-of-Year MAGA Interview This is the final roll call of 2025. body:
This is different from the surveys you usually see from us. But we honestly want to know what you think.
#
Peter – this is an opportunity to let it all out: **What frustrates you most about the state of politics in America right now?**
**[SHARE MORE HERE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98944?t=1&akid=9875%2E614464%2ELKUNcJ)**
This is different from the surveys we’ve sent you recently. Today, we want you to candidly share more about what’s frustrating you about any part of our political process these days. We know there’s probably a lot!
**Tomorrow, we’ll shift gears and focus on something more positive.[But for now, please use this survey to let your frustrations out – we want to hear anything you are willing to share.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98944?t=2&akid=9875%2E614464%2ELKUNcJ)**

clean_body: This is different from the surveys you usually see from us. But we honestly want to know what you think. Peter – this is an opportunity to let it all out: What frustrates you most about the state of politics in America right now? This is different from the surveys we’ve sent you recently. Today, we want you to candidly share more about what’s frustrating you about any part of our political process these days. We know there’s probably a lot! Tomorrow, we’ll shift gears and focus on something more positive. Thank you – and we hope you have a great rest of your Saturday! – State Democrats HQ Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

If you're looking to make an impact at the end of a long, difficult year, here is your golden opportunity.
Making a donation right now at the end of the fundraising reporting quarter to Lauren Boebert's foil, Democrat Trisha Calvarese, is a great way to cap off Trump's first year back in office.
Supporting this critical effort is a defiant act of hope and patriotism in a time of cynicism, despair, and worry for the future of America.
[Can you make a last-minute gift to Trisha's record-breaking campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert in honor of your loved ones, friends, and family who deserve a shot at a brighter future?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vUMH-UFVAvKojYfmBtSCPF08A8iUGZcOvej8tYE_AuinXXaUK5POTIKWSiIj4eitJgNrMg3dJR6Qk9yFBwJFwQeN1jsT5RourwCV6_XHH0bY1H6Gri0U9pAXDxaM30zGp-P_N7EndOwRyEyhGdowon4oh9YIg1c3ea4Fd91a33clp-Au7eS_eZpGTToxVlJ2xShgyGD94M8Kz2Jkzin2wg0UqW5brrps&c=_jfywu-J65LaJUC9UFofgAS-_SA3G5tKjjguCSItV__EVgcLjZnwMQ==&ch=xKaSqnvXFd9AeoopH6nRJklTRQ5TYyaXdZCDk_8ecTeqev5a_fDfkw==)

name: Grassroots Team via Our Revolution
subject: Fox News called us “Bernie Sanders’ Gestapo.” We need your help NOW.

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1011&refcode=email-20251227_v&akid=10016%2E5885482%2Esw01wa ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Our Revolution’s grassroots fundraising is in trouble.

We are $29,543 short of our goal for 2025 – money we urgently need by
December 31. We can’t fall short now when the far right is gunning for us
like never before. Fox News Radio is calling us “Bernie Sanders’ Gestapo.”
Breitbart is publishing hit pieces.

These coordinated attacks are meant to intimidate our movement and silence
our volunteers. Our team is working round the clock to protect our
activists and scale up security – but our resources are spread thin. Every
time we think we’re covered, another attack pops up.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251227nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10016%2E5885482%2Esw01wa ]Will you chip in right now to help us close our grassroots fundraising gap
and keep our work going full steam ahead into 2026?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251227nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10016%2E5885482%2Esw01wa ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251227nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10016%2E5885482%2Esw01wa ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251227nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10016%2E5885482%2Esw01wa ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20251227nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10016%2E5885482%2Esw01wa ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Why does the right wing target us? Because we are effective – turning out
thousands into the streets, electing progressives up and down the ballot,
and mobilizing the grassroots in record breaking numbers to stand up for
working families.

Our targeted activism and election work costs money. And our organizing is
built on small-dollar donations. We do not have billionaires or corporate
PACs in our corner. We have each other. And right now, we need every
single one of us to step up.

We know what the other side wants. They want us to stop showing up. They
want Our Revolution to be silenced, under-resourced, and – eventually –
gone. We won’t let that happen. Bernie founded us in 2016 with a mission,
and we won’t back down.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34883?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251227nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10016%2E5885482%2Esw01wa ]Every time we plug a hole, a new attack appears. Falling $29,543 short
could mean freezing outreach where it’s needed most in 2026. Rush an
urgent donation now so we can meet the far right’s intimidation head on –
together.

The right only tries this hard to silence people making a difference. Our
Revolution has always been about people-power – not big money, not
corporate Democrats, not billionaires. If everyone reading this chips in
just $5, we’ll erase the gap – and then some.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

[ ]Every time we plug a hole, a new attack appears. Falling $29,543 short could mean freezing outreach where it’s needed most in 2026. Rush an urgent donation now so we can meet the far right’s intimidation head on – together. The right only tries this hard to silence people making a difference. Our Revolution has always been about people-power – not big money, not corporate Democrats, not billionaires. If everyone reading this chips in just $5, we’ll erase the gap – and then some. When we organize, we win. Our Revolution [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to be a 2025 Movement Builder with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! [ ]GIVE MONTHLY [ ]GIVE ONCE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Why this can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
The strength of this campaign is on the line

| |
---
Hi friend,

Healthcare should work for every American, not just those who can afford it. In Massachusetts, we’ve seen what happens when profit is put ahead of patients. Private equity firms took over hospitals and nursing homes, drained them for short-term gain, and walked away when the system collapsed. When Steward Health Care failed, communities like Dorchester and Ayer didn’t just lose buildings; they lost access to the care they depended on. That didn’t happen by accident. It happened because our healthcare system rewards financial engineering instead of outcomes, and because too many leaders are unwilling to take on the interests that benefit from the status quo. That’s why I support a strong national public option that competes with private insurers and actually brings costs down for families. Healthcare is a human right. But that can only become reality if we have the political strength to fight for it. That’s why this end-of-quarter moment matters. EOQ fundraising is one of the clearest ways campaigns demonstrate momentum and credibility — to organizers, supporters, and the people deciding whether this fight can be won. Hitting our goal means we keep building the campaign needed to take on corporate healthcare interests and push real reform forward. Falling short makes that fight harder. **[If you’re able, can you chip in before the quarter ends to help keep this campaign strong and moving forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122074164/591492973/2090747700?refcode=251227_hq_eoq2_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGQzMDdlZS00YmUzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_nS0Hrw6Y269O46ZJqUpplh9nl5yLlQ4Mo63V7KDMk=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122074171/591492980/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=251227_hq_eoq2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGQzMDdlZS00YmUzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_nS0Hrw6Y269O46ZJqUpplh9nl5yLlQ4Mo63V7KDMk=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122074172/591492981/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=251227_hq_eoq2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGQzMDdlZS00YmUzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_nS0Hrw6Y269O46ZJqUpplh9nl5yLlQ4Mo63V7KDMk=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: This is the only answer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| This deadline is our opportunity to show Trump and his allies in the Senate how deeply unpopular their agenda is.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9338%2E5257348%2ELCF83E)
We’re facing a critical Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline on Wednesday, Derek.
That means donors, reporters, opponents — and yes, even Donald Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress — will all see how much grassroots support we have behind us.
They’ll be able to see how many people support our movement to fight against Trump’s reckless agenda and his lawlessness.
_This is the very last FEC deadline of the year — our last chance of 2025 to show Trump and his allies in the Senate how deeply unpopular their agenda is and that we have the resources to fight it._
While Trump and Senate Republicans use their power to enrich themselves and their wealthy allies, millions of Americans are worried about how they’ll make ends meet.
Health care costs are set to skyrocket for millions of Americans who are already being squeezed by high costs. Meanwhile, congressional Republicans are too busy fighting culture wars — and building ballrooms — to find any real solutions.
**We have to fight back. That’s why showing the size and strength of our movement is the best answer.**
**[Can you chip in any amount right now to help us reach our last fundraising goal of the year? Your donation will help me keep up the fight to hold Trump and his administration accountable.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=9338%2E5257348%2ELCF83E)**

Health care costs are set to skyrocket for millions of Americans who are already being squeezed by high costs. Meanwhile, congressional Republicans are too busy fighting culture wars — and building ballrooms — to find any real solutions. We have to fight back. That’s why showing the size and strength of our movement is the best answer. Peter, I hope you enjoyed a joyful and restful holiday season. I was grateful for the chance to spend time with family and friends — a brief pause to reconnect with the people who matter most. Now, as we head into the final days of 2025, there’s one critical item left on our to-do list: reaching our end-of-year FEC fundraising goal. After December 31st, the Federal Election Commission requires campaigns to submit a public report detailing their fundraising numbers. That means we are legally required to report how much money we’ve raised, and from how many individual contributions. These numbers will go public once filed — which means our opponents, election experts and interest groups get to take a look behind the curtain — it’s a pretty good indicator of the strength of our campaign. **And it’s our first report since our primary challenger entered the race, which makes the stakes even higher than ever.** What we raise right now will set the tone for the rest of our campaign and after taking a look at the numbers, our team set an ambitious $15,000 end-of-quarter goal. Peter, elections aren't just won on Election Day. They’re won by making strategic investments _right now_ so that we can build our voter outreach operation and reach voters in every corner of NC-04. **[So what do you say, Peter? Will you chip in $10 or more ahead of our crucial upcoming FEC deadline to help us reach our $15,000 goal? name: AZ Dems
subject: While Trump jokes, Arizona Democrats listen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
Trump calls affordability a "hoax," but Arizona Democrats are actually meeting with voters and hearing their concerns. This is what leadership looks like. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122074338/591493466/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q3MTBmNTgtNGRlMy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DGGvYPhHio5mbWiP4Yn1T45e0bYFs3pZ-zd4ev3tI3k=)
---
Team — While Trump and his party joke about an "affordability hoax," Arizona Democrats are out meeting with voters across the state and hearing their concerns. **On December 7th, Reps. Adelita Grijalva and Greg Stanton held a town hall in Tucson focused on one issue: affordability.** They listened to families struggling with high prices for healthcare, food, and housing. And they laid out exactly how Republican policies are making things worse. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122074339/591493467/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q3MTBmNTgtNGRlMy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DGGvYPhHio5mbWiP4Yn1T45e0bYFs3pZ-zd4ev3tI3k=) _Representatives Adelita Grijalva and Greg Stanton attend an Affordability Town Hall in Tucson hosted by the Pima County Democratic Party on December 7th | @adelitaforcongress Instagram_ **This is what leadership looks like.** "Republicans told voters they had a plan. They promised relief," Grijalva said. "But almost one year into Trump's second term, things have only gotten worse, and it's a direct result of the choices they're making in Washington." The Consumer Price Index grew 3% between September 2024 and September 2025 — faster than the year before. Prices are still rising. And Republicans are making it worse with tariffs, cuts to Medicaid and SNAP, and healthcare policies that will cause premiums to skyrocket. **Grijalva and Stanton held the town hall in Tucson's south side — in Arizona's 6th Congressional District, currently held by Republican Juan Ciscomani.** The same Juan Ciscomani who voted for the "One Big Beautiful Bill" that will strip Medicaid and SNAP benefits from millions, while making permanent lower tax brackets for the wealthiest Americans. He enabled the 43-day government shutdown. He visited food banks after voting to slash food assistance. Now he's claiming he's "focused on results — lowering costs, protecting taxpayers, and delivering for the people of Arizona." His voting record tells a different story. [**Chip in to support Arizona Democrats who are actually listening to voters and fighting for affordability.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122074340/591493468/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q3MTBmNTgtNGRlMy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DGGvYPhHio5mbWiP4Yn1T45e0bYFs3pZ-zd4ev3tI3k=) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122074341/591493469/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2Q3MTBmNTgtNGRlMy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DGGvYPhHio5mbWiP4Yn1T45e0bYFs3pZ-zd4ev3tI3k=)

name: Stop MAGA
subject: there was no christmas truce

body:
Cooler heads will not prevail. They plan to show us no mercy. The only language that MAGA understands is the language of force.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vl7RF0DNxrG7yup1okqV_WhIVhJ9X9ZLb3N4KJe34xYF3yZBEkDwo_LjFgBDQ2L5IkeOTv4e4e0i3YXtPmMrMZR2ziorjoN3C_EwGTBz1_6WUMZZEkuWIP_1PR1cu-AMqYuB2OWxVlgmUdSRAzpOuemAYi-yHHsxSCKkM0ZgFD-MBqB14_PJGPPumg-6ySIVUBV4-V95oLDCJ5pXF6DTr33uizXv7eG8kZ-3hrpiGjs=&c=nz45QiUBpDRnth57gTSTr_PSBParCGDLqIGEFaBIAD2ARygB0KV4Fw==&ch=aNwZ1CadLfwowInpC7GtAzXWhR_4Vmth4aj4Mp0rucTyby4ZeRtxNQ==)

Peter,
On Christmas Day 1914, months into the 1st World War, British, German, and French soldiers enacted impromptu ceasefires across the Western Front. In the midst of inhumane violence it was a brief reminder of our shared humanity and the Christmas spirit.
As far-right violence rises, the redistricting fight escalates, and bipartisanship collapses, one might think that even the brashest of MAGA might find it in their hearts to pause the fighting.
Some Republicans did try. In Indiana, where Trump was pushing for a massive redistricting that would have removed all Democratic seats, a detachment of courageous GOP lawmakers stood up to Trump, despite threats to their lives, and rejected his redistricting call.
Their hope was that by refusing to escalate they could stop the redistricting arms race which is beginning to spiral out of control and create a "ceasefire" of sorts.
Unfortunately MAGA turned down the opportunity to stop the escalation and are instead using the Holiday season to expand their war on Democrats. Over just the last week Trump has expanded the GOP efforts to redistrict Florida as well as Utah.
No ceasefire is coming. Cooler heads will not prevail. They plan to show us no mercy. The only language that MAGA understands is the language of force.
Our only choice is to inflict so much pain on them that they are forced to stop. Blue states like Colorado must step up and erase GOP districts off their Congressional maps. Colorado Draws the Line (formerly Fair Fight CO) is pushing the ballot initiative that will give Coloradans the choice to do exactly that.
[Getting this on the ballot will cost millions and we need your support. Small dollar donations will add up. Can you donate $10 to help us ensure that by next Christmas we'll have put MAGA through such excruciating pain that they are forced to drop their redistricting coup attempt?](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vl7RF0DNxrG7yup1okqV_WhIVhJ9X9ZLb3N4KJe34xYF3yZBEkDwo_LjFgBDQ2L5H_1Mvhq7rt4-cqCQMIyo4GzjL8GVDgw9sRtPd4ANDCwyo_q3PiMhQtKlL5AcKR8KMEr9xqakFQwoeFqzNZo9LIfnMm4Yjnjznk-XxWPcbpyLs4oHtyz462aDCZ-nufKn274Fm-Mws7MqskraZd48jrZWXYvVkNMMG_UZDaMMOJHpCNaSvcJJTA==&c=nz45QiUBpDRnth57gTSTr_PSBParCGDLqIGEFaBIAD2ARygB0KV4Fw==&ch=aNwZ1CadLfwowInpC7GtAzXWhR_4Vmth4aj4Mp0rucTyby4ZeRtxNQ==)

name: Barack Obama
subject: Our mission is being tested like never before
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We’re undergoing the biggest challenges we’ve seen yet in our fight for a fair democracy.
---

Peter,
I’m writing to you at a moment when one of our most cherished and fundamental rights — the right to vote — is under attack.
Right now, politicians in several states are trying to gerrymander their congressional maps to unfairly help their party hold onto power in the House of Representatives after the midterms. It’s a desperate, cynical move — and it’s not how democracy is supposed to work.
**In our democracy, politicians shouldn’t get to pick their voters. The people should decide who represents them. **
Since this power grab began, thousands of Americans like you have taken action to stop it. But despite this massive public outcry, extreme politicians in states like Florida and Kansas are doubling down, all in an effort to avoid accountability from voters.
**Attorney General Eric Holder and I started this organization to build a fairer democracy — _and that mission will be tested like never before in the coming months_. Now is not the time to hesitate. Each of us needs to roll up our sleeves and fight for what we believe in. Look, I’ve run my share of campaigns. I’ve won some, and I’ve lost some. But at the end of the day, I listened to the will of the voters. Because that’s how our democracy is supposed to work. And that shouldn’t be controversial.
Now some lawmakers are making excuses for why they’re choosing to redraw their maps right before a critical midterm election. But the truth is pretty straightforward: They know deep down that their policies aren’t popular so they’re trying to tilt the playing field in their favor.
Here’s the good news: Americans across this country just like you are saying enough is enough.
You’ve shown up at state legislatures. You’ve talked to your neighbors. You’ve reached out directly to lawmakers. You’ve volunteered, organized, and chipped in when you can because you understand that this is an existential threat to our representative democracy.

clean_body: We’re undergoing the biggest challenges we’ve seen yet in our fight for a fair democracy. Peter, I’m writing to you at a moment when one of our most cherished and fundamental rights — the right to vote — is under attack. Right now, politicians in several states are trying to gerrymander their congressional maps to unfairly help their party hold onto power in the House of Representatives after the midterms. It’s a desperate, cynical move — and it’s not how democracy is supposed to work. In our democracy, politicians shouldn’t get to pick their voters. The people should decide who represents them. Since this power grab began, thousands of Americans like you have taken action to stop it. But despite this massive public outcry, extreme politicians in states like Florida and Kansas are doubling down, all in an effort to avoid accountability from voters. Attorney General Eric Holder and I started this organization to build a fairer democracy — and that mission will be tested like never before in the coming months. Now is not the time to hesitate. Each of us needs to roll up our sleeves and fight for what we believe in. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Look, I’ve run my share of campaigns. I’ve won some, and I’ve lost some. But at the end of the day, I listened to the will of the voters. Because that’s how our democracy is supposed to work. And that shouldn’t be controversial. Now some lawmakers are making excuses for why they’re choosing to redraw their maps right before a critical midterm election. But the truth is pretty straightforward: They know deep down that their policies aren’t popular so they’re trying to tilt the playing field in their favor. Here’s the good news: Americans across this country just like you are saying enough is enough. You’ve shown up at state legislatures. You’ve talked to your neighbors. You’ve reached out directly to lawmakers. You’ve volunteered, organized, and chipped in when you can because you understand that this is an existential threat to our representative democracy. But right now, we’re facing the biggest challenges yet in our fight for fairness.= Thank you for all you do for our democracy. It truly matters. Barack Obama Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from Redistricting Action by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. body:
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251227-360&t=1&akid=360%2E34582%2EAKSccI)
Peter, Elon Musk is attacking me (again).
I try not to give MAGA billionaires too much attention, but I need to share this with you.
**Late last night, Elon Musk attacked me on Twitter by name.**
I’m not going to let a weird, deranged billionaire distract me from what really matters — making life in Minnesota better — but I need your help. Elon has spent millions of dollars trying to buy past elections, and now it seems he may have his eyes set on Minnesota.
We need to be ready for whatever he throws our way — and the only way we can fight back is with grassroots supporters like you stepping up right now.
**[Will you chip in today to help us respond, organize, and keep Minnesota moving forward before our end-of-year deadline?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251227_3.VtGwTC&amount=5&refcode=em20251227-360&t=2&akid=360%2E34582%2EAKSccI) **This is our only public deadline of the year, so it’s crucial we post strong numbers so Elon Musk and Donald Trump can see the power of this campaign.
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251227_3.VtGwTC&amount=5&refcode=20251227-360&t=21&akid=360%2E34582%2EAKSccI)**
I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished together. Minnesota isn’t for sale, and I’m not backing down.
Thanks for having my back,
Tim

name: Deb Haaland
subject: 2025 year in review
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
Looking back at what we've accomplished together this year

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
---
Hi, friend, it's Deb. One of my favorite parts of running for governor is meeting New Mexicans across the state — we all care about our families and communities and have big hopes for the future.
Since we launched this campaign, folks have welcomed me into their living rooms. I’ve sat with them around their dinner tables, and joined community gatherings. I've heard their stories, their worries, and their ideas for the future. Hearing from folks has made it clear that together we can take on the challenges ahead and build the state our communities deserve.
**As we wrap up 2025 and begin 2026, I want to reflect and take a moment to share some of my favorite memories from the campaign trail with you.** Before I do, I want to say this: None of this happens without you. Your support has made it possible for me to visit all 33 counties — and in 2026, we’re going to build on that momentum.
**[That’s why, friend, I’m asking you to chip in $5 to keep this campaign moving forward. With the GOP ready to spend anything to take over New Mexico, I’m relying on the support of this grassroots team.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3206?t=2&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)**
| | [Donate Now >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3207?t=3&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
---
|
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3207?t=4&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
In February, I kicked off my campaign with thousands of supporters across New Mexico. From the start, this movement has always been bigger than me. It's about the belief that leaders should make people's lives easier, not harder. We're fighting for safer communities, better education, affordable food, healthcare, and utilities, and a brighter future for all New Mexicans.
|
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3207?t=5&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
In June, I was honored to march with love and purpose as Grand Marshall of the Santa Fe Pride Parade! As the next governor of New Mexico, I will fight fiercely to defend the dignity, rights, and safety of every LGBTQ+ person in our state – in every classroom, courtroom, and public space.
|
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3207?t=6&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
Over the summer, I joined many Pueblos for their feast days, fairs, and parades. As a 35th-generation New Mexican and a proud member of Laguna Pueblo, I am both of and for New Mexico, and I will always fight to ensure your traditions are protected and honored.
|
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3207?t=7&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
In September, I joined families in Española for a fentanyl awareness walk. This terrible drug has taken so many loved ones and causes so much crime. My own journey to sobriety taught me that we must face hard truths if we want to make change, which is why I’ll never walk away from the toughest challenges that face New Mexico.
High prices, homelessness, crime, and addiction weigh heavily on our state, and too many families are being left behind. As governor, I will tackle these challenges head-on by strengthening addiction services, expanding access to affordable housing, and giving communities the support they need to live safe and healthy lives.
|
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3207?t=8&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
Late September, I stood on the picket line with Creamland Dairy workers and unions who were striking for fair pay and benefits. As a former Teamster myself, I know what it's like to stand up to powerful corporations, and I believe no worker should have to do it alone. When I'm governor, New Mexico workers will always have a champion in their corner.
|
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3207?t=9&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
This month, I toured Central New Mexico Community College’s Trades and Technologies Center, where I was briefed on workforce training programs. Our state is full of bright minds, and the path to success does not need to look the same for everyone. As prices rise, New Mexicans need access to high-paying jobs, and we must give students the opportunity to explore career pathways that can get them there, whether through college or the trades.
As governor, I plan to establish career pathways programs that give students these options even earlier, bringing job training into middle and high schools to keep students engaged, address workforce shortages, and help New Mexicans pursue careers that allow them to provide for their families.
|
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3207?t=10&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
In recent weeks, I've been gathering with New Mexicans across the state to celebrate the holidays. From baking biscochitos to lighting luminaries, this is a season filled with tradition, warmth, and family.
|
---
This year of hard work, action, and community leaves me incredibly grateful, hopeful, and determined to fight for the bright future New Mexico deserves – but I can’t accomplish it alone. Every step of my journey has been possible because people like you believed in me, friend. Thank you for being a part of it and making it all possible!

And the momentum isn’t stopping here: 2026 is right around the corner.
**[If you're feeling inspired and ready to join this fight, please consider investing $5 – or anything at all – in my campaign today to help us reach our $50,000 goal before the end of the year. Your donation today will help us start 2026 off with the resources we need.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3206?t=11&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)**
Be fierce – and thank you,
🩵 Deb
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3208?t=12&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?t=13&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=14&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=15&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=16&akid=6505%2E400544%2EWj-JWZ)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com
**PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**

Our numbers will go public in January for _everyone_ to see. A strong showing proves we have the grassroots strength to defend this seat. A weak showing gives Republicans the opening they need to flood CA-25 with attack ads. While Donald Trump and his Republican cronies normalize corruption and political favors for profit, we need leaders who will fight for working families. name: Jena Griswold
subject: Why this matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251227-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251227-email]
Hi Peter,
As we head into the final days of the year, I’ve been thinking about why this campaign matters so deeply — for our rights, our communities, and Colorado’s future.
In January, I’ll kick off a statewide Listening Tour to hear directly from Coloradans about the challenges you’re facing – from protecting democratic rights to strengthening public safety, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government works for everyone.
But to hit the road, organize these events, and reach communities across Colorado, we need to close out December strong.

Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude.** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=9660d82daad2533372f63e8e1fbafdf046278c203ab73c48782e0175a613991d200a4843465d8abbd71dba6b30b88b465ea2060e8158246312cb1809e93277c8) **_Rory H._**_
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. name: Ron Wyden
subject: I’ll say it again: Pete Hegseth must go
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122077139/591503177/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTg2MWM3Zi01M2UzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wn-QNnDN2RWFYyKtPTxYje9FIgAFMrrpniWxcC2cLoE=&emci=f04af65e-80df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=45861c7f-53e3-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=9818364)
---

| | I called for Pete Hegseth's resignation in the spring, when we first learned he conducted operational planning on an unsecured Signal chat. **As the year closes, and as Hegseth's reckless leadership continues to put our nation on a dangerous path, I reiterate that call.** A recent inspector general report on "Signal-gate" (from Hegseth's own Pentagon!) exposed just how severely he mishandled classified information. It noted how easily the information could have leaked out and directly endangered the lives of our service members. I'm equally alarmed by the _policies_ Hegseth's pursued as Defense Secretary – especially the illegal strikes he's ordered against noncombatant boats in international waters. Hegseth publicly cheers as we've now killed dozens. **It doesn't matter what he and the Trump administration "suspect" about these boats. The authority to wage war rests with Congress – and we haven't authorized any of this.** Now, Hegseth has stood behind Trump's escalating rhetoric about potentially _invading Venezuela_. **I stood against an illegal and unprovoked war with Iraq more than 20 years ago, and I will do the same with Venezuela today.** We desperately need accountability from all in the Trump administration who've set us on this reckless course. And the first step is to call out grossly incompetent and dangerous actors like Pete Hegseth. More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

## The greatest people stand alone.
These are the individuals made from enough marble strength to face the crowd instead of being an anonymous name within it. The people so resolute in their beliefs that they will defy what is common, easy, or quiet, for the boldness of living a life in truth.
They are the ones who, when the day relinquishes to night, rest easy, comforted by their authenticity, and ability to resist their opposers.
They are the greatest among us, and they carry us all.
Meet Charrise Lane.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9c1f242e-5b72-4352-a560-1adee987ad74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
via @Charriselane Instagram
This month, she graduates from The Florida Agricultural and Mechanical University in Tallahassee, Florida, with degrees in Public Relations and a Political Science minor and with the end goal of working in Washington as a policy maker, determining the future of the United States.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5b938298-b878-4b55-889e-c3e273a65500?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
@CharriseJLane X account
Charrise is a self-described conservative and "moderate Republican" who is "dedicated to the **[betterment and advancement of the Black community,](https://substack.com/redirect/2bc970aa-d73a-45fb-ba76-bb4e528019bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** " and has spent years as a political influencer speaking out about COVID-19 vaccinations on TMZ, political voting for Black Americans on FOX News, the **[disproportionate benefits of so-called DEI efforts](https://substack.com/redirect/3fbfe1c8-4f43-4a8c-b1b9-424ce08d6a03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , and sharing other conservative opinions across her social channels.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d9d744f6-6f0c-4353-a76d-629bd4f466ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
She has also worked for both Congressman Byron Donalds and Joel Crawford.
Throughout every experience on the Hill, viral political posts, and features as a commentator, Charrise has remained absolutely steadfast in her views - a necessity in the modern age, where conservatism, and specifically conservatism for Black Americans, often receives scorn from some members within those communities.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..pySRoKp9WpoOXqLZFILBIkFHJwikrpD-c8OTsSt5bwI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=181370943)
According to a 2024 **[Pew Research Center report](https://substack.com/redirect/1a3d3e62-6762-45fe-834c-fe34f2d084ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on American voting demographics, 83% of Black voters are Democrats or lean left. For Charrise, who is not only in the minority of that statistic, but studying at a historically Black community where **[7 out of 10](https://substack.com/redirect/e6d0a0d6-90d3-4def-a5dd-3700c19537a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** students are left-leaning, she feels like an 'anomaly' ten-fold. Once, she even tried carving out her own corner by advocating for a **[College Republicans chapter](https://substack.com/redirect/3db964f1-2b75-4463-a81d-50ee1f2d64d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on her campus, but with no professor willing to advise it, had to acquiesce.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with Health Science Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/175e15c8-ab03-46b7-89b3-b9bd0fd41483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[MAHA M.D. proves the"PLANDEMIC" is REAL](https://substack.com/redirect/175e15c8-ab03-46b7-89b3-b9bd0fd41483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cb587a01-2f94-4745-933f-63acea1b34a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear truth-seeking American,
This MAHA doctor's **[viral video](https://substack.com/redirect/175e15c8-ab03-46b7-89b3-b9bd0fd41483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** not only confirms the COVID pandemic was built on lies...
But he's holding undeniable proof the next "PLANDEMIC" is starting now.
Before it comes for your family **[SEE HIS MESSAGE HERE.](https://substack.com/redirect/175e15c8-ab03-46b7-89b3-b9bd0fd41483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
P.S. The new "Plandemic" will kill 600,000 mostly older Americans in 2026. **[View the 2 signs of disease- and how to protect yourself here.](https://substack.com/redirect/175e15c8-ab03-46b7-89b3-b9bd0fd41483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/175e15c8-ab03-46b7-89b3-b9bd0fd41483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
"Its been hard, very, very challenging being a student at that school because - my gosh - sometimes you can hear a pin drop when we're talking about politics in class. Everybody knows my political opinions."
A sense of awkwardness, fear, and discomfort exist in any situation where a person is the only one in a room with a particular viewpoint, but add in the venom of everyday political vitriol, and standing alone takes on another meaning entirely.
"I'm really...always by myself," Charrise said, reflecting on her path both at school and in the greater public eye, where she has been called a **["black supremacist"](https://substack.com/redirect/3db964f1-2b75-4463-a81d-50ee1f2d64d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by conservatives and "Uncle Tom" by liberals. "I'm used to it though. You have to learn how to be alone sometimes in this world..."
"I'm not going to wait for anybody to do anything."
Faced with friction on both sides, Charrise carves her own identity in multiple ways, first and foremost refusing the narrative that because she has conservative values, she somehow isn't an advocate for the Black community, or a part of it.
"Just because I'm Republican and a conservative does not mean that I don't want to be around my people."
In fact, she even argues that many Black Americans are **["historically conservative"](https://substack.com/redirect/522e8f43-bc55-45af-92f9-d42563cd3ddb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** based on the context of values, which is how she ultimately came to the conclusion that she aligned more with conservative politics.
However, that does not change the fact that Charrise's life has been defined by defying other people's scrutiny - from both sides.
"Sometimes they [certain Republican politicians] do make it hard for people like me, the position that I'm in. They make it hard for us to prove why we're on this side."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..pySRoKp9WpoOXqLZFILBIkFHJwikrpD-c8OTsSt5bwI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=181370943)
"The school that I go to, people - every time something happens with the Republican side - they're always looking to me. I can't explain what they do all the time. I'm me. I have my views. I'm not going to sway just because a politician is saying something that is out of line, because they do it on the Democrat side as well. But again... definitely need to work on that on both sides."
That ability to see areas of improvement for both her own party and her opposer is Charisse's way of expressing what it means to be an American - to be a free thinker: "It's not realistic to just be so on one side. No one is perfect, not even a political party."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3d50d041-4d40-4887-8d10-26926b67a822?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Via @Charisselane Instagram
Yet, even with this logical approach, Charrise still deals with mass levels of depredation both online, in the classroom, and in the world at large for expressing her beliefs. To cope, she has had to learn how to block out the noise.
"At the end of the day, people online are not paying my bills. They're not affecting my life in any way. So why should I care what they think?"
A question many of us ask ourselves, when faced with a situation where someone criticizes or condemns us for one thing or another, and one that isn't always easy to answer -- relinquishing care for others' opinions can often be a wearisome undertaking.
"I've faced a lot and I've seen a lot -more than the average 26 year old has faced and seen..."
"...but God has definitely been with me through it all."
Raised in a Christian household, Charrise has always relied on her faith, now speaking "to God every day" for guidance as the world gets louder every day....
And God, Charrise said, is guiding her to Washington.
As Charrise takes her next step in being a policy-maker, she bears witness to a changing landscape, with "a lot of younger people are more excited to be involved in politics...People that you wouldn't even think of trying to get involved," which is both invigorating and a testament to the unfolding culture shift of America. Especially, as Charisse sees it, with so much work still to be done in how the conservative party continues to evolve to include the Black community even more.
"The Republican party definitely needs to work on their messaging a little bit when it comes to attracting young people, women, people that look like me...stick to the policies. That's all you need to do."
Two sides, two worlds, and one Charrise: An advocate for her values, opinion, and _**Her America**_.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..pySRoKp9WpoOXqLZFILBIkFHJwikrpD-c8OTsSt5bwI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=181370943)
Despite the noise from the outside opposition, Charrise is ensconced in deep quiet - when there is great responsibility, the fight to the mountain top becomes an isolating trek.
"You know that you're different. You know that you don't necessarily belong in the crowd - that you're meant for something greater. That's how I've always felt."
Charrise Lane, standing true, knows every moment is worth the fight.
#### _" All I know is there are trials...big trials before victory."_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3ff9a59d-900e-4914-8c92-4b9f49c298ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Our end-of-year fundraising deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends, here’s the deal: We set a goal of raising $250,000 for our year-end fundraising drive, and we’re falling slightly behind. Can you help us catch up?
[**Gabby is asking you to join the fight to end gun violence. Be one of the grassroots donors we need from Cresco to help reach our goal — donate to GIFFORDS PAC now >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251227-1A-b&t=1&akid=11131%2E3935704%2E2LZbSJ)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251227-1A-b&t=2&akid=11131%2E3935704%2E2LZbSJ)**
With so much in the news right now, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why we’re reaching out.
We are facing our final deadline of the year in just four days. This December 31st deadline is a very big deal.
After our deadline ends, our fundraising numbers will be public for everybody to see. That includes the amount we raised this year and how many donors have given to our movement.
_This is one of the few times when our fundraising numbers will be public._
Donald Trump and his allies in the gun lobby will be looking at our numbers closely. If they sense any slowdown in our momentum, they won’t hesitate to pummel our candidates in attacks.
Unlike the NRA, we rely on grassroots supporters like you to power our fight for gun safety — with an average donation of just $22 this year. But with Republicans preparing to go on the offense and ram through a nationwide concealed carry mandate through the House, we need to stand united.
[**We’re setting a goal of raising $250,000 before our December 31st deadline. Make a donation to help GIFFORDS PAC fight back against the gun lobby’s grip on our politics >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251227-1A-b&t=3&akid=11131%2E3935704%2E2LZbSJ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&amount=3&refcode=em251227-1A-b&t=22&akid=11131%2E3935704%2E2LZbSJ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-q42025.XBpxZs&refcode=em251227-1A-b&t=23&akid=11131%2E3935704%2E2LZbSJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q42025.bzPEeG&refcode=em251227-1A-b&t=24&akid=11131%2E3935704%2E2LZbSJ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q42025.BnaACt&refcode=em251227-1A-b&t=25&akid=11131%2E3935704%2E2LZbSJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-q42025.3xF0Vo&refcode=em251227-1A-b&t=26&akid=11131%2E3935704%2E2LZbSJ)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&refcode=em251227-1A-b&t=27&akid=11131%2E3935704%2E2LZbSJ)**
---
****
Thank you!
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=11131%2E3935704%2E2LZbSJ) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: NRSC HQ
subject: Verification Needed for 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
#################################

Friend,

**[BIG NEWS:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7pehhp2uc3r8ljrfor2not6vge9k847baf0gi1g_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c3jm9p34cjh2bs) **Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But here's the thing...

_We can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we 'll lose to the Democrats._

body:
| | | Peter, 2025 was a historic year for our movement. Nationally, our membership grew to record-highs, which helped us elect working class champions like Adelita Grijalva in Arizona, Katie Wilson in Seattle, Shenise Turner-Sloss in Dayton, and more. **And in New York specifically, we helped topple a political dynasty by electing Zohran Mamdani, along with WFP mayors in Albany, Buffalo, and Syracuse.** Electing new leaders was the first step, not the last. Now we have to help them govern and deliver on the affordability agenda and improve the lives of working families. In addition, we have more elections to take on in 2026 to keep building power — from congress to the state house. **But a strong WFP requires resources to continue to wage big fights. _But MAGA Republicans don’t care AT ALL about us, they only care about lining the pockets of billionaires like Trump himself!_

[This is an emergency for Social Security, friend — WE NEED YOU TO STEP UP! If you care at ALL about saving Social Security, rush $7 IMMEDIATELY to fight back! The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22296%2E878179%2EColJqr). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22296%2E878179%2EColJqr).**

body:

Peter — Donald Trump recently rated his economy an A+++++, **but we know that’s not the reality for Wisconsinites.** Not for the dairy and soybean farmers who are losing money and struggling to keep their family farms open and running thanks to Trump’s reckless tariffs. Not for the over 300,000 Wisconsinites who will see their healthcare premiums SKYROCKET thanks to Trump and Republicans’ agenda to destroy affordable healthcare. Not for the working families who are paying exorbitant amounts for childcare. And not for the millions of people who are stretching their dollars just to be able to afford their rent. **Donald Trump and his billionaire buddies have NO IDEA of the struggles working families are facing. That’s why we need to flip the Senate majority next year.
