clean_body: And we might as well DEPORT every single Islamist | Peter, Radical Islam is OUT OF HAND in America. It 's time we finally got serious about this. There's nothing about their culture that coincides with American culture, and they've been doing everything they can to replace the Red, White, and Blue with Islamic extremism. And Americans across the country have been fooled into believing that a culture that puts men over women, chants "Death to America," and works directly with American adversaries can somehow intertwine with Leftist politics. Just look at New York City. The same city that vowed to "Never Forget" after 9/11 has just elected a Radical Islamic to be its mayor. If we don 't do something about it soon, we'll turn into the United States of Arabia. The FIRST step is to BAN SHARIA LAW and RADICAL ISLAM throughout America. The SECOND step is to CLOSE OUR BORDERS to third-world countries and Radical Islamic countries. The THIRD step is to DEPORT every single Islamist who is living among our communities, waiting to attack and bring "Death to America." But to no one 's surprise, this is going to be a tougher battle than winning the Iron Bowl. Democrats just see these Islamic Radicals as Blue Votes in November, they'll go down fighting to protect them. | Thank you, Coach Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? | | **The First Human Worker Just Got Replaced on Video**

---
| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

[Click here before Wall Street wakes up >>](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=4ea65c5f5f8f44979161d3142413ded1&_e=XyjCDHLZlDEQYBhkknb4W25b3vMbgjhGKuACjekR7MA_G02NYGw3h1ez8UiFuoYF89rrVC4hoTcpYZR4Px5b5EOaZp7NmyXBgOyU2PGztoFKlXspbIfSRsvXHPpGwWiUMn2VlhM1Nfh-Czbm8_hxp4bSMyCM8TA8bK-8Z8d7tNBUDD3HPsiDJ6UuSUNc-NydRvs8Ac5baXDbtOIyHbrW7RG-WkpHF7rI0Z4mAPSb_8WvS3eg8IS41FXj5l6vUcAV1WBfqJeMFOskYOcweV8Fah0hP5kOnSRBQZl2ceI9mXBiZCcb2YfXc4kv41pV4PUaov6ct8RQTZTxlDT5bW5YqLsp9OYDqCVNVAIcF7AVZ-FwDlTr6MkvAFvZFCLN_rgXvjLGFB534UKbmjkxw8NCs5qbZp1nUhspa_wiIEJb3w0SvlC5W4n9cZ3gTqV9a44xvrGQpDKPubCmlzGwq8SmALC2GSoAG5xBGfJpsr5fbocWVDUk73NE_yJKBt-DjosOEJP9rCQuOkCQ1lJmlPzNzRlmFSWMW4GHh987ySQPAEM4UCcV_p0S_ssETvbspE5Ap5c-qB20Oq1-UOJxrG8v9Q%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: They’re coming for everything you don’t want to do.| | | | December 27 | | | | | The First Human Worker Just Got Replaced on Video | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. This isn’t a prototype. It’s a takeover — and it’s already begun. Jeff Brown just revealed the name. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. #

It’s Jon.
You see it, right? What’s happening to America.
Maybe you’re angry. Maybe you’re exhausted. Maybe it feels like every headline about Trump and his allies in Congress, from rising health care premiums for millions of Americans to all the blatant cronyism, just takes more out of you.
But here’s the thing: you’re paying attention when most people aren’t.
Attention matters.
That’s why my team in Georgia is getting ready to engage millions of voters about what’s at stake in this election, and what it will take to keep this Senate seat out of Trump and MAGA’s grubby hands.
And it’s why, with my final FEC fundraising deadline of 2025 just days away, I’m asking for your help to make sure my team has the resources to do that work.

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: We need universal childcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
We’re going to invest in Wisconsin’s future
| Hi friend, if we’re not investing in our families, we’re failing them. I wanted to share with you about one of the most pressing issues families all across our state are facing: the cost of childcare. Just two weeks ago I visited a childcare center in Waunakee and made my position loud and clear that **we need universal childcare in Wisconsin.** **[If you agree, will you chip in $15 or $27 before our end-of-year deadline?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_122725_B1_Childcare&t=2&akid=5746%2E196590%2EuAXtLW)** With the average cost of childcare at $13,000 per year, Republican leadership in our legislature has failed working families by refusing to address this urgent issue. **We need to do more.** Supporting universal childcare and increased training for childcare workers is investing in Wisconsin’s future, supporting families, and growing the economy. **As Governor, I’ll be ready to step up to the challenge.** Next year, we have the chance to build a Democratic trifecta for the first time in a decade — and deliver on the bold vision our campaign is calling for. But the truth is, I can only do this with the help of grassroots supporters across Wisconsin. Our campaign’s first public fundraising deadline is at the end of this year, **[and contributing whatever makes sense for you will ensure we can keep up our strength in 2026: can I count on you today?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-dec25.SSbw4W&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_122725_B1_Childcare&t=3&akid=5746%2E196590%2EuAXtLW)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6574?amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_122725_B1_Childcare&t=4&akid=5746%2E196590%2EuAXtLW)

That report shows exactly how much money we’ve raised, how many donors we have, and whether our momentum is growing or slowing. And once it’s filed, _it’s public_. Donald Trump might not personally be a big reader, but you better believe that his top cronies will download our report _the minute_ it’s posted and go through it line by line. These Republican operatives will compare it to past reports and see whether we have the resources to flip seats here in California — or if they have an opening to stop us. This is the first public filing deadline since Proposition 50 passed, so it’s a key moment for Republicans to see whether our grassroots momentum is enduring or fading. **If our numbers look strong, it sends a clear signal** : California Democrats are energized, organized, and ready to flip the U.S. House. If they look weak, Republicans will see an opening — and flood our state with dark money, attack ads, and outside operatives. Right now, we’re **$13,290.67** short of where we need to be to send the right message before the deadline. **This is one of those key moments where the numbers on paper really do shape what comes next.** **[We have just a few days left to finish strong and show (on the public record) that California Democrats are not slowing down after Prop 50. clean_body: Republicans will read this report line by line | = | Hi everyone, We want to take a moment to explain why the December 31 FEC deadline is such a big deal — and why we still need to raise another $13,290.67 before then. = = Here’s how this works: Every three months, political entities like the California Democratic Party are required by law to file a detailed report with the Federal Election Commission. That report shows exactly how much money we’ve raised, how many donors we have, and whether our momentum is growing or slowing. And once it’s filed, it’s public. Donald Trump might not personally be a big reader, but you better believe that his top cronies will download our report the minute it’s posted and go through it line by line. These Republican operatives will compare it to past reports and see whether we have the resources to flip seats here in California — or if they have an opening to stop us. This is the first public filing deadline since Proposition 50 passed, so it’s a key moment for Republicans to see whether our grassroots momentum is enduring or fading. If our numbers look strong, it sends a clear signal : California Democrats are energized, organized, and ready to flip the U.S. House. If they look weak, Republicans will see an opening — and flood our state with dark money, attack ads, and outside operatives. Right now, we’re $13,290.67 short of where we need to be to send the right message before the deadline. This is one of those key moments where the numbers on paper really do shape what comes next. = = = = = = \- CADEM HQ | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. I know this isn't the first email you'll receive asking you to donate before the end-of-quarter FEC deadline, and it’s probably not the last, but I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this particular deadline is so critical to our campaign. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122082035/591518979/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTMxZTlkMS02YWUzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iXLbpYt_G2zWAEcufE4jIJ5xSmWbUyW6LFwDh8Q_tKk=) Hi – it's Andrea Salinas. With just a few days left in 2025, I wanted to reach out personally to give you an update on the stakes of next year’s elections. In the last year, Trump and his MAGA majority fired thousands of essential workers. They sent the National Guard into Oregon to terrorize our community, and threatened to cut food assistance for Oregon families. They launched us into the longest government shutdown in American history and passed a reckless budget plan that threatens access to healthcare for millions of American families. [**Meanwhile, I have been working around the clock on behalf of the people I have the privilege of representing — to ensure that no matter what reckless attack Republicans throw our way, your voice is still heard.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122082037/591518983/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_122725_personal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTMxZTlkMS02YWUzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iXLbpYt_G2zWAEcufE4jIJ5xSmWbUyW6LFwDh8Q_tKk=) _I will ALWAYS fight for you_. I’m going to fight for a fair and prosperous economy. I’m going to fight for our democracy. I’m going to fight for the rule of law. I’m going to fight for a government that doesn’t steal from working families to give massive breaks to billionaires. But, Republicans are raising millions of dollars to target Democrats like me, and keep the House in MAGA hands — and news just broke that Elon Musk is gearing up to buy the GOP even _more_ seats next cycle. Yes. He's back. If we’re going to defend OR-06 next year, flip the House blue, and stop the destruction of the Republican agenda — I’m going to need all the support I can get. [_**So I am humbly asking for your support, because the only way we can win this is if we stand together. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I can’t do this alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
Normally when I write to you via email, I like them to be different from the other messages you get from most elected officials.
Normally when you see my name in your inbox, I like the messages to be different from the other emails you get from most elected officials.
I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, along with other things I am seeing or working on in Washington, D.C. and at home in Georgia.
This message is different. It's more direct.
I am reaching out today with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our end-of-year fundraising drive comes to a close. Here's why:
This race will be one of the most competitive and expensive in the nation. I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024 and that makes me MAGA’s #1 target.
In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.
Now we must win again. And we will win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Powered by People today before our end-of-year fundraising drive comes to a close.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251227-2-split.6scrmc&refcode=ema20251227-240559&t=2&akid=240559%2E444211%2ED7s3Wj)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251227-2-split.6scrmc&refcode=ema20251227-240559&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=240559%2E444211%2ED7s3Wj)**
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can before our deadline. [**Please, contribute today.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251227-2-split.6scrmc&refcode=ema20251227-240559&t=22&akid=240559%2E444211%2ED7s3Wj)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251227-2-split.6scrmc&refcode=ema20251227-240559&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=240559%2E444211%2ED7s3Wj)**
Thank you,
Jon Ossoff

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: This is how we send a message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
I’m doing something extraordinary to close strong.
| | | | Peter,
I want to be very clear with you, I’ve never done this before.
Because what’s at stake right now is too important.
Democrats are watching our end-of-year fundraising numbers closely, and they will use them to decide where to attack, where to spend, and which races they think they can flip. That’s why I’m taking an extraordinary step.
**[Every donation made before midnight today will have a 250% impact.](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**
I’m offering this because this moment matters. With the House Majority on the line and Democrats already circling this race, we need to post a strong end-of-year number — not just for momentum, but to send a clear signal that we are ready to fight and win.
This 250% impact boost will allow us to:
* Expand voter outreach immediately
* Counter Democrat attacks before they define the race
* Enter the new year on offense, not defense

I wouldn’t be doing this if it weren’t critical.
This race is one of the most competitive in the country, and Democrats are looking for any sign of weakness. Weak numbers invite attacks. Strong numbers force them to think twice.
**That’s why I’m asking you to step up right now.**
If you can, please chip in **[$5 before midnight today](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)** and take advantage of this 250% impact opportunity.
**[Donate RIGHT NOW and your gift will go 250% further.](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**
Let’s send a message before the year ends that Democrats can’t ignore.
Thank you for standing with me when it matters most.
---
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
**Brett Lindstrom** **Republican Candidate for NE-02**

clean_body: We can't take our foot off the gas. Peter: There are only five days before the New Year, and we know people are busy making last-minute holiday plans. = If you're ready, you can make a donation now! But if you'd like a little more information on why your help is crucial, check out these facts you need to know about the race in WA-08: 1. Kim is the first Democrat ever to represent WA-08. 2. She already has three—yes, three!—Republican opponents who are hoping to flip this seat back to red. 3. And just last quarter, the NRCC flipped a 10-year fundraising trend, raising more in year-to-date fundraising than their Democratic counterparts. In a district as sought after by the GOP as Kim's, we can't take our foot off the gas. That's why we need this grassroots team on our side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- –Schrier HQ Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

clean_body: It’s been a while since I heard from you. | | | | From Trump: You’ve got me worried I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me. I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you. Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW... But I know you haven’t abandoned me. I’m reaching out because YOUR NAME is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you. I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you... Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you. I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever. THANK YOU. \- President Donald J. Trump | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:

"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to

"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag,

service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival
food I have found, and the company is great."_

_GARY M.
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into
my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to
prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am
going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone
should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_

_JOHN H.
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of
a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been
hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have
our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but

body:
|

Peter,

As we head into the final two days of the year, we wanted to share a quick update on where things stand.

**First, the good news.**

This campaign has built real momentum over the past year. George flipped a Republican-held seat, got to work in Congress delivering for CA-27, and is heading into the midterm year with a strong grassroots base behind him. Even with major changes to the district after Proposition 50, our team has been preparing early to reach new voters and keep this seat blue.

**Now for the bad news.**

That momentum has put a target on George’s back. National Republicans are already zeroing in on CA-27 with outside spending and attacks. With the House majority once again up for grabs, competitive districts like ours will be at the center of the fight.

**Here’s the bottom line.**

**[We are just days away from our final FEC deadline of the year. What we report on December 31 will be a clear signal of this campaign’s strength heading into the new year, and we cannot afford to fall short. If you’re able, will you chip in $3 before the deadline to help us finish the year strong and keep CA-27 blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122082649/591521102/148511826?refcode=em-12.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWVjZDc5OS02ZmUzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KUw5WVNDls3NGPSxEfPlJL0BVX3Cr9cQpuLbTNyg7Yo=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, As we head into the final two days of the year, we wanted to share a quick update on where things stand. First, the good news. This campaign has built real momentum over the past year. George flipped a Republican-held seat, got to work in Congress delivering for CA-27, and is heading into the midterm year with a strong grassroots base behind him. Even with major changes to the district after Proposition 50, our team has been preparing early to reach new voters and keep this seat blue. Now for the bad news. That momentum has put a target on George’s back. National Republicans are already zeroing in on CA-27 with outside spending and attacks. With the House majority once again up for grabs, competitive districts like ours will be at the center of the fight. Here’s the bottom line. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Team Whitesides | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. We've got to let you know, Team, that **a bill that would give President Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes** passed in the U.S. House of Representatives last Congress and is sure to come up again. The bill, last known as H.R. 9495, would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. **The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons. ** “ _Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in_ ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ _A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will_.” “ _A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional_ ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin. Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House once and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress now that opponents of voting rights have total control of our government. **That's why we need to start working now** to prevent this bill from ever becoming law. **[Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122082728/591521355/1498593520?refcode=122725_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2OGYwMGI0LTZmZTMtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ukVNvLH58PYFqvnpMEQVhFCcj12g1YJOGm11eBhvNKw=)**

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: Let us make our case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
We know your inbox is likely full of requests from campaigns and causes asking for your support. Will you please give us a chance to make the case for why James Talarico needs your support?
This FEC deadline is uniquely important for our campaign because it will be our first full fundraising quarter since James launched this campaign for U.S. Senate.
First, we outraised the entire field in the first three weeks of the campaign. Now, all eyes are going to be on our movement to see if we’ve been able to maintain that momentum and put Texas in play for Democrats.
December 31st is also the first official deadline since our race changed and got significantly more expensive when Jasmine Crockett joined the field. National Republicans and corporate media pundits tried to write James and this movement off immediately.
So this is our chance to prove to the world that our movement has the resources to compete with all of the corporate cash flooding in for all of our opponents. Their war chests are no match for what we can accomplish with a true people-powered campaign.
Look, there’s almost no chance you woke up saying, “I’m going to donate to James Talarico’s U.S. Senate campaign today.” But that’s what he needs you to do if you can.
**[Can James count on you to contribute any amount you can afford ahead of our official FEC deadline? After we close the books in 4 days, we’ll share our numbers publicly. Your donation now will send a powerful message when that happens.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251227-1-ak&t=1&akid=347%2E1347274%2EB4dzX-)**

I hope this note finds you well. As 2025 comes to a close, I wanted to personally thank you for everything you've done to support the principles we all believe in: **limited government, fiscal responsibility, secure borders, and the rule of law.** Right now, **Chip Roy, Scott Perry, Andy Biggs, and the rest of the House Freedom Caucus** are the strongest voices in Congress standing against _runaway spending, open-border policies, and the weaponization of federal agencies._ _The Freedom Caucus Foundation_ —our 501(c)(3) non-profit—exists to research, train and educate the public on a mass scale to _advance the understandings of freedom and liberty._ **_It's just the beginning and we won't rest until all Americans understand the work Freedom Caucus members are doing to save our nation from a woke socialist nightmare._** **We're trying to close a __$127,000__ gap in our year-end budget so we can hit the ground running in January with voter education programs, research, and advocacy tools.** **A small group of year-end donors just stepped up with an emergency triple-match that expires tonight at midnight.** That means:

**When Raja told me he wanted to run for Senate, I was 100% on board. I knew he was the right person for the job, especially for the moment our democracy is in right now. **
It's not an exaggeration to say that _every single day_ he goes to work, he's fighting for immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, federal workers, veterans, and hardworking Americans who are under attack by the Trump administration.
I know how hard he works when no one is watching and what keeps him up at night. That's what happens after 23 years of marriage!
_Raja is the hardest-working person I know.**But he's up against the most difficult race of his life. **_
Donald Trump and his gang of far-right bullies don’t want to see people like Raja succeed, let alone in the U.S. Senate.
I don’t need to tell you how important winning this race and flipping the Senate blue is. That’s why this final FEC fundraising deadline is so _critical. _
This could be the toughest and most expensive Senate race in Illinois history, and we’re going to need a lot of grassroots support to keep up with the MAGA billionaires and flip the Senate.
[**_So Peter, Raja needs all hands on deck to win this critical race – and that starts by hitting his FINAL FEC fundraising goal of this year. He needs to raise $150,000 by 11:59 PM on Wednesday. name: Jasmine Clark
subject: RE: the Trump Administration’s latest attack on healthcare workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=251227em-nurse-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=251227em-nurse-rs]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=251227em-nurse-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=251227em-nurse-rs]
As a professor at Emory’s nursing school, I’ve dedicated my career to training the next generation of nurses — the people who will care for us when we’re sick, deliver our babies, respond to emergencies, and literally save our lives.
So I was outraged when I saw the Trump Administration’s latest attack on healthcare workers:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=251227em-nurse-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=251227em-nurse-rs]
Trump’s Department of Education just reclassified nursing as not a professional degree — slashing federal loan access for advanced nursing degrees across the country.
Let me say that again: They are telling nurses—NURSES—that their work isn’t “professional” enough to deserve the same support as dentists, veterinarians, chiropractors, optometrists, and theologians.
But it’s not just about a title. The actual consequences will be devastating:
→ Graduate nursing students will lose access to the federal loans they need to become nurse practitioners, nurse anesthetists, midwives, and clinical specialists.
→ Nationwide nursing shortages will grow worse.
→ And patients — the people who rely on nurses the most — will pay the price.
This is a direct attack on the health care workforce. And it’s one more reminder why we need scientists, educators, and health care professionals IN Congress — not politicians who don’t understand (or don’t care about) the consequences of their actions.
I’m running for Congress because I’ve seen what happens when politicians who know nothing about medicine make decisions that endanger patients and disrespect the healthcare workers who keep this country running. But I can’t fight this fight alone. So please, will you donate $10, $25, or whatever you can to help me win this race and bring a fresh and needed perspective to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=251227em-nurse-rs]
DONATE NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=251227em-nurse-rs]
Thank you,
Dr. Jasmine Clark
Democratic Candidate for Georgia's 13th District
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=251227em-nurse-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Jasmine Clark for Georgia

Lilburn, GA 30048
United States

clean_body: Peter, Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate. But here's the thing... ... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025. We can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we 'll lose to the Democrats. Thank you, Voter Verification Questionnaire 2025 Polling Team ********** ** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Kirsten (via Off the Sidelines)
subject: There’s something you should know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
|
Allow me explain where this all began. For too long, I saw brilliant young leaders hesitate to run for office. I watched qualified, passionate women sit on the sidelines while men dominated our political landscape. I witnessed crucial voices go unheard in the rooms where decisions were made. **That's why I started Off the Sidelines.** I founded this organization because I believe our democracy is stronger when diverse voices have a seat at the table — and I'm not talking about just any seat. I'm talking about leadership positions. Since launching Off the Sidelines, we've helped elect Democrats up and down the ballot. But right now, our progress is under threat. With Republicans controlling the House and Senate, our hard-won gains on everything from health care to workers' rights are on the line. That's why I'm personally asking you, before the end of the year, to rush your very first donation to Off the Sidelines. We need to raise $50,000 before our critical public fundraising deadline on December 31st if we’re going to keep recruiting amazing Democrats, provide them with the resources they need to win and take back our majority. **_[Can I count on you to chip in right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122083268/591523512/-31663778?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.27_OTS-First-Time-Donor_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2UxZTFjZi03N2UzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=owGx7nUYMJQUyRP5u60VlshQpiN-1bxVbc_H0ZhZdMU=)_** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122083269/591523513/-31663778?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.27_OTS-First-Time-Donor_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2UxZTFjZi03N2UzLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=owGx7nUYMJQUyRP5u60VlshQpiN-1bxVbc_H0ZhZdMU=)

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: Your LCV year-end support: PENDING. Please open today
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMzNDQ1NzkS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjM2MDI4NjE1NAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTK_ We’re running out of time, Peter. Hundreds of people from around the country have stepped up today for Giving Tuesday, but we’re still running short of the 1,000 members we need to unlock an additional $100,000 for our work before midnight tonight. And with the Trump administration accelerating some of the most extreme anti-environment, pro-polluter attacks in modern history,falling short is simply not an option. We’re asking you, Peter: will you renew your LCV membership right now while membership is only $5 to help us unlock an additional $100,000 to oppose the Trump administration’s attempts to exploit our public lands and roll back climate progress? https://links.messages.lcv. This isn’t just about hitting a number. It’s about having the resources we need to challenge these increasingly reckless orders and attempts to shred environmental safeguards — and stop the polluter handouts that Trump and his allies are fast-tracking. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv. Every single person who steps up today is critical to our efforts — here’s why this Giving Tuesday is so important: Trump is trying to erase the scientific and legal foundation of climate action. By dismantling the Endangerment Finding, which affirms that greenhouse gas emissions harm our health and welfare, Trump’s EPA would hand fossil fuel companies a free pass to spew climate pollution into our air. He’s also ending the program that required big polluters to report their pollution, making it nearly impossible to track what they’re spewing or hold them accountable.
Decades of established pollution protections are being peeled away. More than a dozen rules that keep toxic pollution out of the air we breathe and water we drink to protect our health are on the chopping block, tossed aside to allow fossil fueled power plants to cut corners and shift the burden of their damage onto our communities.
The Trump administration is giving away the Arctic to corporate polluters, working to allow more drilling in one of the planet’s last intact ecosystems. Mining roads carved through national parks and preserves. Fire-sale auctions in critical ecosystems. Hundreds of millions of acres of U.S. waters off Alaska potentially opened to drilling. It could do irreparable damage to wildlife, our climate, and Alaska Native communities. We’re working every day with our 30 state affiliates, organizing on the ground, exposing backroom deals and corruption, rallying voters, and defending the treasured and unique places that define our country. But meeting this moment requires resources — especially as we go up against big polluters and fossil fuel opponents. This $100,000 match challenge, and how many people step up this Giving Tuesday, will determine how hard we can push back. Peter, your renewal right now powers our work to protect people and the planet. Will you renew before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to help keep this movement strong when it matters most? $5 is all it takes. https://links.messages.lcv. Every contribution brings us closer. And the clock is ticking. Thanks for standing with us, Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Peter, this isn’t
by accident:

[ Money ]Money taken from AIPAC: $0.00

That $0.00 represents something vanishingly rare in American politics
today — integrity.

While old guard Democrats court AIPAC, Abdul is doing the opposite. He’s
rejecting their money outright and proving that you can build a winning
Senate campaign while rejecting genocide.

That’s because on the campaign trail, he’s heard the same message: People
are tired of the status quo.

They’re sick of politicians who take AIPAC’s money and vote to send our
tax dollars overseas to bomb schools and hospitals while communities here
at home are ignored.

They’re exhausted by politicians who chase billionaire donors instead of
building a coalition of working people.

And, they’re searching for leaders who will rebuild what the Democratic
Party stands for.

Abdul is paving that path forward.

He’s showing what it looks like to run a campaign that refuses to play by
the establishment’s rules and wins by standing with the people, not the
powerful.

That’s why this $0.00 matters. It’s a promise to value working people and
our shared moral compass over AIPAC’s MAGA donors.

And our upcoming FEC deadline is the moment to show that a campaign rooted
in integrity can compete with the political forces backed by AIPAC. If we
show strength now, we reshape the narrative for the entire race.

on AIPAC’s preferred candidate, and win.

Thank you for standing with us. It truly makes all the difference.

— Team Abdul

name: Team Pou
subject: The tariffs that stole Christmas
body:
And they’re still saying affordability is a “hoax”

| |
---
Hi friend, While families were budgeting for the holidays, this MAGA administration and House Republicans were busy playing the Grinch. The tariffs they pushed are driving up the cost of toys, clothes, school supplies, and groceries. Prices went up. Shelves got emptier. And working families were left paying the price, right in the middle of the holidays. Then, with a straight face, they turned around and claimed affordability is a “hoax.” MAGA billionaires and their allies are telling families that kids need to make sacrifices. Fewer supplies at school. Fewer resources. Lower expectations for the future. At the same time, those very same politicians are handing out tax breaks, subsidies, and special treatment to corporations and billionaires who are already doing just fine. Nellie believes in something different. We don’t make kids sacrifice so billionaires can profit. We make the richest people pay their fair share so families can thrive and children don’t have to go without the basics they deserve. **[But this fight isn’t abstract. The battle lines run straight through this district. clean_body: And they’re still saying affordability is a “hoax” | | Hi friend, While families were budgeting for the holidays, this MAGA administration and House Republicans were busy playing the Grinch. The tariffs they pushed are driving up the cost of toys, clothes, school supplies, and groceries. Prices went up. Shelves got emptier. And working families were left paying the price, right in the middle of the holidays. Then, with a straight face, they turned around and claimed affordability is a “hoax.” MAGA billionaires and their allies are telling families that kids need to make sacrifices. Fewer supplies at school. Fewer resources. Lower expectations for the future. At the same time, those very same politicians are handing out tax breaks, subsidies, and special treatment to corporations and billionaires who are already doing just fine. Nellie believes in something different. We don’t make kids sacrifice so billionaires can profit. We make the richest people pay their fair share so families can thrive and children don’t have to go without the basics they deserve. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you for standing with us, Team Pou | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Nellie Pou for Congress PO Box 2696 Paterson, NJ 07509 United States

"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**

It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. Dear USO Supporter,
I speak from personal experience: Deploying to dangerous parts of the world, far from your home and loved ones, is one of the most difficult parts of military life -- especially during the holidays.
Having limited communication, missing traditions and celebrations, all while carrying the weight of their responsibility to protect us is what all service members endure daily.
**[I'm reaching out today because our heroes need urgent support as they serve around the world right now. Will you make a tax-deductible donation of $29 today to help us support our heroes into 2026? ](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/mWbZT-dx0qh-D/eXJJNmVsQ2Z3R1laWWN2Z2xpVmpJRUdpaDdhcEdXVDZDOS9zOVViQUtQaTcyUkxzNVNXN0hvYTBpUUdKOFdCdEJ6RUl3TElRWXNLQklmUEtjWjVkRWRTYW0zN0NMUkRFeCt3R25McUhkbFU9S0/bVFFWlV3eWd6SmVGZmFGUjZJR0s1M1oxSDZMcEFtNmFPcktqd0E0Rkdyc0pPMTJpdGdseWJ5d2pxbUZRR0V1dC80bFMrSzlKdEJLQmZXNHRQaTgwRXhZYnA0RmlBdnlFS0)**

clean_body: Your gift will go 2X as far to provide meals, care packages and more. | | | Dear USO Supporter, I speak from personal experience: Deploying to dangerous parts of the world, far from your home and loved ones, is one of the most difficult parts of military life -- especially during the holidays. Having limited communication, missing traditions and celebrations, all while carrying the weight of their responsibility to protect us is what all service members endure daily. For 48 hours only, your gift will be matched by Leonardo DRS, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $35,000. Your gift can help us reach our critical year-end goal to provide what our heroes need most: warm meals, care packages, Wi-Fi to call home and so much more to keep them mission ready. When our heroes are called into action, your generous support ensures the USO can go where our heroes go. The USO is not a government agency -- we are a nonprofit that relies on patriotic Americans like you who want to support those who defend our freedom. Because this year has been so challenging for our service members, the demand for our services has increased significantly, and we need your help now more than ever. As the year comes to an end, our mission to honor and provide for our military heroes never stops. Join us today and stand with our heroes. On behalf of our service members, Christopher Plamp Colonel, U.S. Air Force, Retired Chief Operating Officer, USO Leonardo DRS is matching all gifts to the USO up to a total of $35,000, through December 28, 2025. Your contribution will be used where it is needed most. United Service Organizations, Inc. Peter,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: **Navy SEALs.**

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

**We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! **[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=36d9a4b407514fbd8148f87143a2d003&_e=4pY2tI4mJuMinPk4qY61GyjM6UWURNm5z7pISq2Kub5BUt_rtMbisg-5UexsNwTFJYvRTSyFStKEGUrZ1w9jLtD8Dtdww2tcsONn3ZJzniCifORTgrLaxhAVoVL1Ih8175Dx1PbEqGr-LlLekbIe-PI1cWvYTjTgou8CzrK-Di_X3yGjAxL8okP14PR7oqfSu15LfRbo7uHHhFSEDkTpf67oxn_0LrLb6Jk7MK7pVrnGJ1v1W4qRDT2K2UD-Et_Slo8iQr8uURcJlx78JSJP7P5nrjVWxoOhJDRH3LBv4gXVbdL4JFxWOHcXMmm_o-fV1uPOP6RuhXCFIZsE_dMLt9WZ846U8fLLsN_usQqg4mmaW31mrKmM_HJJi-HO3V8yGwcCPW1H0cF6UCf97lHsMEHGVdSut9VPPl1d7Ef_sC0tfmNApEPzeL9ORdQ1iH3oFhGIb-MtlmmC5O6I5A91Ah4u401UaT80Q289KudQOVE7VFi9539tYEOpPyvaEiiLnR8-zLKu3eSbNQiqiB93SyOslYxq6vOuh_Vrl9IvUIkU4Uq3VsAf3AJK8pRuPD0KVXCrfcAVoCI_VVF1zhqdYFA9-FCQiBM4zhG1xjdgyVyAmIzbXjwkvcdSPVgAYuA3WM6kiOrAMs2ONKXAHJCRdsr0q_H6wqzsKf2Q9QybU1PbCSYwOzMAuT9HCacIbW7sk2QPrcIkUXgFMqZ6Rsyb7w%3D%3D)

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Peter, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Peter to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ...Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. body:
These next few weeks are going to matter more than most people realize. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5bd9d852e6ca473b83006fee48719416&_e=q5wtm35LU4ND5hrxA4DDCSlwrCMNAt-05ajQhVVMDNq0e1eqGFMNFieSUWa8jjHLX8TblxjFcImr15rZ5u4NGGF_RX9aSny-b2wTRsJfKHNfPYACX6DMVjFryiwgOba9VAt8B3YwpORNJSOutnIRKPX6qJoYUR5pvLmELOt2j0Cvm3j4hSO0FOxs_mklUBzF3ohmXEZGzpENW1qRMU7rEUy-xnEpmM9o1vh2xe4B69HwaXCp-w4096XtRlBcAmM27gIZiCTR6RmO7Uux7CapHKkOeCDL3UjQyyMa_ob0h8KVPzFbFuth_NUczipKUDjRArrokIPMS6F5-YOkGYDvqyo4m7VNRaTKfFDM-0Lm7TrBGw83Nb3NrS6w096uTeVyX75-6WIdXwWIhkxbuW6WfXm2219MYYXg84rOEN64mMs778vyyHyZDtuHsq4RjgzjzUyXhQdL5oYeS8-KkeGAmg_-_Z5GuLvHkuUYMgTHqsuIKUrEV5r3d4-V9s-ZagMEVPttvNYnS84teZntteKa5uOflvYRLBpSh08WisWwDG2fUqPDNP-TOL5LFu34Hdm16YXKzLVDbvhxDVgH1S7CDKVJa95Niulq8D1sK1Rudvv_e_dvdMmYRXqkk0PxUN9ll9XlvwsLMnOgUvxwrDbvgO5uYpsRYbQmPgU5qu_TvqytkEl7N-tP3KPg4H84JMHxPwHCsiUm_zOcFRGuE9tpJDznnlLtyCYGooDWl7NVXaFj7i92m_reEuPA35g5EdgLk6XrJON59nkPYtKw9PXpELvqLU_S3vs6CxkEoEBwJkoHmM_bJulxImvKQvcOIuWKt6JqxEHolaQ2BcjirDAypixl1Ha9HIc8XtyZHCtCNjQ%3D)
---
Fellow American,

I want to put this race in perspective for a moment.

**The primary election is** **approaching.**

On March 3rd, 2026, and really, even before then, ballots start getting cast. Voters lock in opinions. Campaigns either have momentum or they don’t. And December is when that trajectory gets set.

**Here’s where we stand:[**we’re behind on our December fundraising goal.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5bd9d852e6ca473b83006fee48719416&_e=q5wtm35LU4ND5hrxA4DDCSlwrCMNAt-05ajQhVVMDNq0e1eqGFMNFieSUWa8jjHLX8TblxjFcImr15rZ5u4NGGF_RX9aSny-b2wTRsJfKHNfPYACX6DMVjFryiwgOba9VAt8B3YwpORNJSOutnIRKPX6qJoYUR5pvLmELOt2j0Cvm3j4hSO0FOxs_mklUBzF3ohmXEZGzpENW1qRMU7rEUy-xnEpmM9o1vh2xe4B69HwaXCp-w4096XtRlBcAmM27gIZiCTR6RmO7Uux7CapHKkOeCDL3UjQyyMa_ob0h8KVPzFbFuth_NUczipKUDjRMP73b19Wo5yp2jqDddDG-r4VtLevE3MIFHk-f8OhGSiXsMDthDqwrwn_pZY387YpgRolMOW3gem-Xlr3vA9DbiodMhAyjqiQAdZt0-n4p4-fWV90DiFm9rQeKrq2uWNhP5vw6PpA7PQEa8TIv1673z-c3DeawxpgP6DFcasoydq0FW-eF8swD1HgZnOmxhxSkk7PrXeIaX7MOV-_dThRecFVh-yzRpiSI4XI5jK9b8_Eqmd_16GMdiqNkXhWJ9JYj3oUwq0t8hEYJxFirK0X3pnzD1eXPW9qxzK6CQ7tfNFLNd55Qm-pv9puvHRMM8Dc3LY3gynhP947DhCzXioHRfJ5xltNTZv69ZW-df_3qmD_YmasJ-Kbw28MAVJLX2H4xEIiQnXClgrVSQ7c4HnLZeClzWS5pr5dbM6FTCE68FPX5gTgA7uAIdf3D7KlNqvjTlMIVHyQE8vdq1AE_8kSmek1NbSlN_OQoQjsvEQwueCQkRP_Gfo6LFysFj8DwFei_8PGdnjIQa2BQsf-D9FrgpJLOAPvu-INBgp_1My51l8%3D)**

That’s not something I’m comfortable glossing over. The resources we raise right now determine whether we head into 2026 building strength or trying to play catch-up. Staffing, voter contact, early advertising all of it starts with what we do this month.

We’re also closing in on **our final FEC report of the year** at the end of December. That report is a measuring stick. National Republicans, outside groups, and major donors will look at it to decide whether this campaign is gaining ground.

A strong report shows momentum. A weak one raises questions.

[**I’m asking you to help us close the gap and finish December the right way. clean_body: These next few weeks are going to matter more than most people realize. | Fellow American, I want to put this race in perspective for a moment. The primary election is approaching. On March 3rd, 2026, and really, even before then, ballots start getting cast. Voters lock in opinions. Campaigns either have momentum or they don’t. And December is when that trajectory gets set. Here’s where we stand: That’s not something I’m comfortable glossing over. The resources we raise right now determine whether we head into 2026 building strength or trying to play catch-up. Staffing, voter contact, early advertising all of it starts with what we do this month. We’re also closing in on our final FEC report of the year at the end of December. That report is a measuring stick. National Republicans, outside groups, and major donors will look at it to decide whether this campaign is gaining ground. A strong report shows momentum. A weak one raises questions. Thank you for standing with me. These next few weeks are going to matter more than most people realize. God bless, Josh Cortez | | Paid for by Josh Cortez for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A quick note during this holiday season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We need to show that our progressive movement is strong and growing.
Hi Peter, it's Pramila.
I’m reaching out because my campaign just announced our big $30,000 end-of-year fundraising goal, and we need your help to reach it.
Reaching this goal is important for two reasons. First, it will give us the resources we need to start the midterm election year off strong. And second, it will show everyone — from MAGA Republicans to other Democrats — that our progressive movement is strong and growing.
Can I count on you to pitch in $3 (or any amount that you can) at the link below?
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20251227-2**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251227-2.vcQ09M&refcode=em20251227-5749&amount=3&t=1&akid=5749%2E420207%2EAJQ7YJ)
Thank you, and happy holidays!
Pramila Jayapal

subject: Help rescue children who’ve been sold into slavery
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18259747/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdHVtNzJjNEh4Vg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjc/LbmNsWE1BU3JYcg/qP2hpZHM9bmM2dndTWWJZZjVsZGFscw/gaVBxSg/s7md8452072)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18259747/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zb3VuZC1vZi1mcmVlZG9tLWZvdW5kYXRpb24ucmV2di5jby9zdXBwb3J0LXNvZi1oMS1zYXZlLWNoaWxkcmVu/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjc/LbmNsWE1BU3JYcg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9V0FSUjc5MDg0/gaVBxSg/s9q1a212bc7)
---
Patriot, This is difficult to hear – but it’s critically important for you to understand. Vulnerable children are being abducted and sold into sex trafficking at the highest rates in history. A **massive surge in immigration** , **skyrocketing drug use** , and a **22% increase in online recruitment** of victims during the pandemic are all to blame for the estimated **50,000 children** who will be sold into sex trafficking in the United States this year. Rescuing minors from their abusers and combatting the multi-billion-dollar human trafficking and child sex “industry” — which is larger than the global cocaine market — takes a great deal of resources. **[**At the Sound of Freedom Foundation, we need your emergency support to equip our agents with the tools and resources they need to rescue defenseless children from modern-day slavery. Please help with your tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $100, or more today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18259747/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zb3VuZC1vZi1mcmVlZG9tLWZvdW5kYXRpb24ucmV2di5jby9zdXBwb3J0LXNvZi1oMS1zYXZlLWNoaWxkcmVu/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjc/LbmNsWE1BU3JYcg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9V0FSUjc5MDg0/gaVBxSg/s9q1a212bc7)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18259747/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zb3VuZC1vZi1mcmVlZG9tLWZvdW5kYXRpb24ucmV2di5jby9zdXBwb3J0LXNvZi1oMS1zYXZlLWNoaWxkcmVu/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjc/LbmNsWE1BU3JYcg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9V0FSUjc5MDg0/gaVBxSg/s9q1a212bc7)
---
As the producer of the feature film _Sound of Freedom_ — which you have likely seen or heard about — I helped sound the alarm about the horrific realities of the $9.5 BILLION human trafficking and child sex industry. Based on a true story, _Sound of Freedom_ tells the gut-wrenching story of a brother and sister — Miguel and Rocío Aguilar — who were abducted and sold to be used as sex slaves ... taken by organized criminals who tricked their father. _Sound of Freedom_ was a box office hit and gave us the platform to spread awareness about children who must be rescued from unimaginably horrific realities. Now, through The Sound of Freedom Foundation, we identify and track cases of child abduction and trafficking, and we tirelessly search for and rescue defenseless victims. **[God’s children are NOT for sale, which is why we must act immediately to SAVE these innocent lives from sex trafficking. I hope I can count on your gift of $25, $50, or more to help us reunite young girls and boys with their families who are praying for their return.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18259747/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zb3VuZC1vZi1mcmVlZG9tLWZvdW5kYXRpb24ucmV2di5jby9zdXBwb3J0LXNvZi1oMS1zYXZlLWNoaWxkcmVu/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjc/LbmNsWE1BU3JYcg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9V0FSUjc5MDg0/gaVBxSg/s9q1a212bc7)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18259747/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zb3VuZC1vZi1mcmVlZG9tLWZvdW5kYXRpb24ucmV2di5jby9zdXBwb3J0LXNvZi1oMS1zYXZlLWNoaWxkcmVu/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjc/LbmNsWE1BU3JYcg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9V0FSUjc5MDg0/gaVBxSg/s9q1a212bc7)
---
Shockingly, the average age of victims is 12 years old and 79% of all human trafficking cases are for sexual exploitation. In many cases, abduction occurs internationally and there are costs associated with hiring attorneys, filing petitions, and even traveling to the country where the child is located. While the cost of returning an abducted child varies depending on the case, the truth is that the rescue of a missing child is an incredibly complex and expensive mission. At the Sound of Freedom Foundation, we firmly believe that no family deserves to end the search for their child because there isn’t the financial ability to continue their fight! **[Please help us to rescue hurt and exploited children and combat these heinous crimes with all resources available. Your immediate support of the Sound of Freedom Foundation with a tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $100, or more would be a critical investment toward helping us save innocent children’s lives.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18259747/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zb3VuZC1vZi1mcmVlZG9tLWZvdW5kYXRpb24ucmV2di5jby9zdXBwb3J0LXNvZi1oMS1zYXZlLWNoaWxkcmVu/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjc/LbmNsWE1BU3JYcg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9V0FSUjc5MDg0/gaVBxSg/s9q1a212bc7) **
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18259747/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zb3VuZC1vZi1mcmVlZG9tLWZvdW5kYXRpb24ucmV2di5jby9zdXBwb3J0LXNvZi1oMS1zYXZlLWNoaWxkcmVu/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjc/LbmNsWE1BU3JYcg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9V0FSUjc5MDg0/gaVBxSg/s9q1a212bc7)
---
Imagine learning that your child, grandchild, or family friend vanished and having no idea where in the world they are and if they’re being sold by sex traffickers. It makes your stomach churn just to think about such a thing. **[That is why I’m asking for your desperately needed financial support to assist in the rescue and return of children who have been trafficked. Please help with your most generous gift to the Sound of Freedom Foundation right away — truly, you will be helping to save lives.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18259747/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zb3VuZC1vZi1mcmVlZG9tLWZvdW5kYXRpb24ucmV2di5jby9zdXBwb3J0LXNvZi1oMS1zYXZlLWNoaWxkcmVu/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjc/LbmNsWE1BU3JYcg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9V0FSUjc5MDg0/gaVBxSg/s9q1a212bc7)** Together, we can set them free! Many blessings, Eduardo Verástegui
_Sound of Freedom_ , Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18259747/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zb3VuZC1vZi1mcmVlZG9tLWZvdW5kYXRpb24ucmV2di5jby9zdXBwb3J0LXNvZi1oMS1zYXZlLWNoaWxkcmVu/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjc/LbmNsWE1BU3JYcg/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9V0FSUjc5MDg0/gaVBxSg/s9q1a212bc7)
