name: James Carville
subject: shaking in their boots
body:
Donald Trump and his allies are trying to buy the Senate seat in North Carolina.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=224%2E124072%2E1m26As)
Listen up, Peter: Republicans are _hell bent_ on holding onto power in Washington in these upcoming midterm elections. With control of the White House, the House of Representatives, and the Senate, they get to do whatever they damn well please to this country — and we know what that gets us: _a whole lotta BS, chaos, and corruption._ **[This Senate seat in North Carolina is the whole linchpin to our plans to stop the GOP. Democrats haven’t won it since 2008, but Roy Cooper’s the guy who can change that. He needs us to step up to help. Roy’s got a critical end-of-quarter financial filing deadline on Wednesday and a huge goal to hit — $1 million. Before I say another word, stop what you’re doing and donate anything you can spare to help Roy win.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3265?t=7&akid=224%2E124072%2E1m26As)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3266?t=8&akid=224%2E124072%2E1m26As)

Let me tell you something I bet the GOP doesn’t want you to know: Republicans are terrified of Roy. _Shaking in their boots._
**You see, Roy has won NC before, and he can do it again. So the radical right is going all out to stop him.**
Far-right PACs and mega-donors are ready and waiting to spend _hundreds of millions_ against Roy and make this the first-ever billion-dollar Senate race. The money’s already pouring in.
Trump even handpicked the dirty DC lobbyist who’s running against Roy — and now, Trump’s own team is running that guy’s campaign in North Carolina. _Talk about insider politics._
Look, Trump’s guy (his name’s Michael Whatley) would be nothing more than a rubber stamp for whatever the hell Trump wants. _Hell no._
But we have another choice for the next Senator from North Carolina. **Peter, Roy Cooper is the real deal.**
**[Let’s show the GOP that they may have big money on their side, but we’re ready to take them on, and we’re sure as hell not backing down. Pitch in before midnight Wednesday so that Roy can make a strong showing on this financial report and get to work winning this damn thing!](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3265?t=14&akid=224%2E124072%2E1m26As)**
– James Carville
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: This is Trump’s textbook move
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

In the Senate, I’m exposing Trump’s corruption and shedding light on the
damage he has done to our country. His reckless tariffs are destroying the
economy. He is undermining the principles of our democracy and the rule of
law. He is slashing food assistance and health care access for working
people to pay for tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. The list goes on.

Trump has responded in the same way he always does when backed into a
corner — attacking his rivals. Namely, me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1004&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]In less than one year of Trump’s second term, I have faced a firestorm
of baseless attacks from Trump allies and the president himself. Before
our final fundraising deadline of 2025, I’m coming to you again for your
help: Will you pitch in to stand with me and help me fight back against
these attacks?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q42025_abs_em.jZ5GRf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q42025_abs_em.jmTwmA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q42025_abs_em.fmwQtt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q42025_abs_em.z9ptV2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q42025_abs_em.oB7ZBD&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Donald Trump called for me to be investigated and jailed on Truth Social:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]Trump on Truth Social: Adam Schiff is a THIEF! He should be prosecuted,
just like they tried to prosecute me, and everyone else — The only
difference is, WE WERE TOTALLY INNOCENT, IT WAS ALL A GIANT HOAX!

Attorney General Pam Bondi revealed that none other than corrupt political
appointee Ed Martin would be investigating me after I blocked his
nomination for U.S. Attorney:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]Pam Bondi

Then, FBI Director Kash Patel — a man with one of the most outrageous,
right-wing records of recent memory — spread defamatory lies about my
service as Intelligence Committee Chair during the Trump impeachment:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&t=1013&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]Kash Patel attacks Adam

And Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt added fuel to the fire by attacking
me by name during a White House press briefing:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&t=1014&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]Karoline Leavitt attacks

It even made the front page of Fox News’ website:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&t=1015&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]Karoline Leavitt attacks on Fox News website cover

And Trump publicly urged AG Bondi to initiate a federal grand jury
investigation into yours truly:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&t=1016&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]Pam Bondi gives trump bad news when he asks her to discuss alleged
grand jury probe

These baseless, tired attacks have one goal: they’re meant to distract
people from the real, pressing issues in our country — all of which have
been exacerbated by Trump and his congressional allies.

In less than one year, Trump has shown that he will come after anyone who
dares to speak out against him.

And his attacks on me won’t stop anytime soon.

As I continue to shed light on his abuses of power and failed leadership,
they will only escalate. That’s why I’m counting on your support before
our last FEC deadline of the year to show that we won’t back down:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1017&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]With your help, we can post the best possible numbers and show the
true grassroots strength of this team in our public FEC report. Will you
chip in to help me fight back against these attacks before our crucial
deadline?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q42025_abs_em.jZ5GRf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q42025_abs_em.jmTwmA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1019&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q42025_abs_em.fmwQtt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1020&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q42025_abs_em.z9ptV2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1021&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q42025_abs_em.oB7ZBD&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1022&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1023&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for your support,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1024&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2342?c0=q42025_abs_em.Iv4c2K&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1025&akid=9340%2E5257348%2Eb9Amh5 ]DONATE MONTHLY

subject: re: our emails –

body:
Your gift will be triple-matched for a limited time
| | | Hi friends, I'll get right into it --

**_Chuck Schumer_** emailed you.
**_Kamala Harris_** emailed you.
**_James Carville_** emailed you.
**_Mark Kelly_** emailed you.
**_Roy Cooper_** emailed you.
**_Sherrod Brown_** emailed you.
**_Adam Schiff_** emailed you.
**_Marc Elias_** emailed you.
And now, **_I've_** emailed you too!

All of us emailed you because ever since the GOP trifecta took office, Donald Trump and his allies in Congress have worked against the American people. **[Flipping the Senate blue is the _best_ and _surest_ way _to stop them._](https://go.dscc.org/go/22349?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251227-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandTheyAllEmailedYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251227-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandTheyAllEmailedYou-Pros-sl1&akid=22192%2E9716520%2EVhht4Y)**

Without control of the Senate, Donald Trump won't be able to pass his destructive ideas into law. He'll lose his rubber stamp for his extreme nominees. So right now, **we need _all hands on deck_ to win this thing.**

This team of Democratic leaders is staying in the fight from now until Election Day. We KNOW this grassroots team is ready to fight, too -- but we have a MASSIVE end-of-year fundraising goal coming up soon, we're about to fall short, _and we don't have much time to catch up!_

**We must end Trump and his allies' dangerous, unchecked power -- and that work starts right now with you, me, and this wonderful team of grassroots supporters banding together to put more Democrats in the Senate.**

**[So please, join us by chipping in $5 right now to stop the GOP's agenda in its tracks. For a limited time only, your gift will go three times as far!>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22349?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251227-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandTheyAllEmailedYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251227-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandTheyAllEmailedYou-Pros-sl1&akid=22192%2E9716520%2EVhht4Y)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: Your gift will be triple-matched for a limited time | | | Hi friends, I'll get right into it -- Chuck Schumer emailed you. Kamala Harris emailed you. James Carville emailed you. Mark Kelly emailed you. Roy Cooper emailed you. Sherrod Brown emailed you. Adam Schiff emailed you. Marc Elias emailed you. And now, I've emailed you too! All of us emailed you because ever since the GOP trifecta took office, Donald Trump and his allies in Congress have worked against the American people. Without control of the Senate, Donald Trump won't be able to pass his destructive ideas into law. He'll lose his rubber stamp for his extreme nominees. So right now, we need all hands on deck to win this thing. This team of Democratic leaders is staying in the fight from now until Election Day. We KNOW this grassroots team is ready to fight, too -- but we have a MASSIVE end-of-year fundraising goal coming up soon, we're about to fall short, and we don't have much time to catch up! We must end Trump and his allies' dangerous, unchecked power -- and that work starts right now with you, me, and this wonderful team of grassroots supporters banding together to put more Democrats in the Senate. We need your help to fight for the Senate.
